name: (1) update about SCOTUS [FFR]
subject: Joe Manchin just STUNNED us
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Congress is FINALLY taking action to reign in SCOTUS
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22624%2E4449941%2EY2UILU)
---
Congress is _FINALLY_ taking action to reign in SCOTUS before public trust in the ultra-conservative court hits an all time low!

Political experts say imposing term limits could help keep the Court balanced and prevent corruption. _**_YES!!_**_

**But before we take any action, we must know what voters think:** | **[_Do you support term limits for U.S. Supreme Court Justices?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/SCOTUS-term-limits24?source=FFR_20241211_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22624%2E4449941%2EY2UILU)** | **[YES »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/SCOTUS-term-limits24?source=FFR_20241211_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22624%2E4449941%2EY2UILU)**
---
**[NO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/SCOTUS-term-limits24?source=FFR_20241211_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=22624%2E4449941%2EY2UILU)**
**[UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/SCOTUS-term-limits24?source=FFR_20241211_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=22624%2E4449941%2EY2UILU)**
Democracy lies in your hands, friend.

– Fight for Reform

body:
Merry Christmas!

| | | | **Peter,**
Don't forget that I will be making a LIVE announcement on Friday afternoon on Facebook LIVE at 3:00 PM about the future of our movement and role for the cause of liberty.
Additionally...
This is your _**last chance**_ to get tickets for $5 to our **Merry MAGA Christmas Party & Benefit** because prices increase to $10 at the door!
**Proceeds benefit BATTLE2BE** , an organization bridging service gaps to support veterans, first responders, and communities.
Get your tickets below.

[https://merrymagachristmas.com](https://jamesonellis.acemlna.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE4UqLMDKF8yQxMUeBt2H6kk_Ugle02XHXLUneg7pN__ky.zeNs1Y2jitA~jvYxYHPG)

name: Letitia James
subject: Two major wins for New Yorkers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Together, we have the power to score more victories like this in New York and across the country.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98552606/517039447/-2022193277?refcode=jtk1761-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg2MzhlNC0xZWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OGbY8vOqA-j2j6P7Ar5TCaG-rSQaQqDQ5G93luRHzo=)
---
Peter,

Last month, my office sent a powerful message to the bad actors of New York: If you exploit the vulnerable or steal from taxpayers, **you _will_ be held accountable.**
In a major victory for the fight to protect Medicaid patients, we shut down a predatory scheme that stole _millions_ and denied lifesaving treatment to New Yorkers living with HIV.
By stopping this dangerous fraud, we redirected critical funding back into patient care and sent a message that we will not tolerate fraud and abuse. But the fight isn’t over. With your support, we can do even more to protect the most vulnerable New Yorkers.
**[Will you join me in the fight to protect public health and advocate for the rights of all New Yorkers by donating $5 before my midnight deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98552607/517039448/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1761-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg2MzhlNC0xZWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OGbY8vOqA-j2j6P7Ar5TCaG-rSQaQqDQ5G93luRHzo=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98552608/517039449/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1761-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg2MzhlNC0xZWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OGbY8vOqA-j2j6P7Ar5TCaG-rSQaQqDQ5G93luRHzo=)
---
This victory shows just how much we can accomplish together – putting an end to fraud, protecting public health, and standing up for the rights of all New Yorkers. **But there’s still more work to do.**
Shady magnates and crooked corporations are always looking for ways to exploit our systems and endanger our citizens.

But what they don't know is that my office will continue to bring these cases to light and shut down illegal businesses that put New Yorkers at risk with fraud and dangerous medications.
**[I need bold, dedicated fighters like you to help me continue this critical work as attorney general. Will you rush a contribution of $5 or more right now to fuel this fight and help me protect New Yorkers?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98552609/517039450/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1761-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg2MzhlNC0xZWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OGbY8vOqA-j2j6P7Ar5TCaG-rSQaQqDQ5G93luRHzo=)**

name: Google Web App Activity Lawsuit
subject: Court-Ordered Notice of Class Action
body:
| | | _UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA_
---
| |
## If you have previously had either the Google “Web & App Activity” control or the “Supplemental Web & App Activity” sub-setting turned off or “paused,” you could be included in an ongoing class action lawsuit.
---
| | For more information about the lawsuit, read below or visit [www.GoogleWebAppActivityLawsuit.com](https://e.epiqnotice.com/rd/9z3zp040alm09q8b5f5qhtjdsusac5stpuvrc27kqo0_rp22sh2s8gm1or2cjie0oh5u).

Para una notificacion en Español, visitar [www.GoogleWebAppActivityLawsuit.com](https://e.epiqnotice.com/rd/9z3zgj0qkmjh8fajllkrnv52ubn9p38f5j57n8le928_rp22sh2s8gm1or2cjie0oh5u).

_A federal Court authorized this Notice. This is not a solicitation from a lawyer._
---
| | **What is the lawsuit about?** Four Google account holders (“Plaintiffs”) filed a class action lawsuit alleging that Google LLC (“Google”) unlawfully accessed their devices and data, including app activity data on their mobile devices, even though the Google activity controls called Web & App Activity (“WAA”) and/or a sub-setting concerning “Chrome history and activity from sites, apps, and devices that use Google services,” sometimes called supplemental Web & App Activity (“sWAA”) were turned off or “paused.” Plaintiffs allege Google unlawfully accessed their mobile devices to collect, save, and use the data concerning their activity on non-Google apps that have incorporated certain Google software code into the apps. Plaintiffs have three legal claims: (1) invasion of privacy; (2) intrusion upon seclusion (similar to invasion of privacy); and (3) violation of the Comprehensive Computer Data Access and Fraud Act (“CDAFA”). For all three legal claims, Plaintiffs seek money damages and changes to Google’s practices.

Google denies Plaintiffs’ legal claims and does not admit any wrongdoing. The Court has not decided who is right.

**You are receiving this Notice because Google’s records indicate that you may be a Class Member.**

The Court decided the legal claims brought by Plaintiffs can proceed as a nationwide class action. You may be included as a Class Member if you have or had WAA and/or sWAA turned off or “paused” at any time between July 1, 2016, and September 23, 2024. This Notice only advises you of the existence of this lawsuit, your rights and options, and the deadlines to exercise them, if you are a Class Member. More specifically, the Court certified the following classes.

**Comprehensive Computer Data Access and Fraud Act (“CDAFA”)**

For the alleged violation of the CDAFA, the Court certified the following classes:

_**Class 1:**_ All individuals who, during the period beginning July 1, 2016, and continuing through September 23, 2024, (a) had their “Web & App Activity” and/or “supplemental Web & App Activity” setting turned off and (b) whose activity on a non-Google-branded mobile app was still transmitted to Google, from (c) a mobile device running the Android operating system, because of the Firebase Software Development Kit (“SDK”) and/or Google Mobile Ads SDK.

_**Class 2:**_ All individuals who, during the period beginning July 1, 2016, and continuing through September 23, 2024, (a) had their “Web & App Activity” and/or “supplemental Web & App Activity” setting turned off and (b) whose activity on a non-Google-branded mobile app was still transmitted to Google, from (c) a mobile device running a non-Android operating system, because of the Firebase SDK and/or Google Mobile Ads SDK.

**Invasion of Privacy and Intrusion upon Seclusion**

For the alleged invasion of privacy and intrusion upon seclusion legal claims, the Court certified the same Class 1 and Class 2 but _excluded_ individuals who only have an “Enterprise” account or “supervised Google Account for users under age 13” (also known as a “Unicorn” account). An “Enterprise” account is an account managed by an administrator that is designed for use by end users within an organization, such as businesses, non-profits, and schools. A “supervised Google Account for users under age 13” is an account created for a minor when they are under the age of 13, which is created and supervised by a parent using Google Family Link.

_**Class 1:**_ All “non-Enterprise” and “non-Unicorn” individuals who, during the period beginning July 1, 2016, and continuing through September 23, 2024, (a) had their “Web & App Activity” and/or “supplemental Web & App Activity” setting turned off and (b) whose activity on a non-Google-branded mobile app was still transmitted to Google, from (c) a mobile device running the Android operating system, because of the Firebase Software Development Kit (“SDK”) and/or Google Mobile Ads SDK.

_**Class 2:**_ All “non-Enterprise” and “non-Unicorn” individuals who, during the period beginning July 1, 2016 and continuing through September 23, 2024, (a) had their “Web & App Activity” and/or “supplemental Web & App Activity” setting turned off and (b) whose activity on a non-Google-branded mobile app was still transmitted to Google, from (c) a mobile device running a non-Android operating system, because of the Firebase SDK and/or Google Mobile Ads SDK.

If you are a child for whom a supervised Google Account for users under age 13 was created, please discuss this Notice with your parent or guardian to help you decide whether you may be a Class Member. If you are a parent or guardian supervising a Google Account for users under age 13, and if Google’s records indicate your child may be a Class Member, you will receive a separate Notice. Please review that Notice with your child to help them decide whether they may be a Class Member.

**Is there any money or benefits available now?** No money or benefits are available now. The Court has not decided whether Google did anything wrong, and Plaintiffs and Google have not settled the lawsuit. There is no guarantee money or benefits will be obtained in the future. You will be notified if money or benefits become available.

**What happens if I do nothing at all?** If you do nothing, you will remain a Class Member. If Plaintiffs obtain money or benefits from this lawsuit—as a result of a trial or a settlement—you may receive a payment or benefits in the future. If you do nothing now, regardless of whether Plaintiffs win or lose, you will be legally bound by all Court orders and judgments regarding the legal claims in this lawsuit. You will lose the right to bring or maintain a separate lawsuit against Google for the legal claims alleged in this lawsuit.

**How do I exclude myself?** To exclude yourself, you must send a written request by mail stating that you want to be excluded from _Rodriguez v. Google LLC_. You must include your name, address, telephone number, email address, and your signature. You must mail your exclusion request **postmarked** by **February 20, 2025** , to: Rodriguez v. Google Exclusions, P.O. Box 2749, Portland, OR 97208-2749.

You cannot exclude yourself on the phone or by email. To exclude yourself, you must do so individually and separately; no consolidated, group, or mass requests for exclusion will be accepted. If you timely ask to be excluded, you will not be legally bound by anything that happens in this lawsuit. You may be able to sue (or continue to sue) Google in the future regarding the legal claims in this lawsuit. If you do not exclude yourself, by **February 20, 2025** , you will remain a Class Member and be bound by the orders of the Court in this lawsuit.

**Do I have a lawyer in this case?** Yes. The Court has appointed the following lawyers as Class Counsel to represent Class Members. You may also hire your own lawyer at your own expense who may appear on your behalf.

You may also obtain information regarding the lawsuit on the Court docket in this lawsuit, for a fee, through the Court’s Public Access to Court Electronic Records (PACER) system at [https://ecf.cand.uscourts.gov](https://e.epiqnotice.com/rd/9z3z0ghc91f698hluqu0quctj745t1s4r8c2lg4fkug_rp22sh2s8gm1or2cjie0oh5u), or by visiting the office of the Clerk of the Court for the United States District Court for the Northern District of California, Phillip Burton Federal Building & United States Courthouse, 450 Golden Gate Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94102, between 9:00 a.m. and 4:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, excluding Court holidays.

PLEASE DO NOT TELEPHONE THE COURT OR THE COURT CLERK’S OFFICE TO INQUIRE ABOUT THIS LAWSUIT. **ALL QUESTIONS SHOULD BE DIRECTED TO THE NOTICE ADMINISTRATOR OR CLASS COUNSEL.**

name: Qasim Rashid, Esq.
subject: Where Is Our Corporate Reckoning?
body:
If we agree murder is wrong, and it is, why do we tolerate corporate policies that kill Americans?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..eYh0W3uCWOE6GoEgHkGCEgvacRFLbrzfge0WFHhNb8A?) for more

# [Where Is Our Corporate Reckoning?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152991051&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTkxMDUxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM5NjM2ODgsImV4cCI6MTczNjU1NTY4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IwHU4XHh-N3RVPU0lsF6eiykcFioxaVQwHoZkOuISIk)
### If we agree murder is wrong, and it is, why do we tolerate corporate policies that kill Americans?
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152991051&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTkxMDUxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMzk2MzY4OCwiZXhwIjoxNzM2NTU1Njg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dCYIPR1VK4n3GrhbKCNLIZbsZ6CYJMOt70ygIL1il58&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152991051&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTkxMDUxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM5NjM2ODgsImV4cCI6MTczNjU1NTY4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IwHU4XHh-N3RVPU0lsF6eiykcFioxaVQwHoZkOuISIk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152991051&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTkxMDUxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM5NjM2ODgsImV4cCI6MTczNjU1NTY4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IwHU4XHh-N3RVPU0lsF6eiykcFioxaVQwHoZkOuISIk)
---
| | [](https://substack..JL3ZJHqzfuN0j3FAodGYSHDKqnax-6ooK7QUQwSzwBM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/where-is-our-corporate-reckoning?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The recent killing of UnitedHealth's CEO has forced an uncomfortable conversation about our healthcare system, and about the broader lack of accountability of corporations. For generations, corporations have gotten away with literally killing Americans, yet not one executive has ever gone to prison. Meanwhile, politicians--who are supposed to represent the people--capitulate to corporate donations and turn a blind eye to the suffering of working people. It is important we recognize these grotesque examples of corporate violence for what they are, so we can effectively arm ourselves against their ongoing onslaught. **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MtZ2TYx7w4fDnwZgvbAU2AKILWjGn15tt5Cum--wUOo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152991051)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c07aa079-b57f-4e32-b470-6e528e61cf9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: [Shepard Fairey](https://substack.com/redirect/3cdd1821-4b6d-451b-9bff-0af5df9b1440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _'Corporate Violence for Sale'_ , 2011
If we agree that murder is wrong, then we must also agree that corporate policies knowingly designed to prioritize profits over human lives are equally immoral. If denying care that leads to death isn't murder, then what is it? Our system allows the rich to kill the poor through bureaucracy, all while masking it as business as usual.
This isn't hyperbole, and I present documented examples below.
### UnitedHealth
UnitedHealth, like many for-profit health insurance companies, has built its wealth by leading the industry in denying care to those who need it most. Denied care that has led to countless documented deaths. Yet, this systemic violence--driven by corporate greed--is rarely acknowledged as such. Why? And it isn't just in healthcare that we see this corporate violence against working people. It is a corporate violence free for all.
### Johnson & Johnson
For example, Johnson & Johnson knew for decades that its baby powder had asbestos in it, knew that asbestos causes cancer and other horrific health conditions, [yet continued to produce its baby powder even as its customers got sick and died](https://substack.com/redirect/98231170-d18c-4193-aadb-d285efc87231?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Consider the case of Darlene Coker, a woman dying due to using J&J baby powder that J&J knew was poisonous.
> Coker and her lawyer sought [filed a lawsuit] compelling J&J to share thousands of pages of company memos, internal reports and other confidential documents with lawyers for some of the 11,700 plaintiffs now claiming that the company's talc caused their cancers -- including thousands of women with ovarian cancer. A Reuters examination of many of those documents, as well as deposition and trial testimony, shows that from at least 1971 to the early 2000s, the company's raw talc and finished powders sometimes tested positive for small amounts of asbestos, and that company executives, mine managers, scientists, doctors and lawyers fretted over the problem and how to address it **while failing to disclose it to regulators or the public.**
By the way, zero Johnson & Johnson executives ever went to prison for this crime.
### Ford Motor Company
Who can forget that Ford knew that their Pinto was liable to catching fire, yet made the cold and heartless calculation that paying settlements to families whose loved ones burned to death [would be cheaper than fixing the faulty design that led to fires](https://substack.com/redirect/73cbd53e-09ae-4c48-bf3e-d7a79f567df1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? Despite 27 confirmed deaths due to the Pinto's faulty design, zero Ford executives ever went to prison.
### Purdue Pharma
The Sackler family of Purdue Pharma [illegally pushed opioids into the market](https://substack.com/redirect/dd83b381-f368-4f1f-ba2f-b302b5579d1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), knowing full well that they would result in opioid deaths due to addiction and overdose. Despite the hundreds of thousands of people who have died due to this devastating opioid crisis, zero Sackler family members or Purdue Pharma executives have gone to prison. Instead they've been let off the hook with a fine.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..MtZ2TYx7w4fDnwZgvbAU2AKILWjGn15tt5Cum--wUOo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152991051)
Each of the aforementioned CEOs and executives deliberately committed acts that they knew would result in the killing of ordinary people, yet none of them went to prison. And none of them are so much as described as murderers or terrorists. Are the corporate elitists in their ivory towers so high up that they cannot see the grotesque hypocrisy that us ordinary folks on the ground can see clear as day??
_If the punishment for a crime is a fine, then that is a law that exists only for the poor._
The examples are near endless of corporations committing acts that they know will kill people, yet facing no consequences as a result of their deadly and deliberate decisions. Indeed, you will be hard pressed to find any CEOs or executives that went to prison for committing corporate violence--yet you can be almost certain that the assailant who killed the UnitedHealth CEO will see prison. The question here isn't about justifying violence--because that violence is already deemed 'justified' as long as, and only if, it is done by corporations under the guise of 'maximizing shareholder value.' The question is, why don't the people who finally woke up when an assailant violently killed the UnitedHealth CEO, also recognize the deadly and mass corporate violence that goes unpunished every day?
Therefore, it bears repeating, in a just society, how is an assailant killing a CEO in broad daylight materially different than a CEO deliberately poisoning millions of people knowing a significant portion of them will die as a result?
Adding to the frustration and anger at corporations like UnitedHealth, consider what Americans sacrifice every year just to pay for critical and life saving healthcare access. This shouldn't be normal, yet this is what tens of millions suffer through daily:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ca2a201-51ca-497e-a26d-e3422d6cd457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Contrast the above exploitation with the massive profits that corporations like UnitedHealth have made over the past decade, and you'll see further understand why people across the political spectrum are outraged.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d29acd2-ceb9-49d0-b965-ba8f5274b5d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Politicians and corporations must recognize this anger as a demand for systemic change. The American people across the political spectrum are tired of living in a country where the wealthy enjoy endless privileges, and endless excuses to literally kill us, while the rest of us are denied basic human rights like healthcare, medicine, or even the ability to use baby powder without being poisoned.
Remember this fact. The social fabric of society did not suddenly break when an assailant killed the UnitedHealth CEO--an assailant killed the UnitedHealth CEO because the social fabric of society is broken. This should be a signal for politicians to stop bowing to billionaires and to start working for the people they are supposed to represent.
As Americans, it is critical we stand united against this exploitation. Whether it's through demanding universal healthcare, holding corporations accountable for killing us, or fighting for fair economic policies--standing united against such exploitation is how we move forward. Only then can we dismantle the double standards and build a fairer, more just society.
I leave you with this question. The Lancet estimates that 68,000 people die annually due to lack of healthcare or denied healthcare from insurance corporations. Since the Supreme Court has ruled that corporations are people, why are health insurance corporate policies that deny life saving medicine to patients who will die without that medicine, not deemed as intentional murder?

A Reuters examination of many of those documents, as well as deposition and trial testimony, shows that from at least 1971 to the early 2000s, the company's raw talc and finished powders sometimes tested positive for small amounts of asbestos, and that company executives, mine managers, scientists, doctors and lawyers fretted over the problem and how to address it while failing to disclose it to regulators or the public. By the way, zero Johnson & Johnson executives ever went to prison for this crime. Ford Motor Company Who can forget that Ford knew that their Pinto was liable to catching fire, yet made the cold and heartless calculation that paying settlements to families whose loved ones burned to death ? Despite 27 confirmed deaths due to the Pinto's faulty design, zero Ford executives ever went to prison. Purdue Pharma The Sackler family of Purdue Pharma , knowing full well that they would result in opioid deaths due to addiction and overdose. Despite the hundreds of thousands of people who have died due to this devastating opioid crisis, zero Sackler family members or Purdue Pharma executives have gone to prison. Instead they've been let off the hook with a fine. Each of the aforementioned CEOs and executives deliberately committed acts that they knew would result in the killing of ordinary people, yet none of them went to prison. And none of them are so much as described as murderers or terrorists. Are the corporate elitists in their ivory towers so high up that they cannot see the grotesque hypocrisy that us ordinary folks on the ground can see clear as day?? If the punishment for a crime is a fine, then that is a law that exists only for the poor. The examples are near endless of corporations committing acts that they know will kill people, yet facing no consequences as a result of their deadly and deliberate decisions. Indeed, you will be hard pressed to find any CEOs or executives that went to prison for committing corporate violence--yet you can be almost certain that the assailant who killed the UnitedHealth CEO will see prison. The question here isn't about justifying violence--because that violence is already deemed 'justified' as long as, and only if, it is done by corporations under the guise of 'maximizing shareholder value.' The question is, why don't the people who finally woke up when an assailant violently killed the UnitedHealth CEO, also recognize the deadly and mass corporate violence that goes unpunished every day? Therefore, it bears repeating, in a just society, how is an assailant killing a CEO in broad daylight materially different than a CEO deliberately poisoning millions of people knowing a significant portion of them will die as a result? Adding to the frustration and anger at corporations like UnitedHealth, consider what Americans sacrifice every year just to pay for critical and life saving healthcare access. This shouldn't be normal, yet this is what tens of millions suffer through daily: | | ---|---|--- Contrast the above exploitation with the massive profits that corporations like UnitedHealth have made over the past decade, and you'll see further understand why people across the political spectrum are outraged. | | ---|---|--- Politicians and corporations must recognize this anger as a demand for systemic change. The American people across the political spectrum are tired of living in a country where the wealthy enjoy endless privileges, and endless excuses to literally kill us, while the rest of us are denied basic human rights like healthcare, medicine, or even the ability to use baby powder without being poisoned. Remember this fact. The social fabric of society did not suddenly break when an assailant killed the UnitedHealth CEO--an assailant killed the UnitedHealth CEO because the social fabric of society is broken. This should be a signal for politicians to stop bowing to billionaires and to start working for the people they are supposed to represent. As Americans, it is critical we stand united against this exploitation. Whether it's through demanding universal healthcare, holding corporations accountable for killing us, or fighting for fair economic policies--standing united against such exploitation is how we move forward. Only then can we dismantle the double standards and build a fairer, more just society. I leave you with this question. The Lancet estimates that 68,000 people die annually due to lack of healthcare or denied healthcare from insurance corporations. Since the Supreme Court has ruled that corporations are people, why are health insurance corporate policies that deny life saving medicine to patients who will die without that medicine, not deemed as intentional murder? Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.** | | ---|---|--- You 're currently a free subscriber to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid. When possible, I hope you'll upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

| | Dear Peter, Time is running out to protect Oregon's Owyhee Canyonlands - we know this. This special place needs our help now and your gift - _of any amount_ \- will help us push this movement forward, showing our elected officials what the Owyhee Canyonlands means to us. The Owyhee Canyonlands is a place like no other. It is 2.5 million acres of deep, rugged canyons, rolling sagebrush grasslands, and rushing rivers. The Owyhee is not only home to 200 species of wildlife, but also hosts 28 plants that can’t be found anywhere else in the world. It's critical that we protect this special place. [**Will you help protect the Owyhee by making a donation to OLCV today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98554181/517070367/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzMjk2MGFiLTI4YjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PBqOeZ1-X3i1VwImo_uGARY9mVfmbrLMLOiRF5gGtEI=&emci=51f17c3e-20b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=f32960ab-28b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) Your gift will go towards gathering petition signatures, recruiting volunteers to attend town halls, and empowering volunteers to write letters to the editor (LTEs) in support and speak to elected officials. clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, Did you see April's last email? Why? We're in the final push to protect the Owyhee before the end of this year. We need your contribution now to help us get there - before it's too late. Sincerely, Sarah Kline OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator | | | | | Dear Peter, Time is running out to protect Oregon's Owyhee Canyonlands - we know this. This special place needs our help now and your gift - of any amount \- will help us push this movement forward, showing our elected officials what the Owyhee Canyonlands means to us. The Owyhee Canyonlands is a place like no other. It is 2.5 million acres of deep, rugged canyons, rolling sagebrush grasslands, and rushing rivers. The Owyhee is not only home to 200 species of wildlife, but also hosts 28 plants that can’t be found anywhere else in the world. It's critical that we protect this special place. Your gift will go towards gathering petition signatures, recruiting volunteers to attend town halls, and empowering volunteers to write letters to the editor (LTEs) in support and speak to elected officials. Time is running out to protect one of Oregon's most majestic wild lands. Sincerely, | DONATE NOW | | | April ChristensonOLCV Development Director P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. * Pam Bondi has stood by President Trump’s side as his lawyer during the SHAM impeachment trials.
* Has been TOUGH on ILLEGALS invading Florida.
* SAVED countless lives by reducing the flow of dangerous fentanyl.

As the Attorney General, she will show JUST how corrupt DC has become, _**but her chances of being appointed are slimming by the second.**_
But as you read this The Fake News has launched a devastating onslaught of attacks, calling her another MAGA Extremist & DESTROYING her good name.

name: Andrea Hunley
subject: Will I see you next week?
body:
Join for a gathering and fundraiser to support Andrea Hunley. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=d9ebccf591&u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=d1e94e8e52)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| **THANK YOU! **

As the year draws to a close, I want to take a moment to personally thank you for your steadfast support for my work as your Indiana State Senator.

This marks the start of my third legislative session. Know that I continue to work hard for you and our community each day.
---
| **END OF YEAR PARTY** **MONDAY, DECEMBER 16
4:30-6:30pm
Mass Ave Pub | 745 Massachusetts Ave** Last month I was elected as the Assistant Leader of the Senate Democratic Caucus. This new leadership role presents an incredible opportunity to amplify our collective voice. As we look ahead to the coming year with a challenging national situation, **it will be critical to have a clear, strong strategy at the legislature. **I am also focused on the 2026 election cycle, my re-election, and how we can improve candidate recruitment and training to grow our caucus and elect more progressive leaders. **The next few weeks are especially important.** Your contribution before the end of the year will help us enter this critical budget session with the resources needed to effectively advocate for the issues that matter most. Every dollar raised will ensure we are prepared to face the challenges ahead. _**Note: **All contributions must be received prior to January 7. To honor our commitment to ethical leadership and the state budget process, we do not accept campaign contributions during session to avoid even the appearance of a conflict of interest._ **See you at Mass Ave Pub! **
---
| [DONATE](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=9bdaa830c4&e=d9ebccf591 "DONATE")
---
|
---
| | **KNOW BEFORE YOU GO:**
**The more the merrier, invite friends and neighbors.**

**21+ Only:** Mass Ave Pub cannot admit folks under 21.

**Parking: **Parking is available on the street and in the Firefighter's Union Hall lot (corner of St. Clair and College)

**Attire:** Come as you are.

**Food & Drink Details: **We'll have appetizers and drinks to share. You can purchase more and the bar will be open for your business.
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | [](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=3967890224&e=d9ebccf591)
---
[](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=7c118e398a&e=d9ebccf591)
---
[](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=0ebc74289e&e=d9ebccf591)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
_Copyright © 2024 Andrea Hunley for Indy, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Andrea Hunley for IndyPO Box 44715Indianapolis, IN 46244-0715
[Add us to your address book](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f3c9603900)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f3c9603900&e=d9ebccf591&c=d1e94e8e52) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f3c9603900&t=b&e=d9ebccf591&c=d1e94e8e52).

Thank you SO much,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Recapping our big projections with you |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98554597/517072653/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGU5MDIzYS0zNmI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UrEzKahzQ4bPDc8JVkIWXM_VPfmRcPKVZJ2K5RkEwE=)
---
| We emailed you throughout 2024 all about the U.S. House seats that we could flip from red to blue. And now, with the final race called, we have our final results. **[(If you are already eager to flip more seats in the upcoming midterms, feel free to pitch in a donation right away. Otherwise, read on for our recapped projections).](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98554598/517072654/587040626?&refcode=20241211_FR_90DO_FlippedSeats&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGU5MDIzYS0zNmI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UrEzKahzQ4bPDc8JVkIWXM_VPfmRcPKVZJ2K5RkEwE=)** First, a projection in **CA-27**. Republican Rep. Mike Garcia has fiercely held this seat since winning it in a special election in 2020. But in the 2024 Election, we can project that Democrat George Whitesides has flipped this seat from red to blue. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98554599/517072655/587040626?&refcode=20241211_FR_90DO_FlippedSeats&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGU5MDIzYS0zNmI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UrEzKahzQ4bPDc8JVkIWXM_VPfmRcPKVZJ2K5RkEwE=) Next, we have a projection in **CA-45**. Many pundits and election forecasters originally thought this seat was too entrenched for Democrats to have a chance. But thanks to grassroots supporters and our Forever Organizing program, Democrat Derek Tran defeated Republican Rep. Michelle Steel in this race. He only won by a very slim 653 vote margin — meaning **[your donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98554600/517072656/587040626?&refcode=20241211_FR_90DO_FlippedSeats&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGU5MDIzYS0zNmI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UrEzKahzQ4bPDc8JVkIWXM_VPfmRcPKVZJ2K5RkEwE=)** may have made *the* difference! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98554601/517072657/587040626?&refcode=20241211_FR_90DO_FlippedSeats&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGU5MDIzYS0zNmI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UrEzKahzQ4bPDc8JVkIWXM_VPfmRcPKVZJ2K5RkEwE=) But that’s not all. We have a final projection in one of the closest races of the 2024 Election. In **CA-13** , Democrat Adam Gray has won over Rep. John Duarte by a margin of 187 votes. **_With a margin that close_** , it would have nearly been impossible to prevail without everyone who pitched in a donation to keep our operations running after Election Day. Experts agree that the outcome of this seat was influenced by which party was more effective at correcting ballots with technical issues. Democrats are the people who help everyday people put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over their heads.
Joe Biden did it with the stimulus payments that Americans received during the pandemic. If you had filed your tax returns, you got three separate checks. And they weren't nothin'. I remember deposits of something like $1200. If you had children, you were getting close to $4000. The idea was that we needed people to spend money to kick-start the economy. Some experts quibble and say that a lot of people used it to pay off credit card debt. Come on. By now they have loaded up the credit card again, unfortunately. So they spent money, just maybe a little bit later?
NY Governor Kathy Hochul, also a Democrat, is [going to send NYers making under $150,000 checks for $300. Families making under $300,000 will get $500](https://substack.com/redirect/fce5f268-d9d2-497b-904c-199698099523?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> "Because of inflation, New York has generated unprecedented revenues through the sales tax -- now, we're returning that cash back to middle class families," Governor Hochul said. "My agenda for the coming year will be laser-focused on putting money back in your pockets, and that starts with proposing Inflation Refund checks of up to $500 to help millions of hard-working New Yorkers. It's simple: the cost of living is still too damn high, and New Yorkers deserve a break."
NY Congresswoman Claudia Tenney, a Republican, meanwhile [co-sponsored a series of bills dubbed the so-called "DOGE Acts" on December 11, 2024. ](https://substack.com/redirect/0ec0a739-94e4-45b4-8888-4ed20f4c0602?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Somebody needs to fill Tenney in on the fact that we do not yet have a Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). Wait. Don't bother. I'm sure she doesn't care about a silly thing like procedure, when Trump has made it clear that he, Mike Johnson (who [promises to take a blowtorch to the administrative state](https://substack.com/redirect/60c98a7b-55eb-482b-a24d-11c752cf9333?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), Elon Musk, and Vivek Ramaswamy are cutting roughly 85% of the federal government. Among the bills Tenney and her Tennessee Senate colleague, Marcia Blackburn bull-doged through both houses of Congress:
> [The Federal Freeze Act](https://substack.com/redirect/726801cb-2536-4946-9e44-f1259b1123fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which would implement a one-year freeze on pay increases for federal civilian employee salaries. If passed, federal agency heads would be directed to establish a cap on their agency workforce over three years, decreasing the number of federal employees. Federal law enforcement, national security, public safety, and public health services employees would not see a pay freeze.
> [The Commission to Relocate the Federal Bureaucracy Act](https://substack.com/redirect/bc9306fc-ba35-4265-9150-af34e12ecbd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which would establish a plan to relocate non-national security agencies outside of the Washington D.C., based on financial efficiency, existing infrastructure, and related industries.
> [The Federal Employee Performance and Accountability Act](https://substack.com/redirect/6d8e7d50-bf1d-429c-8c81-db3caf9a8465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), seeks to establish a performance-based pay structure to incentivize high performance for federal employees. National security and public safety agencies are exempt.
> [The Stopping Home Office Work's Unproductive Problems (SHOW UP) Act](https://substack.com/redirect/883993f5-29a1-46c9-a88f-068e33d47d53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which would require federal agencies to return to pre-pandemic telework levels within 30 days, and require agencies to submit telework plans to Congress to be certified by the Office of Personnel Management. Similar legislation passed the House of Representatives last year.
> [Across-the-Board Spending Cuts](https://substack.com/redirect/6be54a24-21ed-418a-816b-3c2b05490cd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a package of three separate bills that would require federal agencies to cut non-security discretionary spending by 1%, 2%, or 5%, beginning in fiscal year 2026. The Departments of Defense, Homeland Security, Veterans Affairs, and National Nuclear Security Administration are excluded from the bill.
Next up: your Social Security, Medicare, and Veteran's Benefits. Wait and watch. Do not be shocked when they cut these programs. They have told us they are going to cut these programs. For some reason, MAGAs lie about sex, fraud, and national security issues, but they don't lie about making cuts to programs that keep millions of Americans out of poverty.
I'm going to Congress because we need more Democrats to look out for the middle class individual or family. Most of us cannot sustain the cuts contemplated in the DOGE Acts or any other cuts. Furthermore, most of us rely on at least one federal agency (EPA, FDA, Department of Education) on an almost daily basis. [Sidebar: if you have a child who requires Special Education services, find a good education attorney now. If the Department of Education is dissolved, the delivery of special education services will be in doubt.]
Back on topic. The average voter in New York 21 keeps their head down and does what they need to generate income to keep it all together. There just isn't time or bandwidth to deal with much more than that.
The voters I have spoken with are very clear in their priorities. They want a Congressional representative who looks out for middle class interests, not the interests of the millionaires and billionaires.
The voters want Congress to help them to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over their heads. Democrats will deliver on that commitment, just as they have done before.
We're in the fight for middle- and lower-class America. I hope you're with me.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..dNeokE-mVU0PN42IowVbaTY92ZDMq3MsXIsYTbtFXr8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153006490)

clean_body: Democrats are the people who help everyday people | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race * Democrats are the people who help everyday people | | | Dec 12 | | | | | | | | | | | | Democrats are the people who help everyday people put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over their heads. Joe Biden did it with the stimulus payments that Americans received during the pandemic. If you had filed your tax returns, you got three separate checks. And they weren't nothin'. I remember deposits of something like $1200. If you had children, you were getting close to $4000. The idea was that we needed people to spend money to kick-start the economy. Some experts quibble and say that a lot of people used it to pay off credit card debt. Come on. By now they have loaded up the credit card again, unfortunately. So they spent money, just maybe a little bit later? NY Governor Kathy Hochul, also a Democrat, is . "Because of inflation, New York has generated unprecedented revenues through the sales tax -- now, we're returning that cash back to middle class families," Governor Hochul said. "My agenda for the coming year will be laser-focused on putting money back in your pockets, and that starts with proposing Inflation Refund checks of up to $500 to help millions of hard-working New Yorkers. It's simple: the cost of living is still too damn high, and New Yorkers deserve a break." NY Congresswoman Claudia Tenney, a Republican, meanwhile needs to fill Tenney in on the fact that we do not yet have a Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). Wait. Don't bother. name: Mark Trammell
subject: This fight is far from over
body:
Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit...

| |
---
| | Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit...
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq2g2qvg2tpt6b392u6jjigd097vjud58v0p6fvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... That your 16-year-old daughter was forced to get undressed in a locker room with boys competing in girls' sports...That your 8-year-old son was being groomed at school to use new pronouns or a different name behind your back...Or that, God forbid, a surgeon amputated the healthy breasts of your 13-year-old niece in the name of "Transgender care." I know these images are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because **_God-fearing, faith-filled_ **people like you and me have a job to do today.You and I can't retreat into our homes and hope the Left's radicalism will pass us by. We've got to stand against it. **[**That's why I'm asking you to stand with me and the Center for American Liberty today -- before it's too late.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2fefriu7ngmkhhs6g14spd4g2kuikmt0qn83kf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs)** You and I both know **God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** **And we know that MILLIONS of Americans agree with us. We saw that when conservatives won a decisive victory on November 5th!** Poll after poll shows the Left's gender insanity was a HUGE motivating issue in the election -- and Americans across the country voted AGAINST radicals corrupting our children and our culture.But this fight is not over... **Because now the left will fight back with a vengeance, not in Washington, but in the courtroom!** No doubt huge left-wing legal advocacy groups like the **_ACLU_** and **_Southern Poverty Law Center_** and many others are preparing to jam through the left's agenda in the courts.And we must be ready to take on their lawfare, lies, and corruption.Because we simply can't let this transgender madness continue.Forcing Americans to play along with or affirm the delusion that one's sex can be changed is unconstitutional and dangerous.Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. But if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- with the Center for American Liberty.** **[Please stand against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount today -- before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs1mmmpa00rje836nuu5iusqs52bpa145vfk0sj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs) ** Before I go on, let me introduce myself. **My name is Mark Trammell,** and I'm the**Executive Director** and **General Counsel** of the conservative **legal non-profit, Center for American Liberty.** But more than my day job as a lawyer, **I'm a** **husband, a father of two, and a devout Christian**. These roles are what drive my passion for the work we do at **the Center for American Liberty** \-- because protecting freedom isn't just a job to me, it's personal.We take the fight to the left in the courtroom -- and we protect your rights as a freedom loving, patriotic American. Especially when it comes to protecting children and families from the rampages of radical gender ideology. This is what conservatives are up against right now:
---
>> Parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed policies requiring schools to inform parents if teachers socially "transition" their child at school, and now the state of California is suing them so schools can keep secrets from parents.>> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I speak to conservatives around the country, I meet so many folks who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner."The good news is that right now, **_you still have a chance to stop the radical transgender movement_** before it pushes us further down this path. Because there is one group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone, and that is**the Center for American Liberty.****[**And your tax-deductible gift today will keep our critical legal work going.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z474t9b1vlj22noc2gkvoab25lv0lj3h618s23s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that's where this battle is won or lost.And we're attacking this evil from all sides with our comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**1\. We're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in so many of today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And we already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh8q4504c4iemrc85bma430jjvku78hofqbetmv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs) **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**2.****We're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts.Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In our landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. [**When you make your tax-deductible gift today** ,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc8j4ti10fhrhi9q1v6hj9nbh34s4jg6e4p1f328_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs) you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**3.****We're****fighting for your right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is core to the Center for American Liberty's mission and we've notched plenty of victories in this space. And now we're fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandmother raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls take off their swimsuits.And she was the one punished![**When you make your tax-deductible gift today** ,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z69a7orl7evbpo9j701pv9nmh9tqpi7b48mg85qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs) you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[**But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100, or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuk2bgnbdcauscfs6k3rgqm55qhqb3cto88pfc70_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.**The bottom line: We must be prepared for this fight to move _from_ Washington _into_ the courts in the new year. So please make your gift as soon as possible**Thank you for reading my email.
---
| | God bless,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpf5mkis4ml5qcof72frfjqap29enavudbfo82v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs)
---
| | [ **DONATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z97aeibggoq7hq7asthlnu4b97830r21lhebv1kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs5utubpvor6qedorog81gurqt5bsvvl3su70as0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs)
---

---

I know it may sound crazy to you but in so many of today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

# **FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ukoa2kvis10ga5ut4ai2lbphhohtbm4mj901f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp7efj8uarovl5o1ac4hnbhv1oitphqkpvg7tocg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaund72mntot6e1f6lr3j0k2g3mgdtlscngvrkeg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkv38an2m95id8fq9bgdtg7hkvgmb2ssbbh01120_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" **Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." **Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmoalcqd7co9g41vmj0d9nq1sihtnmg4ciumjn7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjie2o32cph2bs)

There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" Angel H. "Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Mark Trammell
subject: This fight is far from over
body:
Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit...

| |
---
| | Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit...
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq9p0eegc2r4jj59dk84h0m9a85lvhuionrp1g68_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... That your 16-year-old daughter was forced to get undressed in a locker room with boys competing in girls' sports...That your 8-year-old son was being groomed at school to use new pronouns or a different name behind your back...Or that, God forbid, a surgeon amputated the healthy breasts of your 13-year-old niece in the name of "Transgender care." I know these images are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because **_God-fearing, faith-filled_ **people like you and me have a job to do today.You and I can't retreat into our homes and hope the Left's radicalism will pass us by. We've got to stand against it. **[**That's why I'm asking you to stand with me and the Center for American Liberty today -- before it's too late.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvi22fon9jouno2mtrevdd6rj954oi8uh9riovj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs)** You and I both know **God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** **And we know that MILLIONS of Americans agree with us. We saw that when conservatives won a decisive victory on November 5th!** Poll after poll shows the Left's gender insanity was a HUGE motivating issue in the election -- and Americans across the country voted AGAINST radicals corrupting our children and our culture.But this fight is not over... **Because now the left will fight back with a vengeance, not in Washington, but in the courtroom!** No doubt huge left-wing legal advocacy groups like the **_ACLU_** and **_Southern Poverty Law Center_** and many others are preparing to jam through the left's agenda in the courts.And we must be ready to take on their lawfare, lies, and corruption.Because we simply can't let this transgender madness continue.Forcing Americans to play along with or affirm the delusion that one's sex can be changed is unconstitutional and dangerous.Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. But if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- with the Center for American Liberty.** **[Please stand against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount today -- before it's too late.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z64chl4e66a1u3vs89g72p0c3paqpjg4mhk25pro_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs) ** Before I go on, let me introduce myself. **My name is Mark Trammell,** and I'm the**Executive Director** and **General Counsel** of the conservative **legal non-profit, Center for American Liberty.** But more than my day job as a lawyer, **I'm a** **husband, a father of two, and a devout Christian**. These roles are what drive my passion for the work we do at **the Center for American Liberty** \-- because protecting freedom isn't just a job to me, it's personal.We take the fight to the left in the courtroom -- and we protect your rights as a freedom loving, patriotic American. Especially when it comes to protecting children and families from the rampages of radical gender ideology. This is what conservatives are up against right now:
---
>> Parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed policies requiring schools to inform parents if teachers socially "transition" their child at school, and now the state of California is suing them so schools can keep secrets from parents.>> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I speak to conservatives around the country, I meet so many folks who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner."The good news is that right now, **_you still have a chance to stop the radical transgender movement_** before it pushes us further down this path. Because there is one group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone, and that is**the Center for American Liberty.****[**And your tax-deductible gift today will keep our critical legal work going.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb3frl0qgrl77ue90i6ci8370vt254k0uma84pu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that's where this battle is won or lost.And we're attacking this evil from all sides with our comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**1\. We're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in so many of today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And we already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1jn5ji9g6ftcvj5e6sqrh4icshae2dni3gt6m0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs) **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**2.****We're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts.Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In our landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. [**When you make your tax-deductible gift today** ,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4kjvkvseetei38ah5qn7f3785etf3rpvd3l2240_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs) you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**3.****We're****fighting for your right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is core to the Center for American Liberty's mission and we've notched plenty of victories in this space. And now we're fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandmother raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls take off their swimsuits.And she was the one punished![**When you make your tax-deductible gift today** ,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze5qt7im3hinpamqd2oesvsm6fi9lv4nelmp91so_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs) you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[**But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100, or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlo667dvlkkot4dgtc37ltkcnhooo8bbg9ul9q6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.**The bottom line: We must be prepared for this fight to move _from_ Washington _into_ the courts in the new year. So please make your gift as soon as possible**Thank you for reading my email.
---
| | God bless,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztpcmvgrdeu846rh0p061b1v321c7cqm2pjo7t2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjieeor6c5h2bs)
---

name: 2025 Membership Renewal
subject: We won the Senate Majority. We won the Presidency. But the biggest victory is yet to come.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

The election might be over, _but the real work is just getting started ..._

In order for President Trump and Senate Republicans to be successful in the new year, they need the support of _every America-loving patriot._ Otherwise, the far-Left Deep State may undermine our country once again.
