name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: SIGN NOW: Demand Congress members vote YES for disaster recovery funding / FIRMA AHORA: Exige que los miembros del Congreso voten SÍ a favor de la financiación para la recuperación de desastres
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
SIGN THE PETITION:
Call on Congress to step up for survivors of natural disasters
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Congress%20disaster%20relief%202024.png]
Survivors, neighbors, and organizations on the ground poured their heart and soul into helping people recover from devastating natural disasters this year -- from gutting homes as a result of flooding, to delivering water and generators, to providing meals and funds for re-stocking groceries. Now, disaster survivors and their families need Congress to step up and fully fund recovery efforts.
Harris County TOP organizer Irie Howard is in Washington D.C. with Houston TOP members and more than a dozen organizations from across the county this week to make sure that federal lawmakers hear from the storm and fire survivors who have been suffering as a result of their inaction – and we need your help.
Congress must act by December 20th in order to continue funding the federal government, and we DEMAND a fully-funded federal disaster response system that gets help to communities as fast as possible.
ADD YOUR NAME here to tell members of Congress that our communities can’t wait! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-congress-vote-yes-on-disaster-recovery-funds?source=TOP]
For more information about this effort, contact Irie at ihoward@organizetexas.org [ihoward@organizetexas.org] .
Before you go, Joe!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Smaller%20-%20Biden%20Pardon%20Our%20People.jpg]
If President Biden can pardon his son, he can pardon thousands of others who've been in similar circumstances. Sign the ‘Before You Go, Joe’ petition if you agree!
We join our movement partners at Popular Democracy in urging the President to act on his own words that “America is a Nation founded on the promise of second chances" by prioritizing an ambitious clemency initiative that pardons or commutes the sentences of the 10,000 pending clemency petitions.
Demand #PardonsForOurPeople by adding your name here [https://secure.everyaction.com/pWUixxGZnUWHuX0Vp0mvNw2]
Wishing you and yours a safe and joyful holiday season
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/2024%20TOP%20End-Of-Year%20Collage_.jpg]
Coming together in solidarity with another to build true people power will be vital to our movement for racial and economic justice in 2025. With the support of members and supporters like you, we know we can show up big for our communities, so we can keep pushing for the positive, transformative change ALL Texans deserve -- regardless of our age, race, faith, spoken language, or gender.
This will be our last newsletter for 2024. On that note, we thank you for helping drive our efforts this year, whether that be showing up to a rally, donating to our get-out-the-vote efforts, or even joining us in contacting your elected leaders. We wish you and your loved ones a joyous holiday season and new year filled with peace and fellowship!
TOP offices will be closed December 23 through January 1 , as we take a moment to rest, reflect, and prepare for a 2025 that will call on us all to step up and take action.
TOP Tip: Stay connected with us online
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Social%20media%20apps.jpg]
Challenges and opportunities await our movement in 2025. To rise to the occasion, we have to plug in and stay informed! We'll still be posting informative content to our social media channels between now and the end of the year, so remember to give TOP a follow.
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas]
Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/organizetexas/]
X (Twitter) [https://x.com/OrganizeTexas]
TikTok [https://www.tiktok.com/@organizetexas]
YouTube [https://www.youtube.com/@organizetexas]
Español
FIRMA LA PETICIÓN:
Pide al Congreso que intervenga en favor de los sobrevivientes de desastres naturales
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Congress%20disaster%20relief%202024.png]
Los sobrevivientes, vecinos y organizaciones locales pusieron todo su corazón y alma para ayudar a las personas a recuperarse de los devastadores desastres naturales de este año, desde destrozar casasr emover destrosos en casas afectadas como resultado de las inundaciones hasta entregar agua y generadores, y proporcionar comidas y fondos para reabastecer los alimentos. Ahora, los sobrevivientes del desastre y sus familias necesitan que el Congreso intensifique sus esfuerzos y financie completamente los esfuerzos de recuperación.
La organizadora de TOP del condado de Harris, Irie Howard, está en Washington D.C. con miembros de TOP de Houston y más de una docena de organizaciones de todo el condado esta semana para asegurarse de que los legisladores federales escuchen a los sobrevivientes de la tormenta y los incendios que han estado sufriendo como resultado de su inacción, y necesitamos su ayuda.
El Congreso debe actuar antes del 20 de diciembre para seguir financiando al gobierno federal, y EXIGIMOS un sistema federal de respuesta a desastres completamente financiado que brinde ayuda a las comunidades lo más rápido posible.
¡AGREGUE SU NOMBRE aquí para decirles a los miembros del Congreso que nuestras comunidades no pueden esperar! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-congress-vote-yes-on-disaster-recovery-funds?source=TOP]
Para obtener más información sobre este esfuerzo, comuníquese con Irie en ihoward@organizetexas.org [ihoward@organizetexas.org] .
Antes de que te vayas, Joe
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Smaller%20-%20Biden%20Pardon%20Our%20People.jpg]
Si el presidente Biden puede perdonar a su hijo, puede perdonar a miles de otras personas que han estado en circunstancias similares. ¡Firma la petición “Before You Go, Joe” si estás de acuerdo!
Nos unimos a nuestros socios del movimiento Popular Democracy para instar al presidente a que actúe de acuerdo con sus propias palabras de que “Estados Unidos es una nación fundada en la promesa de segundas oportunidades” al priorizar una ambiciosa iniciativa de clemencia que perdone o conmute las sentencias de las 10.000 peticiones de clemencia pendientes.
Exige #PerdonesParaNuestraPueblo agregando tu nombre aquí. [https://secure.everyaction.com/pWUixxGZnUWHuX0Vp0mvNw2]
Le deseamos a usted y a los suyos unas felices y seguras fiestas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/2024%20TOP%20End-Of-Year%20Collage_.jpg]
Unirse en solidaridad con otros para construir un verdadero poder popular será vital para nuestro movimiento por la justicia racial y económica en 2025. Con el apoyo de miembros y seguidores como usted, sabemos que podemos hacer un gran trabajo por nuestras comunidades, para que podamos seguir presionando por el cambio positivo y transformador que TODOS los tejanos merecen, independientemente de nuestra edad, raza, fe, idioma hablado o género.
Este será nuestro último boletín de 2024. En ese sentido, le agradecemos por ayudarnos a impulsar nuestros esfuerzos este año, ya sea asistiendo a una manifestación, donando a nuestros esfuerzos de movilización de votantes o incluso uniéndose a nosotros para contactar a sus líderes electos. ¡Le deseamos a usted y a sus seres queridos unas felices fiestas y un año nuevo lleno de paz y compañerismo!
Las oficinas de TOP estarán cerradas del 23 de diciembre al 1 de enero , mientras nos tomamos un momento para descansar, reflexionar y prepararnos para un 2025 que nos llamará a todos a dar un paso adelante y tomar medidas.
Consejos de TOP: Manténgase conectado con nosotros en línea
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Social%20media%20apps.jpg]
En 2025, nos esperan desafíos y oportunidades. Para estar a la altura de las circunstancias, debemos conectarnos y mantenernos informados. Seguiremos publicando contenido informativo en nuestros canales de redes sociales desde ahora hasta fin de año, así que recuerda seguir a TOP.
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas]
Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/organizetexas/]
X (Twitter) [https://x.com/OrganizeTexas]
TikTok [https://www.tiktok.com/@organizetexas]
YouTube [https://www.youtube.com/@organizetexas]
Copyright (C) 2024 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=ufZnc0ponZ8aZuedK0PKnk1R%2Ft2hZ0wQbMS6ujVmXSgOIDUnkjKA0YXN8Gk8vxZFW8bKOvbULz0QQ%2Bq%2B5JCgIC5jXq%2FAMoaqTIT9BzxbTSpLD7cZJIG8EfVBUhPx5P6PyclfTIYu4x4WQB1%2Fmqt69QkdUw2DppIVJIvv7Ljd16zsXdMsBkCbZVr6T6emJBARFkiqgWOJ%2BWwbhd1%2FDnWgowSGIxscmTDID9%2B7UJyo5jpqwx43hjXNefcI9kJaf20WHc2Fk2TTiqhOavOhcLay9IoO8YEWlTpB0NMSXLk9oBbW0ajH5WASqQyI7Lsivth9qK6tBwSrnwU%2Fj5Sa6eA3wXnR8nxFBqDL7hyKSrVQpKbC9HEydsr683LyvTT%2BEOjjcRR6CJZ2aajTJQTK%2FQVX4kZDu20QLx6DqlXLL3PiLAY%3D .

Facebook [] Instagram [] X (Twitter) [] TikTok [] YouTube [] Español FIRMA LA PETICIÓN: Pide al Congreso que intervenga en favor de los sobrevivientes de desastres naturales [] Los sobrevivientes, vecinos y organizaciones locales pusieron todo su corazón y alma para ayudar a las personas a recuperarse de los devastadores desastres naturales de este año, desde destrozar casasr emover destrosos en casas afectadas como resultado de las inundaciones hasta entregar agua y generadores, y proporcionar comidas y fondos para reabastecer los alimentos. Ahora, los sobrevivientes del desastre y sus familias necesitan que el Congreso intensifique sus esfuerzos y financie completamente los esfuerzos de recuperación. La organizadora de TOP del condado de Harris, Irie Howard, está en Washington D.C. con miembros de TOP de Houston y más de una docena de organizaciones de todo el condado esta semana para asegurarse de que los legisladores federales escuchen a los sobrevivientes de la tormenta y los incendios que han estado sufriendo como resultado de su inacción, y necesitamos su ayuda. El Congreso debe actuar antes del 20 de diciembre para seguir financiando al gobierno federal, y EXIGIMOS un sistema federal de respuesta a desastres completamente financiado que brinde ayuda a las comunidades lo más rápido posible. ¡AGREGUE SU NOMBRE aquí para decirles a los miembros del Congreso que nuestras comunidades no pueden esperar! [] Para obtener más información sobre este esfuerzo, comuníquese con Irie en ihoward@organizetexas.org [ihoward@organizetexas.org] . Antes de que te vayas, Joe [] Si el presidente Biden puede perdonar a su hijo, puede perdonar a miles de otras personas que han estado en circunstancias similares. ¡Firma la petición “Before You Go, Joe” si estás de acuerdo! Nos unimos a nuestros socios del movimiento Popular Democracy para instar al presidente a que actúe de acuerdo con sus propias palabras de que “Estados Unidos es una nación fundada en la promesa de segundas oportunidades” al priorizar una ambiciosa iniciativa de clemencia que perdone o conmute las sentencias de las 10.000 peticiones de clemencia pendientes. Exige #PerdonesParaNuestraPueblo agregando tu nombre aquí. [] Le deseamos a usted y a los suyos unas felices y seguras fiestas [] Unirse en solidaridad con otros para construir un verdadero poder popular será vital para nuestro movimiento por la justicia racial y económica en 2025. Con el apoyo de miembros y seguidores como usted, sabemos que podemos hacer un gran trabajo por nuestras comunidades, para que podamos seguir presionando por el cambio positivo y transformador que TODOS los tejanos merecen, independientemente de nuestra edad, raza, fe, idioma hablado o género. Este será nuestro último boletín de 2024. En ese sentido, le agradecemos por ayudarnos a impulsar nuestros esfuerzos este año, ya sea asistiendo a una manifestación, donando a nuestros esfuerzos de movilización de votantes o incluso uniéndose a nosotros para contactar a sus líderes electos. ¡Le deseamos a usted y a sus seres queridos unas felices fiestas y un año nuevo lleno de paz y compañerismo! Las oficinas de TOP estarán cerradas del 23 de diciembre al 1 de enero , mientras nos tomamos un momento para descansar, reflexionar y prepararnos para un 2025 que nos llamará a todos a dar un paso adelante y tomar medidas. Consejos de TOP: Manténgase conectado con nosotros en línea [] En 2025, nos esperan desafíos y oportunidades. Para estar a la altura de las circunstancias, debemos conectarnos y mantenernos informados. Seguiremos publicando contenido informativo en nuestros canales de redes sociales desde ahora hasta fin de año, así que recuerda seguir a TOP. Facebook [] Instagram [] X (Twitter) [] TikTok [] YouTube [] Copyright (C) 2024 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved. Texas Organizing Project 700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212 San Antonio, TX 78207 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0a22j624ucd7gpndcb4ifh2l4j2i2dggcdp7ivo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj2cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z69shf0vdc4t9egj6ussio7g32u8epuvjdmeqsq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj2cjh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znjhnpbb4esgl1su6b4s9t4qdfnthd2ppp4i4cpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj2cjh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8jqur48udhqig2cor4s169cu5j73od6nabn2g4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36ctgm4pb4c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zraf1tlutetaoc8gnsmnl94scf3n9s7dck3n37jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj2cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsh6tk9k42esknh8qmdmnim0fk4kb6o7s0hpcg88_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj2cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: We have a Christmas present for you, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re proud to present you with...

|
---
| | | Merry Christmas, Friend!

You have been selected to receive the House Republicans **[Golden Gavel Award!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc8oqdpk7hue9in7vcpjp1eb9h9p8of2o4rdnpd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj1c1h2bs "Golden Gavel Award!")**
Your dedication to our conservative mission has not gone unnoticed. You were a huge part of firing Joe Biden and keeping our majority. Which is why we selected you to receive our _**MOST**_ prestigious award:

---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4r70mf791nsh7osnvah3j4c91mrc0bdke687r7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj1c1h2bs "Christmas Golden Gavel")
---

If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant.

That's why we're so proud to present you with House Republicans' Golden Gavel Award.

---
| | [CLAIM YOUR GOLDEN GAVEL REWARD](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zurg7hge5u5p1l0ch3ouijhlfv3hpetvf3m1l9uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj1c1h2bs "CLAIM YOUR GOLDEN GAVEL REWARD")
---

**[Will you accept the ultra-rare Golden Gavel Award before it expires in 24 hours?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt09t974b2sqc5c2k6703qpf3kq6smv2qmvucndg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g68oj1c1h2bs "Will you accept the ultra-rare Golden Gavel Award before it expires in 24 hours?")**

Thank you, and Merry Christmas,

House Republicans

We know you’re probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

| |
---
| | | **URGENT UPDATE ABOUT SPECIAL ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT:**
__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

__Now:__ Early voting is about to begin in FL-01 and we urgently need your support to win key races like this!
| | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc58f6jvu06su909rssnc9eq0a9p80rhet3r0gi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g6co36cdh2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Do not forget this:

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

**_[That's why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks - before early voting begins - to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump's agenda.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4hlqq5gd2nqmtqms7gomd3mr2te0tf9en9oofgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g6co36cdh2bs "That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks – before early voting begins – to help fill Matt Gaetz’s seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump’s agenda.")_**

We know you're probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

_Can you please help us? _
| [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z17svq8r9ascf8kan7r4u5e8fgf7l18kq1hqe1t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g6co36cdh2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Thank you for all you do,

**HOUSE REPUBLICANS**
Sent via Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsaecapvj7hll2tl8pmdo7qgbjkperkdhtca5u2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g6co36cdh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znh4ikfkdum86ps38fp71bvjskcae46q39tt2n98_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g6co36cdh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmvqp8v62cardk4oedu9p3q836u5l3qlrdfaagj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g6co36cdh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: NRSC
subject: Securing these seven races is critical to support President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Stand with us to secure a Senate majority for President Trump’s entire term

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znr24j5gvncmsmii3m7ejuv3om0p6n47koq5k0q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)

Friend,

The Senate map is shaping up for the 2026 campaign to HOLD our Senate majority so we can help President Trump Make America Great Again during his entire four year term.

Mid-term elections are historically stacked against the political party in power, so we must start planning TODAY.

**[The seven critical seats we MUST SECURE to hold the majority are in Maine, North Carolina, Georgia, Michigan, Ohio, New Hampshire, and Texas.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziphdnph3pd9gm1nshks3j54iahdtnvt1ub9bdv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)**

Some of these races do not have official candidates yet or even rumored ones, but we can't get buried by Democrats' early fundraising AGAIN in 2025. Otherwise, the campaign to SECURE the Senate majority will be an uphill battle from the start, and we will only have ourselves to blame.

**[**Please chip in by clicking one of the buttons below to help our Senate incumbents and 2026 Senate Nominees. ⬇️ ⬇️**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9j0k48gl0s03cj8tstr1gmvphpa1lf8bifu71qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)**

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1nt8i3qdcd7eqth62b7f78oo236bt82dcksm9c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z735mlkjugl3ff34kufggm45mvqjqjdep8hq048g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE $75](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2abshn9g4l7d91b4a4tk9veoiueon2h4fkqopq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2fr1476ak1sdja3kk1n0cr80lvd26mch7nj826g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl3113cg7ticplmhq5buh7tgfl9s8rppdr3eto08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)******************************************************

We're counting on our top conservative leaders like you to step up to support our candidates now so we don't fall behind next year.

We know we have a winning message, **[but we can't risk getting outspent by ratios of 3, 4, or even 5 dollars to 1 again. If we don't pick up the pace, _we could lose the Senate majority that President Trump needs to save America._](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4q3ouv3rq5qo3urtfh7kd406o3n0h948i6s4vjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)**

_Anything you can spare today will help us establish a solid financial foundation in these key races so our Republican Senators and 2026 Senate Nominees do not have to fight from behind from day one of their campaigns._

**[Please donate any amount you can spare to help us win these seven critical races. We need to SECURE these seats to HOLD the majority.>>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6dl1t3kdtc9gd0djo7jfffdvq54o42ip2tc51c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72c9h2bs)**

Thank you,

Senate Republicans

‘Social Media Is Now The Jury’: Kevin O’Leary Says Health Execs Need
To ‘Read The Room,’ Warns Public Has Turned

“Shark Tank” co-star Kevin O’Leary said Wednesday evening on CNN that
health care executives need to “read the room” as public appeal has

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu9es9de4d9mpfbirud9ni73bal4jhkne0j0qol0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z28smctbeen3ngg36ot2n8aij9dcj4qgu8140r00_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72cth2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb96lspj3sfk7o5habh24jc7hahekao7dbti2sd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1g62o72cth2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWmbD4xWNk

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWmbD4xWNk

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64018887:WmbD4xWNk:m:3:2532013465:722A8D1A50829A5E048A9DE37E729D47:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor: Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? YES NO Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." That is why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention-and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. name: Amanda Chase
subject: URGENT: Voting TOMORROW Friday, Dec 13.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
We need 250 more people to show up tomorrow for Amanda
| | | | WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT TOMORROW
---
---
|
# Election Day Tomorrow, Fri. 13th
REGISTRATION AT THE DOOR 4:30PM-6:30PM bring your driver's license

---
|
# URGENT REQUEST:
# WE NEED 250 MORE PEOPLE TO COMMIT
---
| Greetings!, Urgent Request.
We need 250 more people to commit to show up to vote for me tomorrow night in order to win.
Could you please help me out?
Quite a few of my supporters can no longer attend tomorrow night's Republican Mass Meeting because of a scheduling conflict and I need your help fast.
Who can you get to show up tomorrow night to vote for me?
Please reply to this email with the name, county, cell and email of the people you can get to come before the election tomorrow.
Who do you know who lives in: Amelia Appomattox Buckingham Cumberland Prince Edward Fluvanna Goochland Western Hanover Henrico (Shady Grove precinct) Louisa Powhatan
If they live in any of these counties have them check [here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f0_dRKONUsa5ja92nN6hQ7LRmgEPRLrOOGbZBlucfyYK8v7xYC3FSXV1pfBOPOOy3ZSK4jUdF_4MmzjoD2bt58VQfE88QGP6b9y0uw-ZanMEeanIBzEGjS-gPytyt2LDgk8esh2b72m1yH6EEPRrLZZpv8EPahPURtKS4FS7-djM0sn6XULMbA==&c=HIJroQ74MFQSbiGBwnbh6p7W-mx9Ft2HXpE1YDxDhvRWcKPghE3WvA==&ch=AJtVPMJ7HHyil5EYbo9p08DE4Pyd9FLbbrO8PXFJMaL5cAx5rFBV2A==) to type in their home address to see if their current Senator is John McGuire. If yes, then they are eligible to vote.
The Republican Mass Meeting will be held tomorrow, Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road.
Registration is at the door, and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote. Bring your driver's license and pack something for dinner. Eating is allowed in the gym.
Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Our campaign will be shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location.
We are looking for volunteers outside of the district to volunteer for the day. If you have a 15 passenger van and would be willing to transport attendees from the parking areas to the voting location, please click[ here.](mailto:Britton@chaseforva.com) We also need door greeters and people with trucks.
There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Please see the map below for parking.
Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin.
Once voters are registered at the door, they will be given a wrist ban and asked to wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin.
Organizers have said you will want to eat before you come or bring something with you to eat while you wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin.
I've been advised there is no room for food trucks. So please plan accordingly. You may bring food and drinks into the gymnasium while you wait.
This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots:
Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely
Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50.1%.
If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50.1%, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place.
If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50.1%, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50.1%.
The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat.
Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat.
If you have any other questions about the Republican Mass Meeting please feel free to reply to this email and I will get organizers to answer them for you.
---
| |
---
Thank you for taking time out of your very busy life to commit to be apart of Friday's Republican Mass Meeting.
You have chosen to be apart of history. You are tasked with a very important decision to make. You are one of only hundreds of people who will choose who will be our next state senator and who will be our voice to Richmond in the Virginia General Assembly.
The choice rests on each of you who shows up this Friday. Thank you for accepting the call to civic duty when called on, even during the Christmas holidays.
While there are 7 candidates seeking the Republican nomination, I'm the only candidate running who has actually served in the position which we are seeking- Virginia State Senator.
During that 8 year period, I received many awards for legislative achievements, many which you will find in a recent mailer and one that will be made available at the Republican Mass Meeting.
HERE'S WHAT MY SUPPORTERS ARE SAYING ABOUT ME:
* EXPERIENCED
* KNOWLEDGEABLE
* TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE
* SOLID 8 YEAR CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD
* PROVEN VOICE OF THE PEOPLE
* ONLY CANDIDATE WHO HAS ACTUALLY SERVED IN THE VIRGINIA SENATE
* FIGHTER FOR THE PEOPLE
* EFFECTIVE
* BRAVE
* COURAGEOUS

The candidate who wins this Republican Mass will face our Democrat opponent on Tuesday, January 7.
The day after this General Election, the Senate will gavel in within hours of this newly elected senator being elected.
Remember. The General Election is Tuesday, January 7. Hours later on Wednesday, January 8 at noon, the Virginia Senate gavels in. There is no time for training.
Do you want to elect a Senator who is controlled and told how to vote by staff?
As we speak, Senate Democrats are still in session and meeting in committee to load up the docket with a plethora of legislation to kill, steal and destroy- including a bill to enshrine late term abortion into our Virginia Constitution.
Virginia is in the political war of our lifetime to defend freedom and prosperity. We can't afford to send in an inexperienced senator.
Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in?
I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Why?
8 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE AS A STATE SENATOR I've actually served for 8 years in the Virginia Senate as a Virginia State Senator. No other candidate can make that claim.
8 YEARS OF KNOWLEDGE SERVING AS A STATE SENATOR Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway?
I know how things work in the General Assembly.
There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days.
Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time.
If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled.
There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed.
TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do?
SOLID CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD YOU CAN TRUST I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years.
How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%?
They can't.
PROVEN FIGHTER FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE PEOPLE Many of you have told me that you are supporting me because I'm a fighter. I've proven myself to you time and time again. You know you can trust me. I'm not a typical politician.
You say that I'm the voice of the people.
A HISTORY OF STANDING STRONG I have an 8 year plus history of standing strong for you during the gun grab of 2021, exposing the 2020 Presidential Election being stolen in 2020 and pushing back against tyrannical Covid mandates, like involuntary masking and Covid jabs.
I didn't just show up on the political scene a few months ago and ask to be your leader.
In order to change things for the better, you have to know how things work. I've done that. And I've been effective at flipping the political tables from top down to bottom up, putting the people in charge of their government. Thanks to my work, you can now watch committee meetings online and with the exception of this Special Election, you can now vote at your polling location instead of spending hours in cumbersome party election processes that suppress the vote and limit participation. I was the deciding vote that put an end to what we are doing on Friday. You should be able to conveniently vote at your local polling location and go home.
LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH THE NEW SENATE LEADERSHIP
I look forward to working with the new Republican Senate leadership.
Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate Republican Senate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases.
Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so.
I had to do it. Although I voluntarily chose to leave the Republican Senate Caucus in 2019, I plan to return in 2025. The Senate now has good conservative leadership that I have worked with effectively in the past. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office.
ENDORSEMENTS I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, a number of members of the Board of Supervisors and School Board in both Amelia County and Hanover Counties.
NOT A TYPICAL POLITICIAN I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity.
They can't buy me. I work for you- the people of Senate District 10.
MY CONSTITUENTS TRUST ME The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote.
We need a courageous, proven conservative leader with experience and knowledge to effectively serve Senate District 10 the day after they are sworn in. I have a conservative record you can trust, and I'm ready for battle day one.
For God & Country,

clean_body: We need 250 more people to show up tomorrow for Amanda | | | | WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT TOMORROW | Election Day Tomorrow, Fri. 13th REGISTRATION AT THE DOOR 4:30PM-6:30PM bring your driver's license | URGENT REQUEST: WE NEED 250 MORE PEOPLE TO COMMIT | Greetings!, Urgent Request. We need 250 more people to commit to show up to vote for me tomorrow night in order to win. Could you please help me out? Quite a few of my supporters can no longer attend tomorrow night's Republican Mass Meeting because of a scheduling conflict and I need your help fast. Who can you get to show up tomorrow night to vote for me? Please reply to this email with the name, county, cell and email of the people you can get to come before the election tomorrow. Who do you know who lives in: Amelia Appomattox Buckingham Cumberland Prince Edward Fluvanna Goochland Western Hanover Henrico (Shady Grove precinct) Louisa Powhatan If they live in any of these counties have them check == to type in their home address to see if their current Senator is John McGuire. If yes, then they are eligible to vote. The Republican Mass Meeting will be held tomorrow, Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road. Registration is at the door, and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote. Bring your driver's license and pack something for dinner. Eating is allowed in the gym. Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Our campaign will be shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location. We are looking for volunteers outside of the district to volunteer for the day. If you have a 15 passenger van and would be willing to transport attendees from the parking areas to the voting location, please clickmailto:Britton@chaseforva.com We also need door greeters and people with trucks. There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Please see the map below for parking. Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin. Once voters are registered at the door, they will be given a wrist ban and asked to wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. Organizers have said you will want to eat before you come or bring something with you to eat while you wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. I've been advised there is no room for food trucks. So please plan accordingly. You may bring food and drinks into the gymnasium while you wait. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots: Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50.1%. If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50.1%, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place. If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50.1%, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50.1%. The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat. Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat. If you have any other questions about the Republican Mass Meeting please feel free to reply to this email and I will get organizers to answer them for you. | | Thank you for taking time out of your very busy life to commit to be apart of Friday's Republican Mass Meeting. You have chosen to be apart of history. You are tasked with a very important decision to make. You are one of only hundreds of people who will choose who will be our next state senator and who will be our voice to Richmond in the Virginia General Assembly. The choice rests on each of you who shows up this Friday. Thank you for accepting the call to civic duty when called on, even during the Christmas holidays. While there are 7 candidates seeking the Republican nomination, I'm the only candidate running who has actually served in the position which we are seeking- Virginia State Senator. During that 8 year period, I received many awards for legislative achievements, many which you will find in a recent mailer and one that will be made available at the Republican Mass Meeting. HERE'S WHAT MY SUPPORTERS ARE SAYING ABOUT ME: EXPERIENCED KNOWLEDGEABLE TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE SOLID 8 YEAR CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD PROVEN VOICE OF THE PEOPLE ONLY CANDIDATE WHO HAS ACTUALLY SERVED IN THE VIRGINIA SENATE FIGHTER FOR THE PEOPLE EFFECTIVE BRAVE COURAGEOUS The candidate who wins this Republican Mass will face our Democrat opponent on Tuesday, January 7. The day after this General Election, the Senate will gavel in within hours of this newly elected senator being elected. Remember. The General Election is Tuesday, January 7. Hours later on Wednesday, January 8 at noon, the Virginia Senate gavels in. There is no time for training. Do you want to elect a Senator who is controlled and told how to vote by staff? As we speak, Senate Democrats are still in session and meeting in committee to load up the docket with a plethora of legislation to kill, steal and destroy- including a bill to enshrine late term abortion into our Virginia Constitution. Virginia is in the political war of our lifetime to defend freedom and prosperity. We can't afford to send in an inexperienced senator. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in? I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Why? 8 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE AS A STATE SENATOR I've actually served for 8 years in the Virginia Senate as a Virginia State Senator. No other candidate can make that claim. 8 YEARS OF KNOWLEDGE SERVING AS A STATE SENATOR Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway? I know how things work in the General Assembly. There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days. Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled. There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed. TRUSTED CONSERVATIVE How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do? SOLID CONSERVATIVE VOTING RECORD YOU CAN TRUST I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses and the "Conservative Achievement" Award from the American Conservative Union. All 8 years. How can any other candidate who claims to be a conservative be better than 100%? They can't. PROVEN FIGHTER FOR THE INTERESTS OF THE PEOPLE Many of you have told me that you are supporting me because I'm a fighter. I've proven myself to you time and time again. You know you can trust me. I'm not a typical politician. You say that I'm the voice of the people. A HISTORY OF STANDING STRONG I have an 8 year plus history of standing strong for you during the gun grab of 2021, exposing the 2020 Presidential Election being stolen in 2020 and pushing back against tyrannical Covid mandates, like involuntary masking and Covid jabs. I didn't just show up on the political scene a few months ago and ask to be your leader. In order to change things for the better, you have to know how things work. I've done that. And I've been effective at flipping the political tables from top down to bottom up, putting the people in charge of their government. Thanks to my work, you can now watch committee meetings online and with the exception of this Special Election, you can now vote at your polling location instead of spending hours in cumbersome party election processes that suppress the vote and limit participation. I was the deciding vote that put an end to what we are doing on Friday. You should be able to conveniently vote at your local polling location and go home. LOOK FORWARD TO WORKING WITH THE NEW SENATE LEADERSHIP I look forward to working with the new Republican Senate leadership. Senator Ryan McDougle replaced the former moderate Republican Senate leader, who introduced gun control and tax increases. Sometimes you have to take a stand against leadership when they get off track and I was willing to do so. I had to do it. Although I voluntarily chose to leave the Republican Senate Caucus in 2019, I plan to return in 2025. The Senate now has good conservative leadership that I have worked with effectively in the past. I look forward to going back to the days of my first 4 years in office. ENDORSEMENTS I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, a number of members of the Board of Supervisors and School Board in both Amelia County and Hanover Counties. NOT A TYPICAL POLITICIAN I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. They can't buy me. I work for you- the people of Senate District 10. MY CONSTITUENTS TRUST ME The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote. We need a courageous, proven conservative leader with experience and knowledge to effectively serve Senate District 10 the day after they are sworn in. I have a conservative record you can trust, and I'm ready for battle day one. For God & Country, | Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023 | | | | == | | == | PARKING | | | | == | | | | | | | | | | Miss one of my emails? | | == | | == | | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811 | Midlothian, VA 23112 US | | | | | | |

clean_body: Our election system is the foundation of our government--without it, there is no legitimate authority. | | | | | Dear Peter, Our election system is the foundation of our government--without it, there is no legitimate authority. Our elections must reflect voter's intent; if they don't, it's fraud. United Sovereign Americans (USA) shared a in October. It's time to bring this truth to the public. | | Check out these media highlights. This from Dec 9, 2024 exposes the truth, and details the breach and the fraud in our elections. The people have had enough and USA will file lawsuits for civil rights violations, holding officials personally accountable. Learn More video highlight: | | Have you experienced voting issues in 2024? Fill out our election complaint form or share it with others who have. Citizen-submitted reports are crucial to our lawsuits, helping us block flawed election certifications and hold officials accountable to follow the law. | | Do you want to play a part in our citizen-led movement for valid elections? Follow, Comment and Share our social media to expand our mission reach: , , , , & Share our Report what you see by using the Pitch in to our legal fight. We have a goal of $2 million for accountability actions following the 2024 general election. Your contribution is vital in our fight for justice in 2024 and beyond. | | Join us this THURSDAY at 7:00 PM Eastern to arm yourself with the knowledge and tools to defend your civil right to a fair election. We'll dive into the Constitution, key case law, and how you use them to demand true election integrity. You can view past study sessions I look forward to seeing you tonight! Marly Hornik CEO, | | United Sovereign Americans, Inc., a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization, Suite 194, 167 LAMP & LANTERN VILLAGE, CHESTERFIELD, MO 63017

body:
Stand with us to secure a Senate majority for President Trump’s entire term

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eDPUvmMr9I9GoqmMN4Zd-w~~/AARclAA~~)

Friend,

The Senate map is shaping up for the 2026 campaign to HOLD our Senate majority so we can help President Trump Make America Great Again during his entire four year term.

Mid-term elections are historically stacked against the political party in power, so we must start planning TODAY.

**[The seven critical seats we MUST SECURE to hold the majority are in Maine, North Carolina, Georgia, Michigan, Ohio, New Hampshire, and Texas.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eDPUvmMr9I9GoqmMN4Zd-w~~/AARclAA~~)**

Some of these races do not have official candidates yet or even rumored ones, but we can't get buried by Democrats' early fundraising AGAIN in 2025. Otherwise, the campaign to SECURE the Senate majority will be an uphill battle from the start, and we will only have ourselves to blame.

**[**Please chip in by clicking one of the buttons below to help our Senate incumbents and 2026 Senate Nominees. ⬇️ ⬇️**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eDPUvmMr9I9GoqmMN4Zd-w~~/AARclAA~~)**

clean_body: Stand with us to secure a Senate majority for President Trump’s entire term ~ Friend, The Senate map is shaping up for the 2026 campaign to HOLD our Senate majority so we can help President Trump Make America Great Again during his entire four year term. Mid-term elections are historically stacked against the political party in power, so we must start planning TODAY. ~ Some of these races do not have official candidates yet or even rumored ones, but we can't get buried by Democrats' early fundraising AGAIN in 2025. Otherwise, the campaign to SECURE the Senate majority will be an uphill battle from the start, and we will only have ourselves to blame. ~ ****************************************************~************************************************** **************************************************~************************************************** **************************************************~************************************************** **************************************************~************************************************** **************************************************~************************************************** We're counting on our top conservative leaders like you to step up to support our candidates now so we don't fall behind next year. We know we have a winning message, ~ Anything you can spare today will help us establish a solid financial foundation in these key races so our Republican Senators and 2026 Senate Nominees do not have to fight from behind from day one of their campaigns. ~ Thank you, Senate Republicans **************************************************~**************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cfjhhd-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,A Wisconsin Appellate Court recently rejected activist Susan Crawford's attempt to block the Wisconsin Legislature from protecting the state's separation of powers and holding Attorney General Josh Kaul accountable. If Susan Crawford had it her way, the Attorney General would spend tax dollars without abandon. The voters can see clearly: Susan Crawford doesn't care about them--she only cares about liberal special interests. **We cannot let Wisconsin 's future be decided by activists like Susan Crawford!** **[Chip in to support our Spring Election Initiative](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cfjhhd-didthutlhu-y/)**[ _**.**_](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cfjhhd-didthutlhu-j/) In April, we have the opportunity to **flip the Wisconsin State Supreme Court** , uphold the rule of law, and stop liberals from rejecting any laws that they simply do not like. It is crucial that we begin laying the groundwork to maintain our majorities in the U.S. House and state legislature, as well as defeat Gov. Tony Evers, in order to stop the **Democrats' radical agenda.** Your [contribution](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cfjhhd-didthutlhu-d/) today will go directly toward ensuring we continue to elect conservative leaders who will protect Wisconsin from liberal overreach. name: Senate Republicans
subject: We’re looking to the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Stand with us to secure a Senate majority for President Trump’s entire term

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAcJbPV5l-qE2-ZkHrUoDw~~/AARclAA~~)

Friend,

The Senate map is shaping up for the 2026 campaign to HOLD our Senate majority so we can help President Trump Make America Great Again during his entire four year term.

Mid-term elections are historically stacked against the political party in power, so we must start planning TODAY.

**[The seven critical seats we MUST SECURE to hold the majority are in Maine, North Carolina, Georgia, Michigan, Ohio, New Hampshire, and Texas.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAcJbPV5l-qE2-ZkHrUoDw~~/AARclAA~~)**

Some of these races do not have official candidates yet or even rumored ones, but we can't get buried by Democrats' early fundraising AGAIN in 2025. Otherwise, the campaign to SECURE the Senate majority will be an uphill battle from the start, and we will only have ourselves to blame.

**[**Please chip in by clicking one of the buttons below to help our Senate incumbents and 2026 Senate Nominees. ⬇️ ⬇️**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAcJbPV5l-qE2-ZkHrUoDw~~/AARclAA~~)**

We're counting on our top conservative leaders like you to step up to support our candidates now so we don't fall behind next year.

We know we have a winning message, **[but we can't risk getting outspent by ratios of 3, 4, or even 5 dollars to 1 again. If we don't pick up the pace, _we could lose the Senate majority that President Trump needs to save America._](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAcJbPV5l-qE2-ZkHrUoDw~~/AARclAA~~)**

_Anything you can spare today will help us establish a solid financial foundation in these key races so our Republican Senators and 2026 Senate Nominees do not have to fight from behind from day one of their campaigns._

**[Please donate any amount you can spare to help us win these seven critical races. We need to SECURE these seats to HOLD the majority.>>>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAcJbPV5l-qE2-ZkHrUoDw~~/AARclAA~~)**

Thank you,

Senate Republicans

body:

Friend,

The Senate map is shaping up for the 2026 campaign to HOLD our Senate majority so we can help President Trump Make America Great Again during his entire four year term.

Mid-term elections are historically stacked against the political party in power, so we must start planning TODAY.

**[The seven critical seats we MUST SECURE to hold the majority are in Maine, North Carolina, Georgia, Michigan, Ohio, New Hampshire, and Texas.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7oVJJqAY0-7LXboHWO2THQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Some of these races do not have official candidates yet or even rumored ones, but we can't get buried by Democrats' early fundraising AGAIN in 2025. Otherwise, the campaign to SECURE the Senate majority will be an uphill battle from the start, and we will only have ourselves to blame.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=693864e6833540418624aa6a5144f9c5&_e=BkIXdmveT6-4U0siXAf25RK1HmQEsxd7fw8CRfJaXkVBDBYACXX1t0UXOJQ93hcZlldeZVMrp4M09qoHldKLQ2MXE4N8FPJutQ66u_ft10WoHL8jythj8FdDOoh9xnu0T_PbqOAnipND9oqbV8AvNzEiE6F1iw-P2qEIO1F1vK0nnhEGYVTWBhppCJnZ0-jRV_ttLKul13yZO8o3nS5PrJM7K_t20xWyIatcc_CyE6t_7xpdSst9J7gRdgeLNSDv1W1Xln1PWcvtz2EjjKVSYTgmyyTt_bQkks59btNtxlsea3pNQwgWKKrp1_M1I2cNobiE3DVCxMfHEoKD0AuSrB0pF89M-aVUH88iNSwGiCBDOfaqRl3SUzFc9BNzFOJ0)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=693864e6833540418624aa6a5144f9c5&_e=BkIXdmveT6-4U0siXAf25RK1HmQEsxd7fw8CRfJaXkVBDBYACXX1t0UXOJQ93hcZqCH9Z7oapwT2hhWDCJf8klHqR6uvvBCd2qY8WHFmqmqNuz4Ywr2gkgTR8Lj104Jgl2oZvLT140cd4TiuXsJFJKJNgJYFM28tVvE2fdyq0GCh8iyoLQQwThpEsTGU6B1O5sSSYs-zFxBUkUrhknLk54tqJNWHwZrjKp0vRBDNloC28WMHhA6kUz6FsQQ7Ffny2XBnyIZDOSpwyvvQKoSd6Bsrtg75a5iiq-7fWvJlpadMXbjG-AxX-uNIBCYggHUox4A_l9SklPOHit3WEbojRxYHEGhFHcDwKjR0RrLPCebdEXjp_dOxX1ibnKA9R37a2HNuBsOIuw12KziMGMDR7A%3D%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=693864e6833540418624aa6a5144f9c5&_e=BkIXdmveT6-4U0siXAf25RK1HmQEsxd7fw8CRfJaXkVBDBYACXX1t0UXOJQ93hcZqCH9Z7oapwT2hhWDCJf8klHqR6uvvBCd2qY8WHFmqmqNuz4Ywr2gkgTR8Lj104Jgl2oZvLT140cd4TiuXsJFJKJNgJYFM28tVvE2fdyq0GCh8iyoLQQwThpEsTGU6B1O5sSSYs-zFxBUkUrhknLk54tqJNWHwZrjKp0vRBDNloBF_aGsZsWsFQPYovZiTx_FQ_6eZ9xX5NmYbW4-h9MPYGLJ12KzhxKLe9BbQMq1K9rz0A4H9yC-YZWj5IdxDzOzTm9Ufbcez2LMiA5oSlDLlknxRKnRcV0r-a-PRmH1PAwaic0qC4ticA9epTysRM3Sd-7CR6ldjxgmcHLPmcjiAg%3D%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=693864e6833540418624aa6a5144f9c5&_t=fRaZj2SHHVFFc47oyzLsbMjvhwMF3yRsNIS6DaNkNmTpCKCVip7zt-tYIibuMmPlz0hMCjkp3gCcgDrYE7Ht6OYdIcSES42TBy4QOePW2VvPirFv941A_UsHwtAKNMGlSeuF70iy7nXxvTgUtZImQDk2tLVvM0M-UrI5XvUP6FM%3D)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |

---
| |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tafe9d186-49c7-4afd-abbf-28502ca7ed44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter, it’s Sarah McBride. I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use. I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them. People like my husband, Andy. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T202d23cf-c2ec-4283-bcb4-13b8685cd0e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed, and in the end, holding his hand as he passed away. I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky. Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him. Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs. My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities. But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country. That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate. [I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people. If you’re with me, please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05577fd6-f819-4b88-8035-21bdc274a8c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Sarah McBride Delaware’s Congresswoman-elect

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79ad2887-5bff-4764-b551-1ce02bb11f90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kFFPwjAQxz9N98bSu7are-iDQGpUgomJRnirbecqKx3b2OTbGxB5vfvd_X_5m9g2oTopIucEsQ6uJ4iE3RPEw2aK3fE7Pj_MxPawnR2KdRTnLS6u6Ig3eG8NLFOdeHpc9fNdEVa7zXaEGz6cWn-Dr6G5jyY056lcZk6xylGeeQWScUqxAJbVqjAOLbdGuNIDc854kFBWwkNVikJCFhRS5ICAAAhC5AY-UbAS7ijlzEhBOL3k5Cb6LlgD_TCZrksp5jbFrFH1MLT9RUwT1FOX8v3RNv7Y_53ZFAnqqzJBPRLUb7tiXq7fuX4iTF9KY0tpXszidfr5yDrl2ik0TegLSTj9-n-TjQp_AwAA__8kcW4P)

**Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,**
I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can't stop the recession from happening,**but you can prepare for it.****
That's why I've put together **_[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81y2yAUhZ8G7ezhXhCyFyySqGozTTPTZbzpIH4sGiFkkO3J23ewVbP8-OCco8I8evclSfNMEAdvMkEk7Ikgnj6uIZ3_hp_fN_XhdNicxHuoyy2-rOoFH_KkFbRxiDy-vuXnT-HfPj8OF3joy9dsH_IaurVB-bHQpq2MZM5QXlkJDeOUogBWDbJBxqAX9X7PwWqqNN1z2O36HpA7K0TlJVLkgIAACHW9VdBjzfawo5Qz1dSE01vOVgWbvFaQl6tKKcaw1TFUoxyWZc63Yh3BLjpnU_4vT4NKi4vJHONoik-wW1vfTYKdS9ZujmdvLMGuj5tktc3Zx6l8yLrRKpPjOWlLWPvt_lacl_BnUqGgtcwKF5sCYW3Zg3xl2WkVZuWPE2FtQ-H9Qsv58ev6--X1CaokzXz14-izaAinx9vasu0i8V8AAAD__544k2E)_** during this downturn.
**_[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81y2yAUhZ8G7ezhXhCyFyySqGozTTPTZbzpIH4sGiFkkO3J23ewVbP8-OCco8I8evclSfNMEAdvMkEk7Ikgnj6uIZ3_hp_fN_XhdNicxHuoyy2-rOoFH_KkFbRxiDy-vuXnT-HfPj8OF3joy9dsH_IaurVB-bHQpq2MZM5QXlkJDeOUogBWDbJBxqAX9X7PwWqqNN1z2O36HpA7K0TlJVLkgIAACHW9VdBjzfawo5Qz1dSE01vOVgWbvFaQl6tKKcaw1TFUoxyWZc63Yh3BLjpnU_4vT4NKi4vJHONoik-wW1vfTYKdS9ZujmdvLMGuj5tktc3Zx6l8yLrRKpPjOWlLWPvt_lacl_BnUqGgtcwKF5sCYW3Zg3xl2WkVZuWPE2FtQ-H9Qsv58ev6--X1CaokzXz14-izaAinx9vasu0i8V8AAAD__544k2E)_** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. But you can't use it if you don't know the details.
**Don't put your future in someone else's hands.** The time to prepare for an economic hurricane is before it hits. Seize the opportunity to protect your finances while you still can.
