Jorgie Boy, a 3-year-old spider monkey confiscated from his owner by Dallas police last month, was returned to social media influencer Brandi Botello on Tuesday after a month-long legal dispute that triggered a public debate over who should care for the animal.

**Good morning!** On this day in 1910, the ["Toonerville Trolley" streetcar line](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GurCAUheGngU6z9wYVC4rb2M1tT2lgACVBmSAZx7c_cfpT_dX6kvXzmB8mprgv_83mdf2EPBOQbJAapNmZmK5ZcqctuBG51zgICSCQFF-1cxACeqIeDNmnGIlIAtKIONhu7HjUN4aEhCgIVKtoNKFXVonQCeWASfAu1lzauvrqP-YI6cpvX9pn3njSa62vg4l_jCZG03mebT1Wk_cUd9_msjCavqvGmaux1x1Gk99ruSsV8KLd64wpxaMfmIRlMzF98frn27em3wAAAP__qA9VxQ) began operating between Houston and the suburban community of Bellaire along the route established by Bellaire Boulevard. It operated until 1927, when it was replaced by a bus service. Today's edition brings you [the happy ending](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP3CAQRn8N7mYFg73LFhSrSJZSXNqUq7EZbBIMFnDrc359dJFSXvt90tPT-_n2fKMQQ1p-0Ma2ffj8RIk9KASFT0chns--c3aS7q46tuqmeym1QtOtdr4NPOiB2SOjvzs1TGqejFdX453T1AX7CVOoUCmN0lwM3slfzWS0H7RxUvSSXWi5XNrKjT-o-njmF5fLnLcu2rW1vQr9EDgKHI_juGw1fX4CR07wXgWOO7cKlBxQChvF_5PAccvpN59QOfxhB9MJjmKkCnuOYWb4lcsSGKZ8QuH2XhI7aBnykbgA-cYFtpzaGnNaoNJCAkcq8Hio17dcv3fFuv0IMYZ6vYleLhuF-M-7fRnyZfFvAAAA___GVnjV) to a story we highlighted about a month ago regarding a confiscated spider monkey named Jorgie Boy. Let us know what you think about this wild saga! ## Report: Fertitta Likely Pick For Ambassador Post
Houston billionaire Tilman Fertitta, owner of the Houston Rockets and the Landry’s chain of restaurants and entertainment venues, has been named as President-elect Donald Trump’s likely pick for U.S. ambassador to Italy, according to [reporting from CBS News](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZgMAQXFK9xl9duaQ1m7KCFEAGJ479fZfvtrnSlc6TzdV2uGGK47_8xkW3vLS_AYewF9AIWjyGey9h567ifREdWXOTIuRRgupuVQqHjUvPJayQ1KWWEXtWIIKW-aNMF-4EJECCEBG4GAxNu2jgjNyWN52zk5EPLZWg3avTGusUzv6gMa05dtLfWHpXJfwxmBvNxHMPq6p2O-vkZzJ_JYG7lmR79d0iOSjz7_Rnils9I_V6IVuoxOawVfS4M5q5Y_zhCjKHqCxv5njDEX1_7M8DLwk8AAAD__510XcQ). Neither Fertitta nor officials close to Trump have commented on the expected appointment, but Fertitta has [contributed large amounts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGurCAURb8GOwzngIIFxWvs5rW3NCg4kqAYODPO_P3NTH_rnb2ysn5u083FFI_7f7cHS681TyhQcUAOOHkX03tSjbez8AM0wYKWSggJaJrNqiC072YtwEvQoHVYPMxKCaNNZ0TXRPuBAQICSBSmNTi4tTezkWsnjRdMieAj5dLSFii8XF3TOz9DaZe8N8luRGdl8h_DkeF4XVe7bCUfn5XheISrMhy3_KiUD_79MxxdobikwHCkmHZ38DUUikSOU3nsJ3f77Gp1PhcOw6BRmb49t7Mp1p9XTCnWXjMl7ruL6etBf4Z5WvwNAAD__9DxZWo) to Trump-aligned PACs and hosted several fundraisers for him at the Post Oak Hotel in Houston this year. Fertitta also joined Trump and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk to watch a Starship rocket launch in South Texas last month. Fertitta owns more than 600 properties in 36 states and over a dozen countries, including Morton’s Steakhouse, Joe’s Crab Shack, and the Golden Nugget Casino. He is the [star of the CNBC reality TV show](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQAJ_GdEbetcGmcHENXa69Em38E6wzITKbkLz9Kdd_9Uij0fy5LBcqtdxvv2lLnt95X1ChkYAScIlU6mcxXfRXFSfokgerjVIa0HWrj0bZYCGQQm2csqPWmWBSYZqmIU6hK_4rAwQE0Khc73CiPLqr03nQLiphVIqF99bzmji96cj1s79S68O-ddWvzI9D6F8CZ4HzeZ7933V_fqHAmRqXUJPA-Z7OQ-Bc90BV4MylbnSXOTUuzCS5PbeHpO1Kx0Fxb7Iw1Y_AGd0gA6GyAUHCkK00owXpMljpFNoYBoMj6q75-DhLreUYrTDqtlGp_xP5x2cvj_8CAAD__xkQas0) “Billion Dollar Buyer.”
## Water Issues Plague Central Texas Town
Several pipe leaks caused the city of Marlin to lose water pressure Tuesday, prompting officials to issue a boil water notice, cancel school, and [declare a state of emergency](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8N3rDgQWIyMHTxlq4drWfzSJ6K4whISP595aprlxvuTp9O93WezsiJb5dPXMnXV9wmUGClBqlhCsjpPdku-FmFk-7I68FYpYwG11394OYYLM0uIsYQDw5xoaMewNhlPqHp2O8wDRq0NqBc7-CE8ehmZ-LBuKCEVRS4brmvV6r0whLTe3tS7pdt7ZK_1novwnwIGAWMrbX-u9XXHgoYd7aAUcMuWsC4cH3LFXPim-RSHlRk4IKlUpaBloQZK283iSsH2XC375lKeWT66wsYu-zDvXFKXI6DsOqyIqffOfXff54efgIAAP__xQ5pDQ). It’s the third time water issues have forced the district to cancel classes this year. Crews from the state helped local workers identify and repair six leaks by Wednesday morning. In a [letter to Gov. Abbott](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO8yAQBOCnwZ2t3QXHuKD4G3f52ystYpYECZsI9nLJ25-S_rqpZub7Oq9nn3I6rv_9zk6esawEZHqkHmkNPuXXarrgLhBm7NjhpA2ARrLdzc0RrabJAyDjONoRIzBOMJ2i2ew2d8m9y5CQEDWBHSzNPp7sxeo4ahtAGeCQpNRBbiz89C3mV3lwHbayd9ndRO5N6X-KFkXL7mtOhzyHg0XREsr2vfMh7Z15y756SeXoS-xDar4J148D-vcLRUtXXbj_pJxTO03KwHX3KX-W5E_6w9FvAAAA___1LVl8), Mayor Susan Byrd said the city lacks funding to make necessary upgrades to its aging infrastructure. She asked Abbott to help Marlin secure financial assistance from the newly established Texas Water Fund. Tuesday’s city council meeting included an agenda item to discuss raising water rates by 25%, but the meeting was cut short due to a lack of running water in city hall restrooms. Marlin residents are frustrated. Nissa Girouard [complained](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQRZ8GOiP_kZjCxTZ02XZLNOAxjNbYke0E8vYrVmm_bkbn6Orq_nlMD6BAcf0NO9p6-jRJLjUTkgk5OaDwmXTr7MzdIFq04q4050pI025WDGCkWMygtNJa3WdYXA8Ofe-978WtJXuFCSmkEEpy0xk5gL-Z2SjfK-N4ozk6qil3dcOKJxQfPumNuVvS3ga71fosjfrVyLGR43Ec3d_zfF-wkWPEozRyDGmBwL4PRfZJr8wi0rrNKW8puUtNdaO4MipsxutwKSLbIQeKLGMhh7EW5vOr1AwVHQNfMX_lgL6yg-qWXpUdcAFYgWKbrXseFAKV273RfN2Bwv_m9ccp31b-CwAA___Gz3rV) that “nothing has been done, nothing,” and Terrence McDavid said he and his neighbors pay more for water than they do for electricity.
## Jorgie Boy Goes Home
Jorgie Boy, a 3-year-old spider monkey confiscated from his owner by Dallas police last month, was returned to social media influencer Brandi Botello on Tuesday after a [month-long legal dispute](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP3CAQRn8N7mYFg73LFhSrSJZSXNqUq7EZbBIMFnDrc359dJFSXvt90tPT-_n2fKMQQ1p-0Ma2ffj8RIk9KASFT0chns--c3aS7q46tuqmeym1QtOtdr4NPOiB2SOjvzs1TGqejFdX453T1AX7CVOoUCmN0lwM3slfzWS0H7RxUvSSXWi5XNrKjT-o-njmF5fLnLcu2rW1vQr9EDgKHI_juGw1fX4CR07wXgWOO7cKlBxQChvF_5PAccvpN59QOfxhB9MJjmKkCnuOYWb4lcsSGKZ8QuH2XhI7aBnykbgA-cYFtpzaGnNaoNJCAkcq8Hio17dcv3fFuv0IMYZ6vYleLhuF-M-7fRnyZfFvAAAA___GVnjV) that triggered a public debate over who should care for the animal. Police seized Jorgie Boy after Botello was involved in an alcohol-related car accident on Nov. 9. Jorgie was transferred to the city of Irving, which prohibits ownership of exotic animals, before being sent to the Funky Monkey Ranch in Burleson, which said he was [malnourished and suffered from a metabolic bone disease](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OwyAQBp8Gd0SwEIcUFNe4y7VXWtgsMTpsLNj8vf0J99dss6PR6Pu5jTcXU9zu325FS--QRxCguQQuYfQups-oO28n4a-yQysvSguhJJhusS5oDx60UGbuQwA1yd4ZFc69u559P3XRNpkECVIqEOZk4OpCb6YGKeMF0wJ9pFxOtCDh29WQPvmJ5TTntUt2IdorU18MBgZD3XGm8lhTnl3a8FUbxWCgd3vmBy38cHBMfHc1MxgaxWBoGQwGCe3IQxU9Fr7m7Rc_vCA9yoaeU-b5tWHpivX7K6YUa39hWtxXF9PRRP-O9LTwFwAA__81RGmF). Botello's attorneys asserted that Jorgie Boy was her property and shouldn’t have been confiscated without due process, an argument that convinced Irving officials to require the primate sanctuary to relinquish the monkey. “ _My heart is back in one piece. I really missed him so much_ ,” [said Botello](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd1hwIQ4uKF7jLq_d0sLmEt9dDBEmcfz3q7jfdkZnNDpft_HmKFK6_3cr2voOeQQBmkvgEkbvKB6jbrydhO9lg1ZelRZCSTDNYoUOvXGzUmC0NCi09B2G4Hqj8ILd1JD9jEmQIKUCYVoDvQudmYwKF2W8YFqgp5pLWxes-HZbiEd-YWnnvDbRLrU-Nqb-MRgYDPu-t_O0Jdy3T89gOBEGwydiMLyouMi3B3ksfM3pBw_-ncudkE_54AXrsyT0vGaecqkLP3lOKcQnphkLg6Ep1j92ipG27sq0uK-O4nmn_unnZeE3AAD__-Koajk), who pledged to provide Jorgie Boy with proper nutrition and medical care.
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-L4zAUxD-N3Nm8P5ItFyoOjJsj1yRwpZEiKRYosbG12eTbL1623ebxhhmGH_P_NJ1syulx-2fvwZRXXCYCkjVSjTR5m_J7kpU3DnyPVTDYsQRgJF3NxoKSiL13Vw-uoxBVz73roGNWXjtXJXOUISEhMoFuNPU2ttppjoq1ByEh-FSWrSlzKOFl95jfyzNszXW5V9nMpay74D-CRkFjdM3DlvQMqy3zkRA0bv44zTqvgsc9ecEDQqsEteuHEzyQBNWxoPaKh_rBqS_jOaZtLzX2Cg6XBA9_8fhY8HAZz9Vm_PqZck572wkJt7tN-Rur_LrT09BXAAAA__87TGJp) **7 reasons everyone over 50 should be taking THIS kind of protein**

Think vitamin D and calcium are the only answers to your bone health concerns?

Think again. While these nutrients get all the attention, scientists have uncovered a [**fascinating discovery**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-L4zAUxD-N3Nm8P5ItFyoOjJsj1yRwpZEiKRYosbG12eTbL1623ebxhhmGH_P_NJ1syulx-2fvwZRXXCYCkjVSjTR5m_J7kpU3DnyPVTDYsQRgJF3NxoKSiL13Vw-uoxBVz73roGNWXjtXJXOUISEhMoFuNPU2ttppjoq1ByEh-FSWrSlzKOFl95jfyzNszXW5V9nMpay74D-CRkFjdM3DlvQMqy3zkRA0bv44zTqvgsc9ecEDQqsEteuHEzyQBNWxoPaKh_rBqS_jOaZtLzX2Cg6XBA9_8fhY8HAZz9Vm_PqZck572wkJt7tN-Rur_LrT09BXAAAA__87TGJp) about what really keeps your bones strong - and it starts with the very scaffold that holds your bone minerals together.

This crucial protein matrix, which naturally declines as we age, could be the missing piece in your bone health puzzle.

Even more intriguing? Researchers have found that [**a specific type of protein**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-L4zAUxD-N3Nm8P5ItFyoOjJsj1yRwpZEiKRYosbG12eTbL1623ebxhhmGH_P_NJ1syulx-2fvwZRXXCYCkjVSjTR5m_J7kpU3DnyPVTDYsQRgJF3NxoKSiL13Vw-uoxBVz73roGNWXjtXJXOUISEhMoFuNPU2ttppjoq1ByEh-FSWrSlzKOFl95jfyzNszXW5V9nMpay74D-CRkFjdM3DlvQMqy3zkRA0bv44zTqvgsc9ecEDQqsEteuHEzyQBNWxoPaKh_rBqS_jOaZtLzX2Cg6XBA9_8fhY8HAZz9Vm_PqZck572wkJt7tN-Rur_LrT09BXAAAA__87TGJp) can help support this essential framework, working alongside vitamin D and calcium to maintain bone strength.

What's really turning heads? How quickly people are noticing differences in their bone density scores when they add this overlooked nutrient to their routine.

On this day in 1910, the began operating between Houston and the suburban community of Bellaire along the route established by Bellaire Boulevard. It operated until 1927, when it was replaced by a bus service. Today's edition brings you to a story we highlighted about a month ago regarding a confiscated spider monkey named Jorgie Boy. Let us know what you think about this wild saga! Today's sponsor is , offering nutritional advice to help promote strong bones. Abilene ☁️ 60/40° | Amarillo ☁️ 62/33° | Austin ☁️ 65/36° | Brownsville ☁️ 72/48° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 71/45° | DFW ☁️ 62/39° | El Paso ☁️ 59/37° | Houston ⛅ 66/40° | Lubbock ☁️ 56/36° | San Antonio 🌥️ 67/33° | Texarkana ☁️ 62/36° | Report: Fertitta Likely Pick For Ambassador Post Houston billionaire Tilman Fertitta, owner of the Houston Rockets and the Landry’s chain of restaurants and entertainment venues, has been named as President-elect Donald Trump’s likely pick for U.S. ambassador to Italy, according to . Neither Fertitta nor officials close to Trump have commented on the expected appointment, but Fertitta has to Trump-aligned PACs and hosted several fundraisers for him at the Post Oak Hotel in Houston this year. Fertitta also joined Trump and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk to watch a Starship rocket launch in South Texas last month. Fertitta owns more than 600 properties in 36 states and over a dozen countries, including Morton’s Steakhouse, Joe’s Crab Shack, and the Golden Nugget Casino. He is the “Billion Dollar Buyer.” Water Issues Plague Central Texas Town Several pipe leaks caused the city of Marlin to lose water pressure Tuesday, prompting officials to issue a boil water notice, cancel school, and . It’s the third time water issues have forced the district to cancel classes this year. Crews from the state helped local workers identify and repair six leaks by Wednesday morning. In a , Mayor Susan Byrd said the city lacks funding to make necessary upgrades to its aging infrastructure. She asked Abbott to help Marlin secure financial assistance from the newly established Texas Water Fund. Tuesday’s city council meeting included an agenda item to discuss raising water rates by 25%, but the meeting was cut short due to a lack of running water in city hall restrooms. Marlin residents are frustrated. Nissa Girouard that “nothing has been done, nothing,” and Terrence McDavid said he and his neighbors pay more for water than they do for electricity. Jorgie Boy Goes Home Jorgie Boy, a 3-year-old spider monkey confiscated from his owner by Dallas police last month, was returned to social media influencer Brandi Botello on Tuesday after a that triggered a public debate over who should care for the animal. Police seized Jorgie Boy after Botello was involved in an alcohol-related car accident on Nov. 9. Jorgie was transferred to the city of Irving, which prohibits ownership of exotic animals, before being sent to the Funky Monkey Ranch in Burleson, which said he was . Botello's attorneys asserted that Jorgie Boy was her property and shouldn’t have been confiscated without due process, an argument that convinced Irving officials to require the primate sanctuary to relinquish the monkey. “ My heart is back in one piece. I really missed him so much ,” , who pledged to provide Jorgie Boy with proper nutrition and medical care. | 7 reasons everyone over 50 should be taking THIS kind of protein Think vitamin D and calcium are the only answers to your bone health concerns? This crucial protein matrix, which naturally declines as we age, could be the missing piece in your bone health puzzle. Even more intriguing? Researchers have found that can help support this essential framework, working alongside vitamin D and calcium to maintain bone strength. What's really turning heads? **Good Morning!** On this day in 1901, radio pioneer Guglielmo Marconi sent [the first radio transmission](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LtuxCAQheGnsTssGPCloUjjbtOmtMZmWE-EYQVoLb995Cht6l86-nS-HssDOXB8fuJBtvq0gAQjFAgFi0MO12JaZz0RkG7JqlEbKbWRQ7tbidKtK8l-1ZPbjFETarmSBzVuvddDy_ZeU6BAKT2YvvPYA0xmHPoJnaexMZIc15S778Sx7uTDld6Uuy0dbbB7ra_S6I8G5gbm8zy7nUtN-bp7A3PduQiHl-Ao_koD84F5S5FFoeiK8JxLFVgDxsqbODlToFJEzRjLwaVwim227nVyCFyG2_Q8kMOvof73ydvCTwAAAP__QFpm3Q) across the Atlantic Ocean, transmitting the Morse-code signal for the letter “s” more than 2,000 miles from Cornwall to Canada. ## FBI Director to Step Down
FBI Director Christopher Wray announced Wednesday that [he plans to resign](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L-upyAQxfGn0Q4DI_4rKLaxu9tuaUYZdG4QDOA1vv3mt_3WJzn55Pvna_lC9hz233iSKS4uIEELBULBYpH9u-jaGkcE1NZk1NBqKVst-_ow09oqubq-m4DAajkMqKZB46SUInK6ZvN5U6BAqbbXXeOwAxj10HcjWkdDpSVZLjE135FDOcj5N_5QarZ41t4cpVy5an9VMFcwP8_ThHUL9OTPXsF8Rc-Ft1zB_H3nwhsJSxemclIoFcxuZWE50VZiEtuROIsn4SsyvlkkyrwHgQehFSXd55UFB7z3O2HhGETaAqqxHeVYJ2Ovh73n3H_M-4ns_xnL_5r9GPgbAAD__yi6cOs) at the end of the Biden administration when President-elect Donald Trump takes office. Wray stated that after careful consideration, resigning was "the best way to avoid dragging the bureau deeper into the fray." His current term was expected to end in 2027. Trump [hasn’t held back](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vwyAQBfBPY29EcIDBA0OXbOna0brAkVyF_wjTRP72lbt3fHrS00_v6zbdkAsvj0-cKbS8TiDBCAVCwZSQyzGZPoVMBKR7CsppI6U2cuifwTuLNo1eeZWtMeCikyOCkdrfrZex53CuKVCglB6MvWS0AN64wXpMmVxnJCVua718r7y0J-VyrC-ql7jOfQnP1ra90x8dXDu44rbQez-rM9TGsVAH13fFQ-Q7i8SVYlurqLTzYxGt_syb2LBRERGdtTqO4NV4t8a7SAoSgQW0aI3ua0jbm0vhfThVjxm5_Cnaf6-8AvwGAAD__5sDYbU) on criticism of Wray, using a Sunday interview to express his disapproval of the way the FBI handled the search of his Florida home, “I can’t say I’m thrilled with him. He invaded my home.” Trump was also [quick to respond](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOpDAQheGngawQlM2lAwebkPWmG6JqXIbaMZix3c3w9qOefOIjHX36_92nO4mXfflLG5vswoQ1amgQGpwsib8mXVrjmJFVyabpla5rpeuuXM2Mtx6HntRwQ5xvraK2e9Rd_8CaSFtdinm_Ndhg06hOt5WjFnHQfdcOZB33ha7ZSg6x-h9kzys7f4UXx2oOW-nNmvORCvWnwLHA8TzPyoWvnc_03gscj-Aly5wKHHN8bgckuhKckS6InGTZKUvYYYlMGSxdQBtHmQlyeOYEH5RWOCizhy2kDJ9P8uKELXgmC-4hZTT2OMV7Sd0bu2wk_geXf4v1MvgdAAD__x6abwk) to Wray’s decision, calling it a “great day for America” and saying it "will end the weaponization" of the bureau.”
## Albertsons Ends $25 Billion Kroger Merger
Supermarket giant Albertsons abandoned its [$24.6 billion proposed merger](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuxCAQRL8Gd1iwYHMpKNK4u7QprTUsNgk2JyBn3d9HTp9qRhpp9PQ-7_MdY4rH-oE72RbyDAI0l8AlzB5jes268zYQAamOrDRKC6G0GLvNLkY4aRaDgxFaGpSgRqM9KjGSfKOhi_Z6kyBBSjXqoQ84ANy0GYcb-kCGaUE-tlz6rxyPtlFIr_yk0ru8d8lurT0qU-8MJgbTeZ69W-pBZ712BtNVGUyYFiqt5qNyhylVnkPg3yWvVPhO5Yr6Q5WHXPhSCN3Gc-AuH62gawymrlj_OGNKsY4X07pjTH8M7T8nTwu_AQAA__8NNmSf) with Kroger Wednesday, suing its rival for breach of contract after two federal judges temporarily blocked the deal. Federal judges in Oregon and Washington [sided with the FTC](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ8GOiK8XowpXPxNuvztlWix18neGYyML1He_sT1V86MNPr0fdzmG0mS7f6fVnY15hl6wE5Bp2AOJOk9YxtcZAbWLTs1aux7jb1pHy4MZC1G8mbSCylL4IEXmNhq9NbaVtz5pkCBUtrgcIk0AFgczWApRB4b7DlIzeXymWWrD47pnZ9cLj6vbXKPWvej0f8auDZwpX3j13FOZyhVfOIGrl8l37l0lBYu9cjb0a1czsbn71K7wF4OyVuHCoxewqT0GIYeDRkEHgMYnqwP0bfFhf0lKclhTrD7SpJ-QepfYp4OfgIAAP__GAZkfw) Tuesday, freezing the Kroger-Albertsons merger over concerns it would reduce competition and increase consumer prices. The grocery giants [have accused each other](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-N2RzBcT7sgaFLtnTtaGE4ElpsLIwS5d9X7t7x6Unvffq-bvPNpZy2-6db2bZYZpCAvYJewRxcyu8ZRbCRGVgLtspolFKjJPGwniYK0aOfGNkvGkdyBkgRIDIug0j2XFOgQClNOFyiGwBGNDSMLkQ2HUoOqZV6-S5paw-O-V2eXC--rCLbR2v70emPDq4dXN2-8es4qzPUlnzmDq4_tdy59i4vXNtRtqM3E2siAzoYGM0CIRoVJjJaxsUZYlFt2F8p53TQiXBfXcp_l-0_BU8LvwEAAP__-n1brA) of not doing enough to secure regulatory approval. It ended with Albertsons suing Kroger for $600M in termination fees plus billions in damages, while Kroger dismissed the claims as baseless.

On this day in 1901, radio pioneer Guglielmo Marconi sent across the Atlantic Ocean, transmitting the Morse-code signal for the letter “s” more than 2,000 miles from Cornwall to Canada. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkcuK3DAQRb9G3tmUSmrZs9BiwG0IZCaPzSyNIpW7BXoYSZ4wfx-cdLLPtqo4dQ_37WV9MT74dHs1kfQWylrqmsx69yH0NVtvQl-P0ofdrAgoe449x5V3TgN_clJ2pPkoJICCC3R3fVEoDVoBYnNC0aRg2rhU6mLHCS5m6rw-ORw5ci4VTMP2hG50o7ATuM2iZRJMoNKGrRC5HE1ywf-g0j4K7bm0webYBX1vba9MPDNcGC4-bXk4Q1dnAg3kDobLn_y-xlPhnT6YWI4W15qPYomJeS-57mSbTzeG6lxFcv6ITMwUjQ-PoTVxN_6WmJj_ER_Ax0FOjVJjYv763C-fv_d_DRmqapmYAWDir4ASP13f5i_z9fqtK9rtP30IvqqRSbidD3-rtf-p4V3jrwAAAP__QaaRoA)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkckK2zAQhp9GvtlII8XLQYeAYyg06XLJ0chaHIEWI8kpefvipum915mfb_6PuV_nq7DOhvUmvObGpTnlOYj5YZ2rc5RWuDrvqXabmAEDqwnUBGZSKY7JoBirNCcdZRi3-ISrB6fLMphBEWWYInJhZpEnaLEZBmYE7YfK8oNDgAAhrMV9YwZQneqo7LEyEiRiWDidSmOS1ip6EZSzi07llfQWU2lk9JXjj1K2jOgZwYRgssHE5iidlXC60WpHML372-wPhad-HVE67cXPOe5JakTHLcW8aVlsWBG0x8prZXeP6Ki9sO7vUAq_CbsGRMd_0A_zHYih6FAQHb-f6-nrz_ojiaDNEtERY9yTGwYGXy738dt4ufyoElfbL-uczW2HGF6Pg3_syv984snhdwAAAP__jQSTlQ)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkckK2zAQhp9GvtlII8XLQYeAYyg06XLJ0chaHIEWI8kpefvipum915mfb_6PuV_nq7DOhvUmvObGpTnlOYj5YZ2rc5RWuDrvqXabmAEDqwnUBGZSKY7JoBirNCcdZRi3-ISrB6fLMphBEWWYInJhZpEnaLEZBmYE7YfK8oNDgAAhrMV9YwZQneqo7LEyEiRiWDidSmOS1ip6EZSzi07llfQWU2lk9JXjj1K2jOgZwYRgssHE5iidlXC60WpHML372-wPhad-HVE67cXPOe5JakTHLcW8aVlsWBG0x8prZXeP6Ki9sO7vUAq_CbsGRMd_0A_zHYih6FAQHb-f6-nrz_ojiaDNEtERY9yTGwYGXy738dt4ufyoElfbL-uczW2HGF6Pg3_syv984snhdwAAAP__jQSTlQ)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Liberty Report
---

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aA0Gycc1QeFFSTi0m6xM9Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPWXGP0SjaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc29jaWFsaXNtLXN1cnZleT91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNvY2lhbGlzbXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyNDEyMTImc2M9MDAwODFOMDI0MklFV0RPREVFUVcDc3BjQgpnVQvOWmdvBytyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-f8qs0YRIS_slD3si7ASpw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPWXGP0SkaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc29jaWFsaXNtLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zb2NpYWxpc21zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQxMjEyJnNjPTAwMDgxTjAyNDJJRVdET0RFRVFXA3NwY0IKZ1ULzlpnbwcrclIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-f8qs0YRIS_slD3si7ASpw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPWXGP0SkaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvc29jaWFsaXNtLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zb2NpYWxpc21zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQxMjEyJnNjPTAwMDgxTjAyNDJJRVdET0RFRVFXA3NwY0IKZ1ULzlpnbwcrclIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LUeDTgzr8VGKS1I27rVHxA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPWXGP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmdVC85aZ28HK3JSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/c_qR6GeLVAdSgPOeFCGZUw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPWXGP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnVQvOWmdvBytyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of Imprimis --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below? Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... . . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. Why is this? Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

subject: Stop the radical transgender movement
body:
Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit...

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d358bddab2a44f518a11bf28a8b8aebb&_e=G59UjCVxMFjFkDYIhCLhJfxkRKlUj3nqgfdWOJ5X3mvHiRFI-8jZmkI2F3FH8uBkHkPKkG6i4DvW18jc5ruPC8hOfoe48GnrPyMWAHmt74X56hsSWNg9a4FwQCJUag4foLLwuibWN_T1vP_mdBgPEYSbkqop8CALvyMC8ra1XX3JFuSN5bww7OVq1L65MsumfOIFncMvaUvdnrIeRPTXuNOvefbfMJjtFukyazKyNYcaw-VdaDR7L2RLKMaA93guzAYUjWMHIhTYkKA6XFd4Ch1DjW8oEvl7-geObYvpre1xJH74y80CwRGyLDLu01MJgtxcHIP-pABTAok9IpaY8KhSCxuHhuwqzatOFCG40NiUJcF7AyTfl2C512O7Sg3f2Fi_0VS3P5banrP1rU5UoQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... That your 16-year-old daughter was forced to get undressed in a locker room with boys competing in girls' sports...That your 8-year-old son was being groomed at school to use new pronouns or a different name behind your back...Or that, God forbid, a surgeon amputated the healthy breasts of your 13-year-old niece in the name of "Transgender care." I know these images are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because **_God-fearing, faith-filled_ **people like you and me have a job to do today.You and I can't retreat into our homes and hope the Left's radicalism will pass us by. We've got to stand against it. **[**That's why I'm asking you to stand with me and the Center for American Liberty today -- before it's too late.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d358bddab2a44f518a11bf28a8b8aebb&_e=G59UjCVxMFjFkDYIhCLhJfxkRKlUj3nqgfdWOJ5X3mvHiRFI-8jZmkI2F3FH8uBkHkPKkG6i4DvW18jc5ruPC8hOfoe48GnrPyMWAHmt74X56hsSWNg9a4FwQCJUag4foLLwuibWN_T1vP_mdBgPEYSbkqop8CALvyMC8ra1XX3JFuSN5bww7OVq1L65MsumfOIFncMvaUvdnrIeRPTXuNOvefbfMJjtFukyazKyNYcaw-VdaDR7L2RLKMaA93gutGEp2a9IsLdo3xs7qSPyQDawPj4k3q1wvx1xwK1jIcFpXyTkG4jL5ZyfyHKKcSYW21jsKecIt8oU8x-nG4xAfcaKwoGFF8MVkl1OjLpaPi-EgkVFH7HS6h2b_B5tpMz-X6h5HhXil0N5-sR4X3qUzw%3D%3D)** You and I both know **God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** **And we know that MILLIONS of Americans agree with us. We saw that when conservatives won a decisive victory on November 5th!** Poll after poll shows the Left's gender insanity was a HUGE motivating issue in the election -- and Americans across the country voted AGAINST radicals corrupting our children and our culture.But this fight is not over... **Because now the left will fight back with a vengeance, not in Washington, but in the courtroom!** No doubt huge left-wing legal advocacy groups like the **_ACLU_** and **_Southern Poverty Law Center_** and many others are preparing to jam through the left's agenda in the courts.And we must be ready to take on their lawfare, lies, and corruption.Because we simply can't let this transgender madness continue.Forcing Americans to play along with or affirm the delusion that one's sex can be changed is unconstitutional and dangerous.Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. But if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- with the Center for American Liberty.** **[Please stand against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount today -- before it's too late.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d358bddab2a44f518a11bf28a8b8aebb&_e=G59UjCVxMFjFkDYIhCLhJfxkRKlUj3nqgfdWOJ5X3mvHiRFI-8jZmkI2F3FH8uBkHkPKkG6i4DvW18jc5ruPC8hOfoe48GnrPyMWAHmt74X56hsSWNg9a4FwQCJUag4foLLwuibWN_T1vP_mdBgPEYSbkqop8CALvyMC8ra1XX3JFuSN5bww7OVq1L65MsumfOIFncMvaUvdnrIeRPTXuNOvefbfMJjtFukyazKyNYcaw-VdaDR7L2RLKMaA93gupyBih7nhMjgivn1GDY-8XhE7BhjDJf64jCqCaQlxkLVfHW-rqzINjL1ukZCS1WVCu1wyfl1utCC0EmuRXQk-Z933PmzNmRXrg1VLra5bo5EhBQyg5oMOdlKeYfUHPrU0cqwiiNbDa4Mkzhksdw44JA%3D%3D) ** Before I go on, let me introduce myself. **My name is Mark Trammell,** and I'm the**Executive Director** and **General Counsel** of the conservative **legal non-profit, Center for American Liberty.** But more than my day job as a lawyer, **I'm a** **husband, a father of two, and a devout Christian**. These roles are what drive my passion for the work we do at **the Center for American Liberty** \-- because protecting freedom isn't just a job to me, it's personal.We take the fight to the left in the courtroom -- and we protect your rights as a freedom loving, patriotic American. Especially when it comes to protecting children and families from the rampages of radical gender ideology. This is what conservatives are up against right now:
---
>> Parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed policies requiring schools to inform parents if teachers socially "transition" their child at school, and now the state of California is suing them so schools can keep secrets from parents.>> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I speak to conservatives around the country, I meet so many folks who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner."The good news is that right now, **_you still have a chance to stop the radical transgender movement_** before it pushes us further down this path. Because there is one group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone, and that is**the Center for American Liberty.****[**And your tax-deductible gift today will keep our critical legal work going.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d358bddab2a44f518a11bf28a8b8aebb&_e=G59UjCVxMFjFkDYIhCLhJfxkRKlUj3nqgfdWOJ5X3mvHiRFI-8jZmkI2F3FH8uBkHkPKkG6i4DvW18jc5ruPC8hOfoe48GnrPyMWAHmt74X56hsSWNg9a4FwQCJUag4foLLwuibWN_T1vP_mdBgPEYSbkqop8CALvyMC8ra1XX3JFuSN5bww7OVq1L65MsumfOIFncMvaUvdnrIeRPTXuNOvefbfMJjtFukyazKyNYcaw-VdaDR7L2RLKMaA93guFm2v1o4sk9JCLlSChRs8cdSF5DAXMrlpUBcJmTIT2O7tdrDOhhD8vFvhYKnAjmfSY_MP0pSyHVuz02ecGvK_CIGwpT4xL7ZWOvH2x3T_pR7RCz9km3qcjenCFBJpxiBwhcBifk98thRNoP_H4vElsw%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that's where this battle is won or lost.And we're attacking this evil from all sides with our comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**1\. We're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in so many of today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And we already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d358bddab2a44f518a11bf28a8b8aebb&_e=G59UjCVxMFjFkDYIhCLhJfxkRKlUj3nqgfdWOJ5X3mvHiRFI-8jZmkI2F3FH8uBkHkPKkG6i4DvW18jc5ruPC8hOfoe48GnrPyMWAHmt74X56hsSWNg9a4FwQCJUag4foLLwuibWN_T1vP_mdBgPEYSbkqop8CALvyMC8ra1XX3JFuSN5bww7OVq1L65MsumfOIFncMvaUvdnrIeRPTXuNOvefbfMJjtFukyazKyNYcaw-VdaDR7L2RLKMaA93gutXF9qTxSz_epcYmVkqimKuTFuiEBXN1f0hvvMqg3D7gH4ZY23Z6UPKuHJmSHJ3t8ENg7Kt7fTPaT285nHbhak6JAfQECwFsFN3PsPJ_6tLdMUZdGL79zk8qiUKLr9Skzij-97HHRTsc4bIEo6rVBhQ%3D%3D) **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**2.****We're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts.Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In our landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. [**When you make your tax-deductible gift today** ,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d358bddab2a44f518a11bf28a8b8aebb&_e=G59UjCVxMFjFkDYIhCLhJfxkRKlUj3nqgfdWOJ5X3mvHiRFI-8jZmkI2F3FH8uBkHkPKkG6i4DvW18jc5ruPC8hOfoe48GnrPyMWAHmt74X56hsSWNg9a4FwQCJUag4foLLwuibWN_T1vP_mdBgPEYSbkqop8CALvyMC8ra1XX3JFuSN5bww7OVq1L65MsumfOIFncMvaUvdnrIeRPTXuNOvefbfMJjtFukyazKyNYcaw-VdaDR7L2RLKMaA93guxtOa2azcU_9UgsWtdErzPWhHDEUpy4CD_pkfPqS1fX95JiDzjh1ab1-c8RG-4-CEcw_oxXfwv6Hgu27bAissOpBb6hKVwDKFGZ1JzMtwdM0XfO853pkGiNVGMwM3qCamTRGExqO3H4YyJlU74DYBBw%3D%3D) you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**3.****We're****fighting for your right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is core to the Center for American Liberty's mission and we've notched plenty of victories in this space. And now we're fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandmother raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls take off their swimsuits.And she was the one punished![**When you make your tax-deductible gift today** ,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d358bddab2a44f518a11bf28a8b8aebb&_e=G59UjCVxMFjFkDYIhCLhJfxkRKlUj3nqgfdWOJ5X3mvHiRFI-8jZmkI2F3FH8uBkHkPKkG6i4DvW18jc5ruPC8hOfoe48GnrPyMWAHmt74X56hsSWNg9a4FwQCJUag4foLLwuibWN_T1vP_mdBgPEYSbkqop8CALvyMC8ra1XX3JFuSN5bww7OVq1L65MsumfOIFncMvaUvdnrIeRPTXuNOvefbfMJjtFukyazKyNYcaw-VdaDR7L2RLKMaA93guDB4DSlGERGM5dI-9lkoNXm_FvwVOBf9FvDytmttieqoCB8JwqSHerWy8wmLTI2cNXxX5JwDKFgcijSM60LS5GDOYg7eA6AgV2wG51w84vc0OT-cpu-Ao_235V6X4si3bfR7bpfXXaDvSF8DK4W8rfA%3D%3D) you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[**But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100, or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d358bddab2a44f518a11bf28a8b8aebb&_e=G59UjCVxMFjFkDYIhCLhJfxkRKlUj3nqgfdWOJ5X3mvHiRFI-8jZmkI2F3FH8uBkHkPKkG6i4DvW18jc5ruPC8hOfoe48GnrPyMWAHmt74X56hsSWNg9a4FwQCJUag4foLLwuibWN_T1vP_mdBgPEYSbkqop8CALvyMC8ra1XX3JFuSN5bww7OVq1L65MsumfOIFncMvaUvdnrIeRPTXuNOvefbfMJjtFukyazKyNYcaw-VdaDR7L2RLKMaA93gutZbCC_GMU8IatbS1dMuSliJCqoboA9_TuK0GnSi8i9yknn00pURD6_MAI9H5iTV__YmeebBEcoLKfTx-gmTOOvtqxXRoF7BKK7MLkyvxNnv7_W_wbkatqMqsTADoWXr1I90LiSg3CkG8gAQNptxrTw%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.**The bottom line: We must be prepared for this fight to move _from_ Washington _into_ the courts in the new year. So please make your gift as soon as possible**Thank you for reading my email.
---

clean_body: Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... | | | | Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative,Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... That your 16-year-old daughter was forced to get undressed in a locker room with boys competing in girls' sports...That your 8-year-old son was being groomed at school to use new pronouns or a different name behind your back...Or that, God forbid, a surgeon amputated the healthy breasts of your 13-year-old niece in the name of "Transgender care." I know these images are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today.You and I can't retreat into our homes and hope the Left's radicalism will pass us by. We've got to stand against it. You and I both know God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. And we know that MILLIONS of Americans agree with us. We saw that when conservatives won a decisive victory on November 5th! Poll after poll shows the Left's gender insanity was a HUGE motivating issue in the election -- and Americans across the country voted AGAINST radicals corrupting our children and our culture.But this fight is not over... Because now the left will fight back with a vengeance, not in Washington, but in the courtroom! No doubt huge left-wing legal advocacy groups like the ACLU and Southern Poverty Law Center and many others are preparing to jam through the left's agenda in the courts.And we must be ready to take on their lawfare, lies, and corruption.Because we simply can't let this transgender madness continue.Forcing Americans to play along with or affirm the delusion that one's sex can be changed is unconstitutional and dangerous.Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. But if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- with the Center for American Liberty. Before I go on, let me introduce myself. My name is Mark Trammell, and I'm theExecutive Director and General Counsel of the conservative legal non-profit, Center for American Liberty. But more than my day job as a lawyer, I'm a husband, a father of two, and a devout Christian. These roles are what drive my passion for the work we do at the Center for American Liberty \-- because protecting freedom isn't just a job to me, it's personal.We take the fight to the left in the courtroom -- and we protect your rights as a freedom loving, patriotic American. Especially when it comes to protecting children and families from the rampages of radical gender ideology. This is what conservatives are up against right now: > Parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed policies requiring schools to inform parents if teachers socially "transition" their child at school, and now the state of California is suing them so schools can keep secrets from parents.>> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I speak to conservatives around the country, I meet so many folks who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner."The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to stop the radical transgender movement before it pushes us further down this path. Because there is one group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone, and that isthe Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that's where this battle is won or lost.And we're attacking this evil from all sides with our comprehensive three-pronged approach. 1\. We're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in so many of today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And we already have one major win! you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! 2.We're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts.Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In our landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! 3.We'refighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is core to the Center for American Liberty's mission and we've notched plenty of victories in this space. And now we're fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandmother raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls take off their swimsuits.And she was the one punished you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.The bottom line: We must be prepared for this fight to move from Washington into the courts in the new year. So please make your gift as soon as possibleThank you for reading my email. | | God bless,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel | | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

If we want to keep Christ in Christmas, defend American values, and keep our country safe, we need you to stay vigilant.

That's why we're so proud to present you with House Republicans' Golden Gavel Award.

name: History Facts
subject: These four U.S. presidents were cheerleaders
body:
Despite its modern association with women, cheerleading started in the mid-19th century as what was considered a masculine sport — an ideal pastime for charismatic, athletic young men. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cnmr9v8mczmun8w6a314w67g9l8isakpogfddbu3zeqa55um5fj9xzt369uwlh9ungp5praqizvltbzeva4kcuux678cp0cijibol7tut5cl52wqvef7bpyoxxp4rdr67lrcl5xvqvupr1j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Four U.S. presidents were cheerleaders.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| D espite its modern association with women, cheerleading started in the mid-19th century as what was considered [a masculine sport](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) — an ideal pastime for charismatic, athletic young men. Women were actively excluded at first, but started taking the field during World War II when many college-aged men were fighting abroad, and they didn’t really overtake the sport until the 1960s; as women cheerleaders became more common, the sport was trivialized and viewed as not athletic enough for men. So even though the United States has not had a female president, it’s not necessarily surprising that four former occupants of the White House — Franklin D. Roosevelt, Dwight D. Eisenhower, Ronald Reagan, and George W. Bush — spent time hyping up a crowd as cheerleaders for their school sports teams.
---
Though FDR didn’t play any other college sports himself, he was an avid football fan, devoting many column inches to the Harvard team while editor of the _Harvard Crimson_ newspaper, and he eventually [became head cheerleader](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Eisenhower desperately [wanted](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to play baseball and football at West Point in the 1910s, but after a career-ending knee injury during a football game (which he promptly reinjured horseback riding a few days later), he expressed his love for the game as head cheerleader.
Cheerleading at basketball games was just one of Reagan’s[ laundry list](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of athletic extracurriculars at Eureka College in the 1930s, along with track, football, and serving as captain and coach of the swim team. And Bush, who attended boarding school at Phillips Academy Andover in the 1960s, where athletic participation was mandatory, became a cheerleader after [warming the bench](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in basketball, baseball, and football. He eventually rose to the rank of head cheerleader his senior year. Bush took the megaphone amid a cultural shift: While cheerleading was still considered masculine at Andover, back in his home state of Texas it was largely viewed as a feminine activity.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Samuel L. Jackson was a cheerleader in college.
Actor Samuel L. Jackson became a cheerleader at the all-male Morehouse College in Atlanta in 1966 so that, according to him, he could travel with the basketball and football teams to [meet women](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodqvq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Jackson eventually declared a major in drama, a department shared with the all-female Spelman College, where he met his wife LaTanya Richardson — so it turns out he didn’t have to travel too far after all.

# **Trump is Time's Person of the Year**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vpt4l-nks7ys-kyd76rh4/)
---
| | | | folks, Once again, the corporate media has reminded us who they really serve. Spoiler alert: it’s not the people. Time Magazine’s "Person of the Year" once held a sense of honor, spotlighting humanitarians, global leaders, activists, and Nobel Peace Prize recipients who made remarkable contributions to society. But today, it’s a badge of disgrace. This year, Time crowned Donald Trump—America’s felon-in-chief—and gave runner-up status to none other than Benjamin Netanyahu, a terrorist in a suit. This choice wasn’t just a slap in the face to decency—it was a full-on assault on our values. Trump, whose presidency reads like a horror story of corruption, cruelty, and chaos, continues to represent everything wrong with our democracy. Let’s take a walk down memory lane and revisit just a few of Trump’s greatest hits:

### **1\. January 6th: The Day Democracy Nearly Died**
The crown jewel of Trump’s treachery came on January 6, 2021. Fueled by lies about a “stolen election,” Trump incited a mob to storm the U.S. Capitol in a brazen attempt to overthrow our democracy. Lives were lost, countless others were traumatized, and America’s reputation as a beacon of freedom was left in tatters.
### **2\. Charlottesville’s “Fine People”**
When white supremacists terrorized Charlottesville, Trump didn’t condemn them—he called them “very fine people.” This wasn’t a dog whistle; it was a bullhorn for hate. Trump’s refusal to disavow bigotry gave cover to extremists, paving the way for an era of political violence we’re still grappling with today.
### **3\. Profiting off the Presidency**
Trump shredded the Constitution’s emoluments clause like a predator tearing apart prey. The presidency became his personal ATM, with his properties turned into bribe factories and his family cashing in at every opportunity. Make no mistake: his first term was a four-year grift.
### **4\. A Pandemic Fueled by Stupidity**
Trump’s mishandling of the COVID-19 pandemic was catastrophic. He downplayed the virus, mocked masks, and suggested injecting bleach as a cure. By the time he left office, over 400,000 Americans had died—40% of those deaths were preventable. His negligence wasn’t just incompetence; it was criminal.
### **5\. A Legacy of Hate and Division**
Trump’s presidency was defined by his open disdain for immigrants, people of color, and the LGBTQ+ community. From banning Muslims to separating children from their parents at the border, his policies were a masterclass in cruelty. His 2019 ban on transgender people in the military was a gut punch to equality, forcing brave service members to choose between their identity and their careers.
### **6\. Destroying the Environment**
Trump rolled back over 100 environmental regulations, opening the floodgates for corporate polluters to poison our air and water. He gutted protections for wetlands, endangered species, and vehicle emissions—all for the sake of profit. His environmental policies weren’t just shortsighted; they were an outright declaration of war on our planet.
### **7\. Corruption Every Step of the Way**
From hoarding classified documents at Mar-a-Lago to pressuring Georgia officials to “find” votes, Trump’s corruption knew no bounds. He wasn’t just unethical—he was criminal. His conviction on 40 felony counts for mishandling classified documents is just the tip of the iceberg.

### **The Real Enemy: Corporate Media**
By glorifying Trump as Person of the Year, the corporate media sends a dangerous message: corruption, cruelty, and incompetence are worthy of celebration. This isn’t just a betrayal of journalistic integrity; it’s a betrayal of the American people. [**_But we are not helpless. Every single day is an opportunity to fight for a brighter, fairer future for this country. While the corporate media continues to repeat its mistakes, we have the power to take a stand. With our platform, we can hold MAGA and its enablers accountable, exposing their lies and pushing back against their dangerous agenda. The fight for justice and truth needs every voice—join us today and be a part of the movement that refuses to back down._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vpt4l-nks7yt-kyd76rh5/)

Trump, whose presidency reads like a horror story of corruption, cruelty, and chaos, continues to represent everything wrong with our democracy. Let’s take a walk down memory lane and revisit just a few of Trump’s greatest hits: 1\. January 6th: The Day Democracy Nearly Died The crown jewel of Trump’s treachery came on January 6, 2021. Fueled by lies about a “stolen election,” Trump incited a mob to storm the U.S. Capitol in a brazen attempt to overthrow our democracy. Lives were lost, countless others were traumatized, and America’s reputation as a beacon of freedom was left in tatters. 2\. Charlottesville’s “Fine People” When white supremacists terrorized Charlottesville, Trump didn’t condemn them—he called them “very fine people.” This wasn’t a dog whistle; it was a bullhorn for hate. Trump’s refusal to disavow bigotry gave cover to extremists, paving the way for an era of political violence we’re still grappling with today. 3\. Profiting off the Presidency Trump shredded the Constitution’s emoluments clause like a predator tearing apart prey. The presidency became his personal ATM, with his properties turned into bribe factories and his family cashing in at every opportunity. Make no mistake: his first term was a four-year grift. 4\. A Pandemic Fueled by Stupidity Trump’s mishandling of the COVID-19 pandemic was catastrophic. He downplayed the virus, mocked masks, and suggested injecting bleach as a cure. By the time he left office, over 400,000 Americans had died—40% of those deaths were preventable. His negligence wasn’t just incompetence; it was criminal. 5\. A Legacy of Hate and Division Trump’s presidency was defined by his open disdain for immigrants, people of color, and the LGBTQ+ community. From banning Muslims to separating children from their parents at the border, his policies were a masterclass in cruelty. His 2019 ban on transgender people in the military was a gut punch to equality, forcing brave service members to choose between their identity and their careers. 6\. Destroying the Environment Trump rolled back over 100 environmental regulations, opening the floodgates for corporate polluters to poison our air and water. He gutted protections for wetlands, endangered species, and vehicle emissions—all for the sake of profit. His environmental policies weren’t just shortsighted; they were an outright declaration of war on our planet. 7\. Corruption Every Step of the Way From hoarding classified documents at Mar-a-Lago to pressuring Georgia officials to “find” votes, Trump’s corruption knew no bounds. He wasn’t just unethical—he was criminal. His conviction on 40 felony counts for mishandling classified documents is just the tip of the iceberg. The Real Enemy: Corporate Media By glorifying Trump as Person of the Year, the corporate media sends a dangerous message: corruption, cruelty, and incompetence are worthy of celebration. This isn’t just a betrayal of journalistic integrity; it’s a betrayal of the American people. | | | | Thank you for your help on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team | | | | | ONE donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in EVERY major battleground. Maximize your impact this cycle → No Dem Left Behind PAC P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003 | You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to modify your or .

name: Special Election Alert [via Team Scalise]
subject: SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED FOR MIKE WALTZ’SSEAT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
What’s at stake: Our Republican Trifecta.

| |
---
| | | **ALERT: SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED FOR MIKE WALTZ 'S SEAT.**

Now that Mike Waltz was tapped to serve as President Trump's National Security Advisor, a Special Election has officially been announced in FL-06. And with Republicans holding onto the House Majority by thread - winning this seat has never been more important.

The primary for this race is around the corner so we have NO time left to spare.

_If we don't fight back now, we risk losing everything._

That's why we are calling for an EMERGENCY GRASSROOTS BLITZ to help fill Mike Waltz's seat with a TRUE America First Conservative. We need to keep our House Majority to make sure we see President Trump's America First Agenda through to the end.

---
**EMERGENCY GRASSROOTS BLITZ**
---
GOAL: **ONE MILLION DOLLARS**
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: **$25**
| | [DONATE NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znlg8is63ci3iij68i6s8ptril4vteucq4sdn0bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6apb4c3h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---

This Special Election could change EVERYTHING.

If we don't act fast, we risk losing our chance to restore election integrity, secure our borders, and ensure that Conservative voices are heard. And every single voice we lose in Congress makes it harder to move our agenda forward.

_**[So please will you step up and help House Republicans win when it matters most?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc8hn63tu02bgdk2p3b6krpgk8jrjmiv8ehd7d3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6apb4c3h2bs "So please will you step up and help House Republicans win when it matters most?")**_
| | [DONATE NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg2i2t2hdisb42pdlnb1tm7u1if99a7a9511n788_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6apb4c3h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---

Thank you,

House GOP
Via Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztd378eltc5ul6puna4hk79gkndmoe95iq3fbdvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6apb4c3h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdidqkvgndhftpr710e99rrr2rs1gc64p5m5hg30_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6apb4c3h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zks0rdpm0dpd7s5vc3irsvtj0hdc9trhaktpop00_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6apb4c3h2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f38732fe69b442378d3fff75a34d7b15&_e=Ukzck3a3zAnn7Vxe9fOtXkFFecJYLSyzAoG-c4Njx8rcimXWB2PEA_i9BIxx5KDQPHv8lQ6hfY9lCPpmDbkGxU4lUyfqC_dMoPcMstzVEF2mL3muOcGeaTw6ht8SjmeCjVajpMJ4eyg1liz-TzR4pHNUebJzQycwqjdE1Auau-71Bl5XHyZQU4hlI2YLrrd0QIVBwLyu5ApvkkYsG0gsT47wErfis7JBdxmyU_j5rD_Z7-zWdLYMShiBRtOwtVGau7xdTLInBEF58y7zgCdL_pYLnENwqjMb57kyuOlnq7V8N5Su1M7nibIbVqpnlmCrsLNBtT9_WXnCBoCDijrNj0nz3SD_ik0_zC9Io1Ow73tM4C5ZA8mGUeKpWHzfUaUH)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f38732fe69b442378d3fff75a34d7b15&_e=Ukzck3a3zAnn7Vxe9fOtXkFFecJYLSyzAoG-c4Njx8rcimXWB2PEA_i9BIxx5KDQaWOQY14Zcl3lcBE6Rxv8CmV4lD0_7RTLvXSvmXDmVb8YNqWC8j-8YzKEb5bUVhdEoriMdXbww1uhzljmIXt53pD1jLa_FiehFGJopIjnkBHbN3eoZra-7ritQ7wnA7_N2Qo4pII0sjRFwSMw5MQWYeKO9mwc6Cnp4JtZFSwZPe5t0qQj2k8532HGli5qhW6p0vq0_f1_feCkgPil3gbaQvsnvH2QzEXdsTPAFCpSFuPZyE1cMizhIiMpegHaPUswEz_Q5NIJKTnbXwBwfJjXbWwnTqcsWA33reOD3V61-bOCLmT4Z9FYhYdEiwpXkg2iJIhnoKA0AAqqyNFCG1aGBA%3D%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f38732fe69b442378d3fff75a34d7b15&_e=Ukzck3a3zAnn7Vxe9fOtXkFFecJYLSyzAoG-c4Njx8rcimXWB2PEA_i9BIxx5KDQaWOQY14Zcl3lcBE6Rxv8CmV4lD0_7RTLvXSvmXDmVb8YNqWC8j-8YzKEb5bUVhdEoriMdXbww1uhzljmIXt53pD1jLa_FiehFGJopIjnkBHbN3eoZra-7ritQ7wnA7_N2Qo4pII0sjRFwSMw5MQWYeKO9mwc6Cnp4JtZFSwZPe4JltjLBpYcAPGoXVFr_ek9WA3sHdb7GClv4GDlD7XQdEmK32LsTee_aDIZ47KjBo6TvNlq5_yVlw0DW3I_YgGWtpsiyXL0TdbV2DbAEqJ9eQ88dAHduK0rE_P0OJVVNT3FwY1AF_Py5EQ-Q8GenQDfWKR3LN00mKBo3jtzREJ9lw%3D%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=f38732fe69b442378d3fff75a34d7b15&_t=4n4FrZR99EzzcN5XlikbdZA86hiAlhAYxGCnxC8N4RJbQ8N1BbmcU5ADLzLLPbfHGKGks7hT9ZKfdloqpwUFsF-rr16I_5FMPbT_l6wmCMGKLuUIRp_UjDYflnkG40u9l4aL6mn5VALuf8SqlFzndAJVv5jq8-NOtLb04Ej84i0%3D)
