name: Center for American Liberty
subject: Warning: Radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner
body:
Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit...

| |
---
| | Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit...
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49fa0403e7242ccad5d1f9a4d4b2774&_e=FeuBzJh-i6T6bV-ZrmSuFlpqJj5hRWdqI9NxgQ3KVsnoxH1m62R0GWborEwr9Tclo2ZOScHmTqc5oS0hVLVQozcyCKPdungWxRT_kLKMTPO4cYjYY4_aBc4_v7WyVKwTSLNJfkYeQx3BZu-ElGrvftRTwlOeOE5Ibq0KB_3aglC6SuETdWeHi0ptFwdVmmbubnbPzreHN65tmyuC8ag3vI1KQ95EwrK489JHmHViM8wbkYaIptfCB4TSrfHH1OvLPtMuhUjzSu0nrLThXoA2UUV9nWgRnd5_xeID2GyODERM0slKsJ4Vm7Y1OzxPhqM24EY4k8FzqmlOobUdHTJ66pTkHN1VYridZClbn8SfJJjZVO66H2SdGil7XBWXvabnjW4fQnSgWaGimnDjMNGtJw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... That your 16-year-old daughter was forced to get undressed in a locker room with boys competing in girls' sports...That your 8-year-old son was being groomed at school to use new pronouns or a different name behind your back...Or that, God forbid, a surgeon amputated the healthy breasts of your 13-year-old niece in the name of "Transgender care." I know these images are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because **_God-fearing, faith-filled_ **people like you and me have a job to do today.You and I can't retreat into our homes and hope the Left's radicalism will pass us by. We've got to stand against it. **[**That's why I'm asking you to stand with me and the Center for American Liberty today -- before it's too late.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49fa0403e7242ccad5d1f9a4d4b2774&_e=FeuBzJh-i6T6bV-ZrmSuFlpqJj5hRWdqI9NxgQ3KVsnoxH1m62R0GWborEwr9Tclo2ZOScHmTqc5oS0hVLVQozcyCKPdungWxRT_kLKMTPO4cYjYY4_aBc4_v7WyVKwTSLNJfkYeQx3BZu-ElGrvftRTwlOeOE5Ibq0KB_3aglC6SuETdWeHi0ptFwdVmmbubnbPzreHN65tmyuC8ag3vI1KQ95EwrK489JHmHViM8wbkYaIptfCB4TSrfHH1OvL4RtAe8iCWRzIPUcSBv4IQrHMxuJB3mi72vljl1nD2lmkYRmTaXexkD8pP8ufqrhxcIICrjMYgbwc9UU1KOwiVal4qansBKK6r5dzPj69aAU70e4Nj3XFmbqc3ZmE-60xG5v8NxyLIt054252YRIJtA%3D%3D)** You and I both know **God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** **And we know that MILLIONS of Americans agree with us. We saw that when conservatives won a decisive victory on November 5th!** Poll after poll shows the Left's gender insanity was a HUGE motivating issue in the election -- and Americans across the country voted AGAINST radicals corrupting our children and our culture.But this fight is not over... **Because now the left will fight back with a vengeance, not in Washington, but in the courtroom!** No doubt huge left-wing legal advocacy groups like the **_ACLU_** and **_Southern Poverty Law Center_** and many others are preparing to jam through the left's agenda in the courts.And we must be ready to take on their lawfare, lies, and corruption.Because we simply can't let this transgender madness continue.Forcing Americans to play along with or affirm the delusion that one's sex can be changed is unconstitutional and dangerous.Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. But if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- with the Center for American Liberty.** **[Please stand against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount today -- before it's too late.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49fa0403e7242ccad5d1f9a4d4b2774&_e=FeuBzJh-i6T6bV-ZrmSuFlpqJj5hRWdqI9NxgQ3KVsnoxH1m62R0GWborEwr9Tclo2ZOScHmTqc5oS0hVLVQozcyCKPdungWxRT_kLKMTPO4cYjYY4_aBc4_v7WyVKwTSLNJfkYeQx3BZu-ElGrvftRTwlOeOE5Ibq0KB_3aglC6SuETdWeHi0ptFwdVmmbubnbPzreHN65tmyuC8ag3vI1KQ95EwrK489JHmHViM8wbkYaIptfCB4TSrfHH1OvLMABFiBSIsgUvX4xkBDel8yHLZVjpFHS7LZa4p5D7awObJKe_UGc_cOWsg0wUWZNEAmmIpYWgTDj6aR-dwT9gcAcQY3F7TRenHyVbRpLP7OLRRgMUGwzoeiBuCGKDkOq76ZZkmtA6agaChhBDp1qELA%3D%3D) ** Before I go on, let me introduce myself. **My name is Mark Trammell,** and I'm the**Executive Director** and **General Counsel** of the conservative **legal non-profit, Center for American Liberty.** But more than my day job as a lawyer, **I'm a** **husband, a father of two, and a devout Christian**. These roles are what drive my passion for the work we do at **the Center for American Liberty** \-- because protecting freedom isn't just a job to me, it's personal.We take the fight to the left in the courtroom -- and we protect your rights as a freedom loving, patriotic American. Especially when it comes to protecting children and families from the rampages of radical gender ideology. This is what conservatives are up against right now:
---
>> Parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed policies requiring schools to inform parents if teachers socially "transition" their child at school, and now the state of California is suing them so schools can keep secrets from parents.>> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I speak to conservatives around the country, I meet so many folks who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner."The good news is that right now, **_you still have a chance to stop the radical transgender movement_** before it pushes us further down this path. Because there is one group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone, and that is**the Center for American Liberty.****[**And your tax-deductible gift today will keep our critical legal work going.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49fa0403e7242ccad5d1f9a4d4b2774&_e=FeuBzJh-i6T6bV-ZrmSuFlpqJj5hRWdqI9NxgQ3KVsnoxH1m62R0GWborEwr9Tclo2ZOScHmTqc5oS0hVLVQozcyCKPdungWxRT_kLKMTPO4cYjYY4_aBc4_v7WyVKwTSLNJfkYeQx3BZu-ElGrvftRTwlOeOE5Ibq0KB_3aglC6SuETdWeHi0ptFwdVmmbubnbPzreHN65tmyuC8ag3vI1KQ95EwrK489JHmHViM8wbkYaIptfCB4TSrfHH1OvLt0_N_8c4_YC4gOUYLUiPTVYs_WOLvUHRWu3rKoQasPuhfIEWCBMPu-0BOZvEckZNY1xzTXIW97YaNWYWMrgojIyVZyNXK3bL-Mrs06MdpSN3pj_mOWDZqAvBqKKiw6w9FIbu7Skn6Lj_TLaSlKvBuw%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that's where this battle is won or lost.And we're attacking this evil from all sides with our comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**1\. We're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in so many of today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And we already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b49fa0403e7242ccad5d1f9a4d4b2774&_e=FeuBzJh-i6T6bV-ZrmSuFlpqJj5hRWdqI9NxgQ3KVsnoxH1m62R0GWborEwr9Tclo2ZOScHmTqc5oS0hVLVQozcyCKPdungWxRT_kLKMTPO4cYjYY4_aBc4_v7WyVKwTSLNJfkYeQx3BZu-ElGrvftRTwlOeOE5Ibq0KB_3aglC6SuETdWeHi0ptFwdVmmbubnbPzreHN65tmyuC8ag3vI1KQ95EwrK489JHmHViM8wbkYaIptfCB4TSrfHH1OvLSaasWk9uQIeEADbdS-axFjOq8GWJBf5b8-u4NLJg5I2kwCh85YvBdj2IAd6c2KxfxuxPl6dTdlo2NI_f70fXcJnd5jdkKMnIuGxbHhbcv5_LT6KOSvBRWeSJHczpcbwl5T13Usi8OdsmyxRYCKg0bQ%3D%3D) **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**2.****We're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts.Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In our landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. clean_body: Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... | | | | Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative,Bear with me, but imagine for a moment that your 80-year-old mother found herself in a changing room with a man wearing a woman's bathing suit... That your 16-year-old daughter was forced to get undressed in a locker room with boys competing in girls' sports...That your 8-year-old son was being groomed at school to use new pronouns or a different name behind your back...Or that, God forbid, a surgeon amputated the healthy breasts of your 13-year-old niece in the name of "Transgender care." I know these images are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today.You and I can't retreat into our homes and hope the Left's radicalism will pass us by. We've got to stand against it. You and I both know God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. And we know that MILLIONS of Americans agree with us. We saw that when conservatives won a decisive victory on November 5th! Poll after poll shows the Left's gender insanity was a HUGE motivating issue in the election -- and Americans across the country voted AGAINST radicals corrupting our children and our culture.But this fight is not over... Because now the left will fight back with a vengeance, not in Washington, but in the courtroom! No doubt huge left-wing legal advocacy groups like the ACLU and Southern Poverty Law Center and many others are preparing to jam through the left's agenda in the courts.And we must be ready to take on their lawfare, lies, and corruption.Because we simply can't let this transgender madness continue.Forcing Americans to play along with or affirm the delusion that one's sex can be changed is unconstitutional and dangerous.Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it. But if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- with the Center for American Liberty. Before I go on, let me introduce myself. My name is Mark Trammell, and I'm theExecutive Director and General Counsel of the conservative legal non-profit, Center for American Liberty. But more than my day job as a lawyer, I'm a husband, a father of two, and a devout Christian. These roles are what drive my passion for the work we do at the Center for American Liberty \-- because protecting freedom isn't just a job to me, it's personal.We take the fight to the left in the courtroom -- and we protect your rights as a freedom loving, patriotic American. Especially when it comes to protecting children and families from the rampages of radical gender ideology. This is what conservatives are up against right now: > Parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery. >> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed policies requiring schools to inform parents if teachers socially "transition" their child at school, and now the state of California is suing them so schools can keep secrets from parents.>> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I speak to conservatives around the country, I meet so many folks who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner."The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to stop the radical transgender movement before it pushes us further down this path. Because there is one group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone, and that isthe Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that's where this battle is won or lost.And we're attacking this evil from all sides with our comprehensive three-pronged approach. 1\. We're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in so many of today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And we already have one major win! you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! 2.We're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts.Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In our landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! 3.We'refighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is core to the Center for American Liberty's mission and we've notched plenty of victories in this space. And now we're fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandmother raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls take off their swimsuits.And she was the one punished you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.The bottom line: We must be prepared for this fight to move from Washington into the courts in the new year. So please make your gift as soon as possibleThank you for reading my email. | | God bless,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel | | | | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Swamp Digest
subject: They refuse to give up and so do we
body:
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=6v37dssxmfja78wwbj2ivka96sgyllh526tdzwh16lfc73wjqym5l3xcuje8yxmvilu3lwt7urpfukrujtrfx0ccfk5etknvu2b7itb9ruta45n3fn0q30wpswt2o7sfntg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h) [unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xql6qc10lt9b8l2d2veg759h6qyqhr7p8m7jw845i61jci904urvylh1zx7hl0trnmifx6xglqcse4lwv48d83zg59&__stmp=sodtsc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *

| [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=50e6dueo741ogm64pv6ort28o5v4kemg8y2kyvkb2x3dauv0dyrb86m2gs8br31esqg41r87eqbgne1t91hsy9tghc2a7qjyocspg15m0naafvvf1efjcx93w18gq907p6y46tavxfq2jj0fv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h "Headline") Fellow Supporter of Israel: Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of the hostages returned. Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of Jewish bloodshed as a result of the war started by barbarians on October 7, 2023. Syria has fallen and the so-called ceasefire has too. Our brave soldiers must fight to secure Israel’s borders, rid the region of emboldened attackers all over the Middle East, and adapt to the escalating threats from Syria, but Israel doesn’t have enough supplies to properly win this war. **[Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=50e6dueo741ogm64pv6ort28o5v4kemg8yb8lq6pqh81bmgu60m95rdicnkgsubsy462e7ihqsedgfehe679wtr5lsezjcrfs2ey0uihjquh72zusu2y6zqpgo4dolnerffwyl5hheezlh593&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h "Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?")** The bloody battlefields on our Northern and Southern borders, the attacks from Yemen, threats from Syria and direct attacks to and from the Head of the snake in Iran exact tremendous costs of life. We are in the fight for our lives against once again against enemies to whom our annihilation is their raison d'etre and the “ceasefire” appears unlikely to last. Yet, now, as in 1948, our State and our way of life are on the line... and our "Hagana," our IDF will not rest until our enemies get the message that we are not going anywhere. But they need bulletproof vests. They need Med kits. They need heavy winter coats and other emergency supplies that we simply don’t have the funds to provide them. **[That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=50e6dueo741ogm64pv6ort28o5v4kemg8znvo8q1d5onc35lwq4f2b9cy7altkp4dfu1v0xv0uhbphwmnmv2ubot37uza1k0vr4g70atgtp1wxd7h7nmybva4z0anbzput113sz85e791f9by&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h "That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.")** What Israel has overcome since October 7, 2023, has been nothing short of miraculous but the body count is rising. The brave IDF fighters require our support more than ever. They need supplies, clothes, food, and other necessities that we provide to them as Winter comes once again and the wars rage on. The latest developments in Syria increase the burden to the IDF and our security forces. **[Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=50e6dueo741ogm64pv6ort28o5v4kemg8zjfb2xc3rsxchtskdlolkdwu3r4vq0ejug09fm6ywkyijnagqghsj9e6k8zqps7ydt2pus3dw77k4gj9ivl2dakqjixmrkkx48tvk4wrdxg3dq52&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h "Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.")** Can they count on you today? May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation | | [SUPPORT AN ISRAELI SOLDIER!](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=50e6dueo741ogm64pv6ort28o5v4kemg9obnkz4dca7cyo8ek5jtkuwdjosc4enz9a4y1aar4i7i2hdg37l1tcm4oz4oz5a3ot25x94subcmlol5xk74j5wph1p7hagpuiudhpq7v3f89anj1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h "SUPPORT AN ISRAELI SOLDIER!")
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=50e6dueo741ogm64pv6ort28o5v4kemg9pnyntos2ko0z4wmove1he2xf86h67lnrpswetp2ckmfxjv8yomgrk7rspgopt6mrfqpdci2rewtoi2h0zrfp7ba5o94gr5kxvc8nghvf37fnysps&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h "Banner")
_The Genesis 123 Foundation is a US-based non-profit. Our mission is to build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. We have diverse leadership of Jews and Christians united toward this objective, and aspire to create an abundance of programs to achieve these goals. We are excited to play a role in this important mission and hope you will join us and be blessed._
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xql6qc10lt9b8l2d2veg759h6qyqhr7p8m7jw845i61jci904urvylh1zx7hl0trnmifx6xglqcse4lwv48d83zg59&__stmp=sodtsc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=u3vjvatbjz0f7bbdmc3nuo42j6a8kf4tsggnvkcu5odtg6qqvjb84xevypuz8wsa8yq8upcibuxv2gsztag9sh6n90y56l03x2xavm7l66x7yfbxjtg4ijrpx6z7fiqktgaj6ul36ztb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=j2511d2lg31bdz55i7bkn2mmslf3jcnqug2lh5om5da9nhuixaj2arwocjldnnkob41qtm5pfkdpk7oyxrgtnteiqhwbk6u52l4f67ncqvt8lenvfn4g9rwgrbv64sapr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodtsc&__onlt=h)

name: Special Election Alert [via Team Scalise]
subject: SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED FOR MIKE WALTZ’SSEAT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
What’s at stake: Our Republican Trifecta.

| |
---
| | | **ALERT: SPECIAL ELECTION ANNOUNCED FOR MIKE WALTZ 'S SEAT.**

Now that Mike Waltz was tapped to serve as President Trump's National Security Advisor, a Special Election has officially been announced in FL-06. And with Republicans holding onto the House Majority by thread - winning this seat has never been more important.

The primary for this race is around the corner so we have NO time left to spare.

_If we don't fight back now, we risk losing everything._

That's why we are calling for an EMERGENCY GRASSROOTS BLITZ to help fill Mike Waltz's seat with a TRUE America First Conservative. We need to keep our House Majority to make sure we see President Trump's America First Agenda through to the end.

---
**EMERGENCY GRASSROOTS BLITZ**
---
GOAL: **ONE MILLION DOLLARS**
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: **$25**
| | [DONATE NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0futce2fqjf74hltk77j75iua9ecpq6lgas4qn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6epj6c9h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---

This Special Election could change EVERYTHING.

If we don't act fast, we risk losing our chance to restore election integrity, secure our borders, and ensure that Conservative voices are heard. And every single voice we lose in Congress makes it harder to move our agenda forward.

_**[So please will you step up and help House Republicans win when it matters most?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z90qfctchvo5jak3i354rh0nic6fvp3496lsvof8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6epj6c9h2bs "So please will you step up and help House Republicans win when it matters most?")**_
| | [DONATE NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z87pmtmptp9qlr408a9k89sve55ie5c0c15gfhi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6epj6c9h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---

Thank you,

House GOP
Via Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfvdfocsc361kv4kln66gfrjjcr8u2105kds6hpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6epj6c9h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj6llaok1oj5c1ui3jj2n2lpk1l50poi49cv4p0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c1h6epj6c9h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

And with Republicans holding onto the House Majority by thread - winning this seat has never been more important. The primary for this race is around the corner so we have NO time left to spare. If we don't fight back now, we risk losing everything. That's why we are calling for an EMERGENCY GRASSROOTS BLITZ to help fill Mike Waltz's seat with a TRUE America First Conservative. We need to keep our House Majority to make sure we see President Trump's America First Agenda through to the end. EMERGENCY GRASSROOTS BLITZ GOAL: ONE MILLION DOLLARS SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $25 | | "DONATE NOW" This Special Election could change EVERYTHING. If we don't act fast, we risk losing our chance to restore election integrity, secure our borders, and ensure that Conservative voices are heard. And every single voice we lose in Congress makes it harder to move our agenda forward. "So please will you step up and help House Republicans win when it matters most?" | | "DONATE NOW" Thank you, House GOP Via Team Scalise | | | "Majority Leader Survey" A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link."** | | | "RESPOND NOW →" Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “Calls for Giuliani to be held in contempt of court”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
“He’s not going to be permitted to speak.”

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/cd1aabbaccd7c4d8/?utm_campaign=20241210&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has
ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday
to possibly _“HOLD ME IN CONTEMPT.”_

Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory,
and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former
lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.

During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, _I
will not be permitted to speak._

It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest
me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and
disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.

But I will never surrender this battle, _because FREEDOM IS ALWAYS
WORTH FIGHTING FOR._

They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but
so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!

WITH MY FINANCIAL ACCOUNTS NOW SEIZED, MY ONLY HOPE OF REMAINING IN
THIS BATTLE DEPENDS ON THE GENEROSITY OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still
dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give
right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY
GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND – SO THAT I CAN KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY RIGHTS
AND FREEDOM AGAINST THE LEFT’S VICIOUS WITCH HUNT.

name: American Patriot Daily
subject: Day 431 and Counting
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpionpspl53x19uc8lrwnhxops0qi9tbrd6xby4iakmja2f7to6dh3c4pkku9oalnt1bkujbrg9mzipg2hkbcm1hskwv1bv&__stmp=sodukg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vveaq7mfglcu1metj2gi3fgjpoezwfmz348fkjad4m36pu8qqbs03vahkwh3ihwshkainui653s3vtgu7dkr7xp3xfot3wv6ynqbj5zhhi2409mhrs0at5w26efjj9kltcwpxal5lyqqq92x66untr0ynfp95&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodukg&__onlt=h "Headline") Fellow Supporter of Israel: Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of the hostages returned. Syria has fallen, but we are still far from seeing the last of Jewish bloodshed as a result of the war started by barbarians on October 7, 2023. Syria has fallen and the so-called ceasefire has too. Our brave soldiers must fight to secure Israel’s borders, rid the region of emboldened attackers all over the Middle East, and adapt to the escalating threats from Syria, but Israel doesn’t have enough supplies to properly win this war. **[Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vveaq7mfglcu1metj2gi3fgjpoezwfmz36zxwlycwl2t8rulfu15w99ws0r0br7o0una8i1uiwrp4tlp6vyperq12uyd2t6d1lyj5hisyh8fbkjpx14agcmttwn7fjbi25eb326vhbsfcs6cj59cieri5vepq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodukg&__onlt=h "Can you support our IDF sons and daughters with just $36 as they are forced to continue fighting for the Survival of the Promised Land?")** The bloody battlefields on our Northern and Southern borders, the attacks from Yemen, threats from Syria and direct attacks to and from the Head of the snake in Iran exact tremendous costs of life. We are in the fight for our lives against once again against enemies to whom our annihilation is their raison d'etre and the “ceasefire” appears unlikely to last. Yet, now, as in 1948, our State and our way of life are on the line... and our "Hagana," our IDF will not rest until our enemies get the message that we are not going anywhere. But they need bulletproof vests. They need Med kits. They need heavy winter coats and other emergency supplies that we simply don’t have the funds to provide them. **[That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vveaq7mfglcu1metj2gi3fgjpoezwfmz392p71wc1a1e3ofx8myn0kg8jrkjtkg751ks696ha1qybu485nmop9qkv7j11pgntzh4qy51pgrvravhcy8b8n0ienetcxseyx10wrpjdev92zmia416o5h5lm7tj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodukg&__onlt=h "That’s why we’re asking you to support the Israel Emergency Fund with a gift of any amount to ensure the Israel can effectively prevent complete chaos in the Middle East.")** What Israel has overcome since October 7, 2023, has been nothing short of miraculous but the body count is rising. The brave IDF fighters require our support more than ever. They need supplies, clothes, food, and other necessities that we provide to them as Winter comes once again and the wars rage on. The latest developments in Syria increase the burden to the IDF and our security forces. **[Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vveaq7mfglcu1metj2gi3fgjpoezwfmz3nt4f3ubup12km46z37staqjqhugmut29xx83yo8rupimu9342kmk3rhlj7n0mthjo3nzopy4fy95q6pi7obxhdo339dz97b709o1exnzhxaqgr2r2exdvmrf0yxs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodukg&__onlt=h "Your gift of any amount - $100, $50, even $25 - can provide medical, tactical, and other support to our tireless IDF soldiers.")** Can they count on you today? May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation | | [SUPPORT AN ISRAELI SOLDIER!](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vveaq7mfglcu1metj2gi3fgjpoezwfmz3phir5sal20pf7qe1hexkplxin2d323jq5800ltx6lp5hupk2gy9ujsfsytwl75sp0nui2y6heekh3ei1esblstdpgd1vikxdrtzv5ebvka3d1v861w16ibbyd1b9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodukg&__onlt=h "SUPPORT AN ISRAELI SOLDIER!")
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vveaq7mfglcu1metj2gi3fgjpoezwfmz3sma17qarclaa4bpsapdr3wmpcyzhxceuagdkoyjksorsuuf1ym83dtcjndgk3f0eavc4egdydlawfrq7pwcp186ay8nswbungbl0v03s1cv38zpj0nsym4lstsf6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodukg&__onlt=h "Banner")
_The Genesis 123 Foundation is a US-based non-profit. Our mission is to build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. We have diverse leadership of Jews and Christians united toward this objective, and aspire to create an abundance of programs to achieve these goals. We are excited to play a role in this important mission and hope you will join us and be blessed._
[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=r17finc8qt2dt8oszmlc8w47v3wqw1tpv7q7fi7383kz9944jnqj7jnwum06csnx8cz64zpxys7nmoymrxoc9w1vckwchohuzxwdfhcv3r588fpidj6n6mxh9k1qhhnalr6e632cr9ldem6j1c1ee93lgcheugtjuv5is8n3afn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodukg&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=7ymfdu605bokz3zv6sabtodvk6cb6sry4d537afrrg2kub7qynu7p0a0gqla0ryxou8bg93qplkp5xiraof7f9qe7jzo6motk31r1ex8seu5zcwo2sqxsctsykhwk8oz3adybnb35bsorthi0rcz0vrb6shevxjz5mu5z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodukg&__onlt=h)

__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Condemns Senator Warren’s Dangerous Rhetoric After Murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zWGGwTOS9dNqnBBNzP4vdWlcqoeKmb14jjdO7P8vGa6vWA5ET_v0KjuXJ792ipZWu0TMyrguYIrZY_ZmTFurqy-z0_6ZhL1h_K_n4tta--JiWen1QJuQd8U3GD1Y44elA62WapfILlWK9io74_eB5Q==&c=paO8b3qscOUrz02lIlwkGvW-gofvFMykfF2-EKgbhaR2o3dhsezs8A==&ch=-djGXfM4TkakAcTv0WabYGSkEIdcpTqeRA13x0FTNAr78HOvgg1y9g==)
---
| MassGOP Condemns Senator Warren's Dangerous Rhetoric After Murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson
---
---
| Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party is deeply appalled by Senator Elizabeth Warren's recent statements, which appear to justify the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson. This tragic act, compounded by Senator Warren's inflammatory remarks, poses a grave threat to public discourse and the stability of our republic. It is critical to remember that Brian Thompson was not just a CEO but a father of two and a husband.
Senator Warren's comments--suggesting that this event should serve as a "warning" to others in the healthcare industry and asserting that "if you push people hard enough," they will "start to take matters into their own hands"--are both dangerous and dehumanizing. Such rhetoric has the potential to embolden further violence and create a chilling precedent for targeting individuals based on perceived grievances.
Massachusetts Republican Party Chair Amy Carnevale condemned Senator Warren's remarks, stating, "Senator Warren's words are beneath the dignity of the U.S. Senate. These types of statements risk creating a domino effect, emboldening others to commit similar acts against leaders they feel have wronged them. Her language is not only dangerous but also morally reprehensible. Senator Warren's inflammatory rhetoric feeds into the toxic public discourse and further fractures the psyche of the American public in pursuit of political points."
Chair Carnevale continued, "We all understand that differences of opinion on policy are natural, but these disagreements must never escalate to jeopardizing the personal safety of business or community leaders. The only acceptable course of action for Senator Warren is to issue a public apology to the Thompson family for her dehumanizing comments, as well as to the employees of UnitedHealthcare, the broader healthcare community, whose safety she has jeopardized, and the first responders who put their lives at risk to apprehend the murderer. Her words have sown division for years, and now is the time to de-escalate, not inflame. Senator Warren must reassess her approach and ask herself whether she can be proud of the example she is setting."
The Massachusetts Republican Party calls on Senator Warren to take responsibility for her remarks and to act decisively to repair the harm caused by her words. Apologies and a commitment to fostering constructive dialogue are essential to moving forward.

###
---
---

body:
Syria Changes Everything for Trump
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=32mjhzb4zq41uvsuf4pays7r9dz5w1fixo8xtzvwp925g97r0s9z5n6kds3em6b0ey580mqwjbt2p0tfrqdhfz6jfzofp1sbvrv9j7zrb0f1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodvcq&__onlt=h) [unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166j32nk1khhb17j841j9aamwo7dv4y1x2xhh021s2xitfbesccg33zo7sx8h049ktpcmxdqyap0zwremuydz1f&__stmp=sodvcq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=xepej4ub2oocdgptd35n3z8exswzux0zdiqvpn5ooad9vcudbwfvyaktxfecejays29lyipu434g53mu7qen3dlzxs1eunacmm1a7m40blq5z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodvcq&__onlt=h "Headline") Fellow Concerned American: Dynamics in the Middle East are fluid. In fact, they’re changing by the minute in Syria and world leaders are looking to President-Elect Trump for guidance as we saw in Paris! Rather than ensure he hits the ground running, D.C. insiders are doing all they can to stymie him; putting up dangerous obstacles in his path. Some are scared that Trump will restore America's might in this world. **Simply put, they don't want a strong and powerful America.** [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=xepej4ub2oocdgptd35n3z8exswzux0zdl38z70s3ij7w0l0w5bckry56to99hkpw6m7plcfyfn2bkulmqz22syizxcukox7dbh9y4rifrrjj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodvcq&__onlt=h "Blueprint for the Trump Administration")**But we do.** That's why we've released a _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ that safeguards American values, enhances national security, and strengthens global alliances. And we want to give this to you as a thank you for your support. **[If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=xepej4ub2oocdgptd35n3z8exswzux0ze1djj2hvh535wnr9qcxkm69ed4hdcg84ammr53455vtnmfdspqtf15m5bdr9qptb95ah0kdeihtbk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodvcq&__onlt=h "If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!")** Our mission at the Middle East Forum is simple – to promote American interests in the Middle East and protect Western values from Middle Eastern threats. Because we know that protecting our border and increasing deportations of those here illegally is tied directly to what’s happening in the Middle East. That’s why it’s also vital that Americans Deep Six the Deep State before they have a chance to deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East. **[And we would love to send you the _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=xepej4ub2oocdgptd35n3z8exswzux0ze4sz6kczyp93wxhu9nu5xijsnerm7etheqmyi6tsa9zvhaljsqovlfjqdj3lgqq6cxusrf3b0nvtj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodvcq&__onlt=h "And we would love to send you the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more.")** You have the chance to join us in restoring American might and glory both in the Middle East and throughout the world, all while keeping our homeland safe. **Our book,_Reasserting American Power in the Middle East_ , covers all of these issues and much more:**
* Establishing a “Commission on Islamism” to survey American Islamist movements and establish new approaches for disrupting and thwarting Islamist ideological networks.
* Enhancing Israel’s security by providing it with the material and diplomatic support necessary to defeat Iran’s proxies.
* Enforcing transparency in foreign funding of American universities and curtailing campus extremism.

**It’s time to Make America Safe Again, but that can’t happen unless we deep-six the deep state before they deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East.** **[Learn how and get your copy of the _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ today.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=xepej4ub2oocdgptd35n3z8exswzux0ze75osgxdpxr1wind3iqojzx3irkeacdyiumgz9ge6lfesw8qvq7mkuwzg2ecmrma81o1gzrx3dx94&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sodvcq&__onlt=h "Learn how and get your copy of the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today.")** Please use this Blueprint to increase your expertise and knowledge into what it will take to safeguard America’s might and glory. Keeping America Safe, Gregg Roman
Director and COO

name: Susanna Gibson
subject: You may have heard of me…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
I was the victim of something that pretty much only happens to women... | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98568970/517089758/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241212heard_N_SG_90DO_14_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2MjM3MzcwLTkxYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JhsrlYQysTIZkVF0yASUwZT9b9Q6D6rMCA5XHaJ1nzw=)
---
Hi Peter,

Ahead of the holidays, I wanted to introduce myself. In a previous election cycle, Her Bold Move endorsed me while I was running for a State Delegate seat in Virginia. The polls showed I was on track to win a Republican-leaning district – **until my campaign was the target of a uniquely sexist attack.**

In the final weeks of my run for office, I found out I had been the target of nonconsensual pornography, nonconsensual distribution of intimate images, and severe image-based sexual abuse both online and in person.

In fact, the Republican Party of Virginia – yes, the _official state Republican party_ – sent out explicit photos of me to thousands of homes in my district. My neighbors’ homes.

**Here is a look at what I went through in the wake of these attacks:**

❌ I received hundreds of phone calls and social media messages that included threats of rape and death.

❌ My children had to have security stay with them at school for weeks.

❌ I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner.

❌ I had to leave the state to escape reporters and threatening strangers showing up at my house.

❌ I was unable to meet with voters for three weeks during the height of election season.

Male candidates do not experience this type of sexual harassment or abuse when they run for office. **But here’s the thing:_we need women to run for office._ Stories like mine are the reason many women don’t.**

I’m writing this email today to spread an important message to any woman considering a run for office: Her Bold Move is an amazing resource. I hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer.

**Her Bold Move stepped up when too many other organizations were afraid to publicly support me.** They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a _sexist attack_ reserved for _women candidates_. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. It’s clear their mission to fight misogyny shows up in their actions as an org – not just their words.

I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state.

[**That’s why I am reaching out today. I am so grateful for the work that Her Bold Move is doing to defend and empower women like me. Will you join me in supporting this important organization by pitching in $25 or more today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241212heard_N_SG_90DO_14_G_N_L1&amount=25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98568971/517089762/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241212heard_N_SG_90DO_14_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2MjM3MzcwLTkxYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JhsrlYQysTIZkVF0yASUwZT9b9Q6D6rMCA5XHaJ1nzw=)

clean_body: I was the victim of something that pretty much only happens to women... | | | | | = Hi Peter, Ahead of the holidays, I wanted to introduce myself. In a previous election cycle, Her Bold Move endorsed me while I was running for a State Delegate seat in Virginia. The polls showed I was on track to win a Republican-leaning district – until my campaign was the target of a uniquely sexist attack. In the final weeks of my run for office, I found out I had been the target of nonconsensual pornography, nonconsensual distribution of intimate images, and severe image-based sexual abuse both online and in person. In fact, the Republican Party of Virginia – yes, the official state Republican party – sent out explicit photos of me to thousands of homes in my district. My neighbors’ homes. Here is a look at what I went through in the wake of these attacks: ❌ I received hundreds of phone calls and social media messages that included threats of rape and death. ❌ My children had to have security stay with them at school for weeks. ❌ I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner. ❌ I had to leave the state to escape reporters and threatening strangers showing up at my house. ❌ I was unable to meet with voters for three weeks during the height of election season. Male candidates do not experience this type of sexual harassment or abuse when they run for office. But here’s the thing:we need women to run for office. Stories like mine are the reason many women don’t. I’m writing this email today to spread an important message to any woman considering a run for office: Her Bold Move is an amazing resource. I hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer. Her Bold Move stepped up when too many other organizations were afraid to publicly support me. They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a sexist attack reserved for women candidates. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. It’s clear their mission to fight misogyny shows up in their actions as an org – not just their words. I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Running for office as a woman can be dangerous and scary. The political landscape is a safer and more supportive place for women with Her Bold Move at the forefront. Thank you, Susanna Gibson | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures. Support this work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d530e2b3f4ce46c983016d464e3cb665&_e=oZqmLygw24Zlq94b7pvo-zdbf_IWUWZXa1qn4ZGkvh8zYHB4Me8uWKrgSNOCLa8qgakGRH1WmuU83RCP-x5qs2bdTpqbtFqLUF4_2Ti_C7EEOw0knkP-9cAWwMZwog8sES6Xh_4toAF_0E1i__1IGcZukMneZuHfseDgCFOlg5LAZEKYiL_sl3_uKowTHCEolluDJKRu6Ttzjtc1gErHNzWPQz1ybxg7W3FJUJ5nymRCIP7dM8h7YlOQgyY-537vU3O1qmCYZmKB11_--xVTxGyPQK3osx7SuqkuunB6_gLhvwZWgFU4JFm6Hl0OYHPJKMrsuWfka7Fl03Uo8itCtQBLQ099cCYyZ0NLPqsC5Co%3D)

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount >>>](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d530e2b3f4ce46c983016d464e3cb665&_e=oZqmLygw24Zlq94b7pvo-zdbf_IWUWZXa1qn4ZGkvh8zYHB4Me8uWKrgSNOCLa8qgakGRH1WmuU83RCP-x5qs2bdTpqbtFqLUF4_2Ti_C7EEOw0knkP-9cAWwMZwog8sES6Xh_4toAF_0E1i__1IGZMQBWKXpDXrWlYz_iuVTsV9LD1KnwVazeBbmXaj_KtwA5E7gyYVQqyf5kiPyCk9EjFKvMREauJaaJqbZe4yCUthEOdXSE25-chj8Ftiv508vFkZQhxKrLxHtlc7r_lumLroTmQBbACaPz4wT427qAu_FDWXfPLEz1Y0RQeKki8hi_1gFmoexQuG3OoLal872jKaPwdVL8bZY-qSxr506ik%3D)**

Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

subject: Here is how we fight back...

body:
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🛑**There’s no sugarcoating it: Our party faced major setbacks on Election Day. But if you want to keep fighting for our democracy, our rights, our freedoms, and our future, please keep reading.** 👇
---
When Trump won in 2016, Democrats controlled just 29 chambers. Now, thanks to the work of the DLCC and the support of our grassroots donors, Democrats control nearly 40 state legislative chambers.

Without Congress, these majorities will provide a much-needed check to oppose the worst of the incoming administration.

**Expanding Democratic power in statehouses across the country is the best way to counteract the damage of a second Trump presidency.**
---
We’re committed to building our largest membership team in DLCC history to fight back against the dangerous extremism of Trump and his allies.

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we need you on this team standing alongside us.

Donations from our members each year directly fuel our work to:

✅ Compete in majority-making special elections
✅ Chip away at Republican supermajorities
✅ Identify and flip vulnerable GOP-held seats
_And so much more..._
---
[Will you chip in a gift of $10 right now to claim your 2025 membership, join our people-powered movement, and stand up to Republican extremism? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKJxbSIpjzRJ5RcvAU8c-NWA0U_30A0ACWlgmYtsOUjV20asyUKvIesb8ZHiVu6fIx_rwAiePEQQIlHF2NTkIUuA-Barb1ZI_36VY92hzhUOtofCgLbDxI4vmw2tHGJS1ClBR9AyZ9EFS5NGmC4S3LDPsu2Jo8rNbM8yoQ2HANtyBnYjK-965yHeC7yZ5kbZXa8PrmMPwZM-0bS0xGgkLVoISH9W8GnKvS8dg80O2MCOdug9vHd0z_4sLY8VeFDKh4-QbW9WEh-PQahR9hc0c1sZIYVM8PrhbpmREkGiN9a9VsRFIwE7jk_LTaYZE6PPR7nvWDiVkO9yGnLNlepuBxoBqAL6KlgQ7Ey3PyyYUQHJ5Wmgnd4HGA6mvuYqEXSI6j/4c8/ERMTG1jYRPiqbfWaxXw2hQ/h0/h001.4q414PoPDzqBvmDZq_n8wdJLFaz_9Pxxf6uqd9H6F6A)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: WHY Women’s Rights Are Under Attack
body:
This is our opportunity
| Friend, Donald Trump’s victory brings renewed hope for conservative values. A renewed chance to set things right.
But the work is far from over. As a matter of fact, **it's just begun.** The radical left is determined to undermine women’s rights, and they still hold power all over our country, especially on college campuses. Consider this -- in recent years, males competing against women has led to female athletes who have lost out on opportunities, been exploited in changing rooms, and suffered injuries from male athletes posing as women on the opposing team. This isn't just an issue of wins and losses -- it’s about **respect** , **opportunity** , and **equality**. Now, consider this -- there is an entire political movement dedicated to cramming men into locker rooms with our daughters. Just sit with that for a second.
It is crucial that you and I stand firm against the forces that threaten our hard-fought gains. Women’s sports and opportunities are at risk, and must be protected.
At the Riley Gaines Center, **_my ambassadors and I are taking action_** to educate the public, advocate for women’s rights, and build a community of supporters. I’m asking for your help to expand our initiatives and reach even more individuals who share this vision.
Before the end of the year, I need to raise $300,000 to fully fund our Ambassador program. [Please consider a generous contribution now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eef6181fb805492e8103ad07a4f751c0&_e=kf4T4Ni6P6vG19qxQFPj8yMx3X3KW87q9s5Yv71qBwzY3B0L6D2f-r25ipTHaSQVklVUGNpv4-XyA-Z48HfbX403hAPCNnxIo-61lkKidXYbkw5GwPJClFCQtnL4Z0B99zOe7F0yMPXEOvOFaQdizWvGYVH7AaDcFCybOxPRU5eoKlYZu5g8ZEZht2rz0G05oce0Zca-POvhbDsKMFyHQi4q52Pdwlef9WeyT-qlOZhMKz9uWlk9Mu9fKwDLuddI7j7mOjmy7zsB-qheMas7gh-DnGnQvH_fZGAeI6yUPLCtMN8801mkw7tUntu4_NG32hUOMMuTXoKpPVC1-c2OAkVc3rEBA8VcmLI7Gn6u9ucu-H_y1LImqqVDAYUP3zji) Stand with us today to defend our rights and ensure a fair playing field for all women. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute P.S. - Your contribution today can have a profound impact. [With every dollar you give,](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=eef6181fb805492e8103ad07a4f751c0&_e=kf4T4Ni6P6vG19qxQFPj8yMx3X3KW87q9s5Yv71qBwzY3B0L6D2f-r25ipTHaSQVklVUGNpv4-XyA-Z48HfbX403hAPCNnxIo-61lkKidXYbkw5GwPJClFCQtnL4Z0B99zOe7F0yMPXEOvOFaQdizWvGYVH7AaDcFCybOxPRU5eoKlYZu5g8ZEZht2rz0G05oce0Zca-POvhbDsKMFyHQi4q52Pdwlef9WeyT-qlOZgnTkw2IPFnm8JuFR0PiLnBRKDqwW2vwTmD07sXjkfPbf53wKYe3P92uIXdlacER-XxBHvk2cVX_GCjbKbaN_ROmzRbdeWgn-BtvUy2k7u0YMwuXAcYkxUfN4lu7Gr3kK5wupQOIyLY5G6fKy84-KHC) my ambassadors and I can continue to fight back and ensure that women’s voices are heard loud and clear.

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Which generation is more open about talking money?
body:
| Hi Peter, Are you an open or closed book when it comes to money? Believe it or not, but your answer could give away your age. That's because some generations are more willing to talk money than others.1 In fact, millennials and Gen Zers tend to be more open to money talks than Gen Xers and Boomers.1 Whether or not that's a sign of the times, the "closed-book" mindset can be a trap.1
---
|
---
[**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/PQqOt4jbgf8vBwNUqPb88S1ldNL?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) The truth is money can be one of the most sensitive topics to talk about, even with the people we love and trust the most.1 That doesn't mean we shouldn't discuss it — or that talking about money has to be punishing, scary, or shameful. If you know how to approach the conversation, keeping it going can be a whole lot easier. [**Want to see some effective ways to start talking about money? Click here.**](https://financeinsights.net/PQqOt4jbgf8vBwNUqPb88S1ldNL?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IjJReE50REpyNUlBWU44OCIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. What do you consider bragging when it comes to money? In your opinion, is there a respectful way to ask someone how much money they make or their net worth? Even if it's family? Hit "reply" and share your answer. I look forward to hearing your thoughts.
---
Sources 1\. [https://www.nasdaq.com/articles/new-study-shows-majority-of-americans-are-uncomfortable-talking-about-finances](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cubmFzZGFxLmNvbVwvYXJ0aWNsZXNcL25ldy1zdHVkeS1zaG93cy1tYWpvcml0eS1vZi1hbWVyaWNhbnMtYXJlLXVuY29tZm9ydGFibGUtdGFsa2luZy1hYm91dC1maW5hbmNlcyIsImhhc2giOiIyUXhOdERKcjVJQVlOODgiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)
---

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Thank Sweeney for the gas tax hike
body:
Peter, You can expect to pay more for gas starting January 1, 2025. Talk about a great way to ring in the new year...not. Tha
|
---
| Peter, You can expect to pay more for gas starting January 1, 2025. Talk about a great way to ring in the new year...not. That’s right. A 2.6 cent gas tax hike is headed our way in just a few weeks. Because we aren’t already taxed out of our minds! There is plenty of thanks to go around for this holiday gift. But it starts where you may not expect: former Senate President (and current candidate for Governor) Steve Sweeney. Yep, that’s right. Mr. “I suddenly hate tax increases now because it’s politically necessary” Sweeney. Same one. You see, back in 2016, he championed and pushed New Jersey’s first gas tax hike in decades. A 23-cent per gallon increase. The stated purpose of raising our gas tax? Infrastructure. Roads. Bridges. Transit projects. Fast forward to 2024 and our roads and transit system couldn’t get much worse. It’s something we’ve sadly become used to in New Jersey – getting taxed at premium levels and getting subpar returns.
---
| | [Enough of the LUNACY! Join the Common Sense Club today >>](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/a0e1709d7acee30c9b7041fbc53f164e/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnKXFtQ_wFhEhmoeoc9g65JL7wTpGJv731opOBcGcZp55hnd6INSFpqSEGG505zyCABwKaSVqWhlNhXhO-WwaRmEAtdSXjTOthbj_uvwBxnbEF9MAqLPokf1uuUqTfHPMkjz1pC2cv_GnZ84_nvV2mWQwDD_FqCStr97dQEyuxTFRKX0qOrja8xWRbWLGhFHK6AZ9ibo9TYw7M4XqhK6ppGXeVFiLuny_IcXu5RsersxmYw==)
---
| Fast forward to today’s increase and we’re still being promised transportation improvements. You can thank Governor Murphy and Assembly and Senate Democrats (it was a party-line vote). And it’s not just increasing this year. Nope. The tax is set up to continue increasing **until 2029.** But don’t expect our roads or transit system to actually improve over the next five years. Failing government projects don’t improve by throwing more money at them. Just look at all New Jersey’s government departments – starting with the Department of Education... But that’s a topic for another day. 2025 can’t come fast enough. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/34af396cfd0bae7228f0e50c108f0304/eJyNkE2LwkAMhv9Lzp0tTlcPvYmIlKoH0bOMbdYObTPDTKpW6X93_MDTLizklDx5XpIbMJIizkpI4cJXKROIwGGhrUbimSFWxXMqx9-jZBRBo6leONNZSG-_Ln-ARzuRk0kE3FsMyHYzneXZerFfZus8kFa5kPFfj_x45qtptoRh-FOMreb5Kbg9pOw6fFxU6nAV71wT-IrZ-jSOC9O2hjyGKpru8GXcMeZKUS38GZGwFz_GCa5QHJUXrC6i0jXGIUFZi1S-35Nj_8oZ7rUpbw0=)
---
| Did you catch our previous email? If not, you can read it here now: We know (by “we,” I mean common sense New Jerseyans, not Hollywood, coastal elites or the mainstream media) that woke extremism is one major reason the Left lost big last Tuesday night. Taxpayer funding of sex-change surgeries for prison inmates. Pushing a sexual agenda on kindergartners. Biological men beating up women in athletics. It’s this type of woke extremism that so many common sense New Jerseyans rejected on Tuesday when Trump got closer to winning New Jersey than any Republican since 1992. Why? Because common sense is that a criminal’s gender transition (or really anyone’s) shouldn’t be the financial responsibility of the taxpayer. Common sense is that children should be children and that indoctrinating them with sexually explicit materials is abusive behavior. And that women shouldn’t be losing medals and scholarships to biological men – who were usually mediocre athletes at best before deciding to compete against women. That’s the “patriarchy” the Left should be worried about. So as we look to 2025 and saving New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy in offices from top to bottom, have candidates on the Left learned anything? Will they be moving from wokism towards common sense to, if nothing else, save their political rears? If you look at gubernatorial candidate Sean Spiller, it’s clear they won’t. Sean Spiller, the President of the New Jersey Education Association (NJEA) has been the center of some controversy for funneling NJEA resources (i.e., teacher dues) to his political campaign. But that’s just the beginning. A few days ago, “Drag Queen Entertainment” posted this video of their presence and “Banned Book Story Time” at... the NJEA Convention. This is on top of convention calls for “queering the curriculum.” The convention theme – “Learning. Equity. Justice.” should have told us all we needed to know. The message at this convention for New Jersey educators? Pushing a sexual agenda on children is not only welcomed, but encouraged. This is grooming, plain and simple. And NJ educators shouldn’t have this agenda forced on them either, especially at a time when our students are struggling and they need to be focused on core academic subjects. This is all going on under President Spiller’s lead and it has his fingerprints all over it. He has all but said he’s running to force his NJEA agenda on the entire state of New Jersey. And let’s just call this like it is – crazy, and dangerous. If the commentary from media elites and leftist insiders is any indicator, Spiller won’t be alone in continuing to push a woke agenda. But unfortunately for them, my hunch is that common sense New Jerseyans aren’t going to take it in 2025 either. So what do we do? It’s simple. 1) Identify more members of the Common Sense Majority. 2) Recruit common sense candidates for the ballot at every level. 3) Get the Common Sense Majority out to vote in the Primary and the General. It might be a simple strategy, but it’s not going to be easy. We need all of us working together to grab back that megaphone and save our state. Here at the Common Sense Club, we want you to feel like this is your home. The place where you aren’t alone in saying “that’s nuts!” and the place where you can do something about the lunacy you see around you. So as you celebrate, make plans to get back in the fight with us because 2025 is just around the corner... Let’s go, Common Sense friends! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/24209006/8f1ba3f90449f2e4) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

#
Hi Peter,, it's Dick.
When the White House and Senate fell to MAGA Republicans in 2016, Democrats got to work. And I know firsthand the fight we had in defending our democracy and rights.
I'm not going to lie: **These next four years and the days ahead of us won't be easy.**
We're already taking a stand against Trump's mass deportation plan and his extremist agenda. That's why our fight is more important than ever – and supporters like you can shift our momentum.
As Senate Democratic Whip, I know that early investments are critical so Democrats have the resources they need to take a stand against Republicans and begin the effort to take back our Senate majority.
**This is why I need your help. Believe it or not, 2026 elections have already started and we can't afford to waste any time licking our wounds. We have to continue fighting for every inch and that means building our momentum now. **
[**Can you make a contribution of $5 or more to support Democrats and take back our Senate majority in 2026?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98581655/517129779/1907121472?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.12_Fight_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QzOGRlNy05Y2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z3QCfNQh6ST5oxoSpf_Tsoa__EtAAiZN83OEw2UFtxg=)

If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click Hi Peter,, it's Dick. When the White House and Senate fell to MAGA Republicans in 2016, Democrats got to work. And I know firsthand the fight we had in defending our democracy and rights. I'm not going to lie: These next four years and the days ahead of us won't be easy. We're already taking a stand against Trump's mass deportation plan and his extremist agenda. That's why our fight is more important than ever – and supporters like you can shift our momentum. As Senate Democratic Whip, I know that early investments are critical so Democrats have the resources they need to take a stand against Republicans and begin the effort to take back our Senate majority. This is why I need your help. Believe it or not, 2026 elections have already started and we can't afford to waste any time licking our wounds. [Before we go on, donate $10 RIGHT NOW to help Sen. Durbin and Senate Democrats to finish the job they started.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb20940a9-3575-4a12-b6da-6236f0335afb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | | Over the last four years, Democrats have confirmed over 220 judges to the bench. These nominees under the Biden-Harris administration are some of the best we’ve had – they look more like America and understand what the American experience truly is. But their work is not done. With Trump calling on Republican senators to “Show Up and Hold the Line” by not confirming any more judges before his inauguration, we need to confirm every last judge before the 118th Congress is adjourned. [So please Peter, rush any amount to ensure that Democrats finish the job they started by confirming the remaining judicial nominees.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5075a957-9892-4522-ac9f-52e06b1d3c45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a27f401-8b14-4e3a-ba3f-4c08f4b35385/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

The general didn't know how to respond once his remarks were out in the open for all Americans to hear...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5932ad8e-652d-4629-a317-6cba0a616fde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"Duty, honor, respect. You talked about that in your opening statement?" Kennedy asked the general.
"Yes sir," Manner answered.
_**["You went on CNN, I want to read you what you said,"](https://substack.com/redirect/5932ad8e-652d-4629-a317-6cba0a616fde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ Kennedy began. "President Trump is not like any sane leader. I'm very proud of General Milley for saying that PResident Trump is a total fascist to Bob Woodward,... The challenge is because most MAGA republicans don't understand what fascism is. The reality is that they are infact fascist themselves."
"Did I read that accurately?" Kennedy asked.
"I believe so, yes," Manner admitted.
Kennedy then began to DRAG this guy through the mud. _**[Watch what happens next below:](https://substack.com/redirect/5932ad8e-652d-4629-a317-6cba0a616fde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

# Can Banks Really Take Your Money Without Your Consent?
_The Legal Loophole That Puts Your Savings at Risk_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b33534b6-de91-463a-947b-04ff5c28361f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Imagine waking up one day to find [your bank account drained](https://substack.com/redirect/b33534b6-de91-463a-947b-04ff5c28361f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--not by scammers, but by the bank itself. It may sound like fiction, but under certain laws, financial institutions can legally seize your deposits.
In fact, two banks failed in 2024 and FDIC identified 63 banks with more than half a trillion dollars in unrealized losses.
As the economic landscape grows more unstable, banks are quietly preparing for the next wave of financial uncertainty, leaving your money vulnerable. _**[[Full Story]](https://substack.com/redirect/b33534b6-de91-463a-947b-04ff5c28361f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Will you endorse the GIFFORDS mission?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The fight ahead won’t be easy, but when we work together, we have the collective power to defend the gun safety progress we’ve made together.
#

Hi team, we’ll be honest:
Donald Trump, his MAGA cronies, and their gun lobby enablers are going to be tough adversaries for our gun violence prevention movement next year and beyond. But we’ve confronted significant challenges before. We know that with your help, we can take on new challenges together.
As we prepare for the important work ahead, we’re asking you to endorse GIFFORDS’ mission to end gun violence. The fight ahead won’t be easy, but when we work together, we have the collective power to defend the gun safety progress we’ve made together.
[**If you’re with us in this fight, will you add your name today to endorse our mission to save lives from gun violence? It’s a simple act, but when everyone adds their name, it shows that our movement has the strength to take on the gun lobby and elect gun safety champions in 2024.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_endorse_dec2024/?source=em241212-1-30&refcode2=9608.3935704.u4FbG6&akid=9608%2E3935704%2Eu4FbG6)
**[ADD MY NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_endorse_dec2024/?source=em241212-1-30&refcode2=9608.3935704.u4FbG6&akid=9608%2E3935704%2Eu4FbG6)**
We could not do our work without your support. Thanks so much for standing with us in the fight to end gun violence.
Onward,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=9608%2E3935704%2Eu4FbG6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
