name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: We Have Now Begun the 'Resolution' of this Fourth Turning
body:
| | | | |
---
| \-- Reporting from the Political Front --
---
---
| | December 12, 2024
For the past decade and more, many activist patriots, history buffs and others have sensed that the country was in more than just choppy political waters, and in fact was in an historic crisis. I believe we are right now passing thru a gate of history. My assessment appears below and as an article in today's [Connecticut Centinal](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xVQzayfkU6sRE9s168zA5JNTSemIRJ1O4oLUKCVvyjZnQRST3yUuFFydCf36MgJU952FedKDDQpH8tatEbe7giDvAoLaZZxYcmJbIn0kUmPGQMhVUsUkdy7w7qqCU3WW4KWViQMyE-xAfcWUYDqWduVFq5C1OjyAxM3ZRyhViQEHLPS5mfN-X49xBYVXCYI3kdXFr6kSkt-xDzB0aRnhutj1NFgHU6VkGQ4S8tUtAVmyKTmozIHwfA==&c=LH47ch_LIzvTKXCicVfHAJD-LM_pQ-HzmqbJbcLe4owT_tS9kt81Bg==&ch=PgEVkSLNfL_UVEPO8_haP953fqAky7ibhpVhg7XJf0X-4B-XzCpYYw==).
We Have Now Begun the 'Resolution' of this Fourth Turning By Bob MacGuffie
Many of us have heard the term, Fourth Turning, referenced or discussed over the past decade or so. But the term was actually coined by two American demographers some 27 years ago. In their 1997 book, "The Fourth Turning" demographers William Strauss and Neil Howe viewed history through a generational lens. Their compelling account organizes Anglo-American history into seven repeating cycles starting in the fifteenth century. The authors make a compelling case that man's nature, as forged by generations, drives history through amazingly similar cycles by distinguishing four generations by the phase into which each was born. They use a Roman term ("saeculum") that basically covers a long human lifetime. As the generations are born, mature, age and pass, they give each saeculum a seasonal and cyclical quality. Noting many recurring patterns over the ages, their study and organization of history along these recurring cycles has informed the names they have applied to identify each of the phases: The High, The Awakening, The Unraveling, The Crisis. To fast forward to the current cycle, our last Fourth Turning Crisis was the Great Depression-WWII era. We've since gone through the 'High' of the 1950s, the 'Awakening' of the '60s-'70s, and the 'Unraveling' of the '80s-'90s. In our book, [The Seventh Crisis - Why Millennials Must Re-Establish Ordered Liberty, ](https://lk9rohfbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xVQzayfkU6sRE9s168zA5JNTSemIRJ1O4oLUKCVvyjZnQRST3yUuFLp8lA8ynYF95sx1GZA-DOBM5XID9zPyjtbx1__oidpM9SehHxCgxjvqxGfwt2ze5zvURvGrIiUPEA9GsOa8SIkl_X8YJNYUcdIQBTpVMFwo&c=LH47ch_LIzvTKXCicVfHAJD-LM_pQ-HzmqbJbcLe4owT_tS9kt81Bg==&ch=PgEVkSLNfL_UVEPO8_haP953fqAky7ibhpVhg7XJf0X-4B-XzCpYYw==) Antony Stark and I illustrated that America, and indeed many western societies, have entered a seventh such fourth-turning crisis at about the time of the 2008 financial crisis. As of 2009 we hadn't yet read the Fourth Turning book, but the spontaneous nationwide energy of the middle-America-founded tea party, signaled to us that the national reckoning we long felt would come, was indeed upon us. The organized American Left provided plenty of signals in the '60s and '70s that they were here to upend America's foundations. The Reagan era gave us hope that the Left may be vanquished. But, mis-directed and mis-managed national leadership through the Clinton and Bush years, resurrected the specter of a coming reckoning with the Left. As the Obama years wore on, characterized by intentionally stoked societal division and supreme cynicism from Obama and the Democrats, enough Americans recognized the rot in our political elite, that they turned to the outsider, Donald Trump in 2016. In the Biden years the Executive branch has been run by a cabal of committed Leftists, Marxists, and Collectivists of all stripes. The result has played out across America and most ominously across the globe. The destructive forces of the totalitarian international Left have ignited violent challenges to Western ideals in Europe, the Middle East, and East Asia. For those who cherish civilization, the result has been a titanic disaster - the destruction of cities and countries, and the death of millions of people. The hard-core Left are undoubtedly pleased... the Globalists who seek to solidify their rule over us, maybe not so much. President Trump's first term was distinguished by a resurgent economy at home, and no outbreak of war overseas. And it was marked by an articulate and stirring defense of Western Civilization Trump delivered in a speech in Poland. If not yet a lasting peace, he certainly left us a 'freezing-in-place' of the world's wanna-be conquerors. Against history's odds, he has again been elected to the presidency. But this term will prove to be vastly more consequential than the first. For the forces seeking America's decline or destruction have been largely exposed, as they conduct their rear-guard actions in the plain light of day. As President Trump enters the oval office this time, both his, and most of the American people's eyes are wide open to the threats and immensely consequential challenges ahead. President Trump's election marks the opening of the Resolution phase of this Fourth Turning. The resolution means things will be irreversibly different when this Turning concludes. The world of 1946 had a completely new ordering from that of 1932. America's unquestioned triumph in the war established it as a global hegemon, enjoying a richly deserved peace and prosperity, marked by a standard of living unmatched in the world. And its quantumly superior military, assured its place for decades to come. So too will the international ordering, and America's society and economy be markedly different when this Fourth Turning completes its resolution. A majority of the American electorate realize our economy has been mis-handled, and that our ruling political class has been deceiving us for their power and their benefactors' increasing wealth. And the 'woke' ideology is causing widespread upset and resentment throughout the culture. That majority also realizes we face a ruling Chinese Communist Party bent on becoming a global hegemon. Including Russia and Iran, indeed it does appear to clear-thinking Americans, that our enemies are circling. Indeed, many sober observers believe World War III has already begun: through cyber and economic warfare, and visibly and kinetically in Ukraine and the Middle East. The analogy is that WWII probably began in the mid-'30s, but didn't uncontrollably explode until Hitler's invasion of Poland in 1939. Today we may well be on a path to WWIII, unless the U.S. takes some adroit measures to avert such a catastrophe. Unfortunately, international affairs seem to be waxing toward a boiling point. How the U.S.'s international interests are handled will be determinative as to how this Fourth Turning resolves. But, on the domestic front, the wind direction has clearly reversed and is now blowing from the Right. Each day another corporation seems to announce it's dropping DEI training. And the media and tech executives are suddenly prone to make favorable references to, and seek meetings with, Donald Trump. But, judging from their antics after the 2020 election, we know they blow-with-the-wind and can only be relied upon until the next game-changing election. To assure a permanent resolution, it is up to the right-thinking employees of those companies to assure the new shift has staying power. Making these favorable developments permanent is not a spectator sport. Donald Trump is not going to get CRT out of your local school, nor the drag-queens out of your libraries. President Trump's win at the polls has shifted the prevailing winds and provided us valuable cover, but we each have to put our shoulders to the wheel and make it happen in our own spheres of influence. His election marks just the beginning of the Resolution - by no means its endpoint. One true critical wild card ever in play is the status of our economy. Regardless of any rosy appearances, our $36 trillion of national debt projects danger throughout every sector of the economy. Those dangers can be leveraged and capitalized upon by both our sovereign enemies, and operatives of the American Left within. The need to service that debt makes it a certainty that the economy can be brought to its knees or imploded through the debt markets. The willingness of our adversaries and enemies to trigger such an implosion will remain an unknown - because they will be continually evaluating the impact of such destructive moves on their nations and themselves. Most of us can do little to affect macro-economic developments - but they will hang like a sword-of-Damocles over the entire Resolution phase of this Fourth Turning. Great good fortune, and a mighty effort by many, has placed the ball again in our hands, but it's still up to the patriots of our nation, in all walks of life, to see that the good changes that are made have staying power beyond this incoming Administration. We expect that strong signals will be called at the national level, and we must be ready to animate them at the local level. If we're able to execute on the gameplan, the Resolution of this Fourth Turning will be a nation emergent from its nightmare, and reinvigorated and re-established back on the foundation of a great Constitutional Republic on which it was so brilliantly founded.
---

---
---
| In Liberty,
Bob MacGuffie bobmac@rightprinciples.com
---
| |
---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Quick Update!
body:
Your time is valuable, especially as we approach the holidays!

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Your time is valuable, especially as we approach the holidays!
But I want you to know that Judicial Watch is not taking a break...
...and right now we need your support.
**[Can I count on you to make a contribution today to help us stay on track?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71506&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71506&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Please let me explain...

As Washington gets ready for change, our work fighting for transparency and accountability is more important than ever!

* **We forced the release of records from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) revealing an extensive effort by government and non-government entities to monitor and censor social media posts on fraud during the 2020 election.**

These new, previously secret documents show that the Deep State worked full-time to censor and monitor Americans in collusion with left-wing interest groups and Big Tech. _We are urging the incoming Trump administration to launch a criminal probe into this assault on the First Amendment civil rights of Americans_!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71506&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

* **And we have won a victory in Georgia over stonewalling our investigations into how corrupt the Deep State efforts to prosecute Donald Trump were!**

Last week, a Superior Court in Fulton County entered an order granting a motion for default judgment against District Attorney Fani Willis in our lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. The court has ordered Willis to search and provide releasable documents to us, and to pay our attorney's fees.

We served Ms. Willis with this lawsuit in March. She has never filed a response to it, even though the law requires a response within 30 days after service.

_This is truly astonishing_! This is the first time in Judicial Watch's 30 years of experience that a government official has been found in default for not showing up in court to answer one of our open records lawsuits.

But we don't give up...and we will keep fighting for documents from Fani Willis for documents about collusion between her operation, the Biden administration and Nancy Pelosi's Congress on this unprecedented and thoroughly compromised "get-Trump" prosecution! Accountability demands nothing less!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71506&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We have never been more deeply involved in consequential legal battles, on fronts from fighting woke efforts to create unconstitutional programs that divide Americans based on race, to our essential work on behalf of preserving honest elections...

...and that is why I am so _[counting on you to help us now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71506&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_.

Because of the generous support of patriots across the country, Judicial Watch today is the largest and most effective government watchdog group in the nation. We're always fighting for you and the rule of law...and now we need your help!

Thank you for taking the time to consider my request for your support!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71506&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

clean_body: Your time is valuable, especially as we approach the holidays! | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Your time is valuable, especially as we approach the holidays! But I want you to know that Judicial Watch is not taking a break... ...and right now we need your support. | Please let me explain... As Washington gets ready for change, our work fighting for transparency and accountability is more important than ever! We forced the release of records from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) revealing an extensive effort by government and non-government entities to monitor and censor social media posts on fraud during the 2020 election. These new, previously secret documents show that the Deep State worked full-time to censor and monitor Americans in collusion with left-wing interest groups and Big Tech. We are urging the incoming Trump administration to launch a criminal probe into this assault on the First Amendment civil rights of Americans! And we have won a victory in Georgia over stonewalling our investigations into how corrupt the Deep State efforts to prosecute Donald Trump were! Last week, a Superior Court in Fulton County entered an order granting a motion for default judgment against District Attorney Fani Willis in our lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. The court has ordered Willis to search and provide releasable documents to us, and to pay our attorney's fees. We served Ms. Willis with this lawsuit in March. She has never filed a response to it, even though the law requires a response within 30 days after service. This is truly astonishing! This is the first time in Judicial Watch's 30 years of experience that a government official has been found in default for not showing up in court to answer one of our open records lawsuits. But we don't give up...and we will keep fighting for documents from Fani Willis for documents about collusion between her operation, the Biden administration and Nancy Pelosi's Congress on this unprecedented and thoroughly compromised "get-Trump" prosecution! Accountability demands nothing less! We have never been more deeply involved in consequential legal battles, on fronts from fighting woke efforts to create unconstitutional programs that divide Americans based on race, to our essential work on behalf of preserving honest elections... ...and that is why I am so . Because of the generous support of patriots across the country, Judicial Watch today is the largest and most effective government watchdog group in the nation. We're always fighting for you and the rule of law...and now we need your help! Thank you for taking the time to consider my request for your support! Sincerely, Thomas Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2024, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,**
I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%

name: Voter Action Project
subject: We need as many good reporters as we can get
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121224_1&amount=25]
Team,
We know Trump’s constant attacks on the free press won’t stop in his second term. The U.S. House already unanimously passed bipartisan protections for journalists. Now, the Senate must act before Trump is inaugurated.
The PRESS Act would protect journalists and the investigative reporting the public relies on to understand the inner workings of our government. With this legislation, government officials would not be able to force reporters to give up their sources or seize the phone and email records of journalists.
The New York Times Editorial Board said, “ Hostility toward the news media in the polarized politics of the day makes it more urgent than ever to ensure that reporters can continue to pursue their essential role as watchdogs over the government without the threat of court-ordered demands for their sources and information. The PRESS Act is needed now. "
The House passed the PRESS Act without any opposition. The Senate must act now and pass this legislation!
Add your name today: Pass the PRESS Act now to protect the free press! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] Team, We know Trump’s constant attacks on the free press won’t stop in his second term. The U.S. House already unanimously passed bipartisan protections for journalists. Now, the Senate must act before Trump is inaugurated. The PRESS Act would protect journalists and the investigative reporting the public relies on to understand the inner workings of our government. With this legislation, government officials would not be able to force reporters to give up their sources or seize the phone and email records of journalists. The New York Times Editorial Board said, “ Hostility toward the news media in the polarized politics of the day makes it more urgent than ever to ensure that reporters can continue to pursue their essential role as watchdogs over the government without the threat of court-ordered demands for their sources and information. The PRESS Act is needed now. " The House passed the PRESS Act without any opposition. The Senate must act now and pass this legislation! body:
Merry Christmas from Team Katrina!
| | | |
---
| | | Friend,
Just in time for Christmas, the [Katrina Pierson Campaign storefront](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas.) is live with bumper stickers, commemorative hats, sweatshirts, tote bags, and more, but we have a very urgent deadline.
---
[](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas.)
**Texas has a complete ban on fundraising beginning after December 14th. We will not be able to accept donations for over 6 months!**
**If you want to get anything from the storefront or contribute to our campaign, please[donate on our web form](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas.) or [storefront](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas.) before it’s too late!**
It is critical we raise the funds necessary to defeat the Democrats in 2026!
[Visit the Store](https://link.mail.katrinafortexas.)
|
---
| | **Katrina Pierson Visits the Texas Border**
---
I joined my state house colleagues at a press conference hosted by the Texas General Land Office and Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham, highlighting the critical steps Texas has taken to secure our border.
The Jocelyn initiative will build deportation facilities on Texas land starting day 1 of Trump’s presidency! Our Land Commissioner is ready to hand over the land, including a 1400-acre plot purchased in October, to President Trump so he can fulfill his deportation operation promise.
We were joined by the mother and grandmother of Jocelyn Nungaray, a 12-year-old who was brutally r*ped and k*lled in June at the hands of two illegal immigrants.
We stood in silence as the state of Texas installed a border wall panel in remembrance of Jocelyn.
|
---
| | **Congrats to John Ratcliffe**
---
Congratulations to my friend and constituent John Ratcliffe for his appointment as President Trump’s CIA Director! We are so proud of you.
|
---
| | **Katrina Pierson Speaks with Bowie County Patriots**
---
|
---
| | **Thank You For Your Support**
---
|
---
| | **Merry Christmas from Team Katrina!**
---
| | | God bless, Katrina
---

name: National GOP Census
subject: Participation needed from Your Area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We’re still in shock with what you did, Friend.

Thanks to your incredible support, President Trump ushered in the
biggest Republican victory in history.

The old GOP is gone. In its place is a new America First party with a
diverse coalition of patriots from every state in America.

That’s why we at NRSC HQ are now issuing a BRAND NEW National Party
Census that better reflects the historic shift in our Party’s
membership.

|
---
| **HELP IS ON THE WAY!**

The Cohen v Bergmann 2024 race has been selected for forensic review by the Ticktin Law Firm to be submitted to Attorney General Pam Bondi, FBI Director Kash Patel, and Assistant Attorney General of DOJ Civil Rights Division Harmeet Dhillon. Peter Ticktin was President Trump’s high school room mate in military school. His office was targeted, sanctioned, fined, and punished for helping President Trump during in his fight for election integrity. Yet, he is still fighting for justice and truth in America.

Peter Ticktin is working behind the scenes to protect President Trump’s new administration. His office was targeted, sanctioned, fined, and punished for helping President Trump during his fight for election integrity, and he is still fighting for justice and truth in America. I received the following letter from Peter Ticktin’s Law firm:
* * *
|
**NOTICE TO REPUBLICAN CANDIDATES \- The Ticktin Law Group**

\-------- Original message --------
From: Jason Sullivan <[JSullivan@legalbrains.com](mailto:JSullivan@legalbrains.com)>
Date: 12/9/24 11:34 AM (GMT-06:00)
To: Charlotte Bergmann <[charlotte@bergmannforCongress.com](mailto:charlotte@bergmannforCongress.com)>
Subject: NOTICE TO REPUBLICAN CANDIDATES - The Ticktin Law Group

Dear Charlotte Bergmann,
Are you a victim of the Left cheating you out of your win in the last election?

If so, you are going to want to talk with us.

We knew this was coming and have been preparing for it. Thank God we changed the Presidency, the Senate, and kept the House, but we also want to see you get to Washington, where you deserve to go.

As such, we have developed tools to use in conjunction with top-rated skip tracing programs to examine the voter rolls in the counties of your state. If there were illegal voters, we should be able to identify them and then work with your lawyers to provide a basis for challenging the incorrect results.

**We are a Florida law firm, and our lead attorney, Peter Ticktin, is a staunch supporter of his friend from New York Military Academy, President Donald J. Trump. He is the lead local counsel in the case of Trump v. Clinton, et al., which he filed.**

We are here to help. All you need to do is click the calendar button below and select an appointment that fits your schedule with Jason Sullivan, who will guide you through what needs to be done.

You will need to act now, as time is of the essence.

[Schedule Your Appointment Now](https://ElectBergmann.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4565687fe1f93d61fb32842&id=b31f94186e&e=9dd54a4530)

Regards,

Jason Sullivan
Forensic Investigation
---

* * *
After consulting with several people, I scheduled an interview with Jason Sullivan. My first inquiry was why did the Ticktin Law firm reach out to me? He informed me that my election loss was closer than I realized. A class action lawsuit is being formed because over 50% of U.S. House members have been defrauding the public trust and it needs to be exposed. They now know how the Democrats have been accomplishing this deceit.

I was initially skeptical of his assertion that Democrats begin by using ‘ballot cloning’ as a means to overwhelm the election commissioners. They create ballots with fake names, addresses, etc. and also clone overseas ballots as well.

As a member of the Tennessee Election Integrity Group, I recalled we had discussed that 19,000 new ballots were captured during the month of August and submitted to the Shelby County Election Commission in late September and early October, just before Early Voting, thus overwhelming the system as Jason Sullivan, Forensic investigator told me. They did not stop there. On day one of the November 5, 2024, General Election, 40,000 new ballots were submitted throughout Tennessee.

When I first ran against Steve Cohen, I visited his office for a town hall meeting and he embarrassed me in front of the constituency by very nastily saying that I can run against him AGAIN AND AGAIN AND AGAIN, but I will never win. Have his wins been due to the community’s love for him or is there something more sinister happening which can be revealed in 2025?

Peter, Do you think I should move forward with this law firm's class action lawsuit? If so, please respond to this email. Attorney Peter Ticktin will not only circulate the results in the media but is willing to take the results to the Supreme Court if necessary. He is tired of the Democrats escaping exposure and punishment for their dishonesty, and he is proud of his former classmate, Donald John Trump.

President Trump and his cabinet members are determined to get to the bottom of election fraud for the sake of our country. Let’s not be left out! Thank you for your response.

**THIS IS THE FORMATION OF A CLASS ACTION LAWSUIT.**

Sincerely,
**Charlotte**

body:
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. inspired a new movement sweeping the nation.

|
---
| | | | [**Thanks to your support, Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s message reached far and wide.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=1)

|

[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=2)
---
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=3)
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=4)
---
|
---
We Changed the Course of an Election
[NOW LET’S CLEAR THE PATH](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=5)
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. inspired a new movement sweeping the nation.
His campaign gave voice to millions of Americans ignored and ridiculed by mainstream media and politicians.
RFK Jr. elevated critical issues impacting your family’s health to the forefront of the national debate—issues like food safety, medical freedom, and natural health choices.
These efforts not only inspired millions but also shaped the outcome of the presidential election.
Take the “crunchy moms” featured in a recent _Wall Street Journal_ article. They rallied behind RFK Jr. because he boldly addressed their most pressing concerns, focusing on protecting their children’s well-being.
Key segments of our country, like the “crunchy moms,” not only rallied around RFK Jr.’s message but played a pivotal role in securing Donald Trump’s victory and advancing the Make America Healthy Again platform.
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=6)
Thanks to your support, his message reached far and wide, reshaping the political landscape. Kennedy’s endorsement of Donald Trump brought these urgent issues into the national spotlight. .
But this effort came with a significant challenge.
To ensure RFK Jr.’s safety and message reached every corner of the country, we relied heavily on private security – costing millions.
[**Now, with RFK Jr. preparing to lead the charge to “Make America Healthy Again,” we must ensure he enters this next phase with a clean slate – free from any debt that could divert focus from this mission.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=7)
[Donate Now](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=8)
**We can’t afford delays.** This debt must be resolved quickly to ensure RFK Jr. can begin this next chapter, fully focused on tackling big pharma, FDA overreach, and restoring trust in health and nutrition for every American.
[**Please don’t wait – our opportunity to settle this debt is now >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=9)
Thank you for standing with us in this pivotal moment. **We’re just getting started!**
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=10)
[**Donate now to retire the debt >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=11)
[Help Now](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=12)
|
---

[](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=qVvjbYZFPGk-dgj1f2bqfL0-YRfFzv-GdJQeEtD6DqI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=14) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=PJjXLMlymU0n-OTqjg_TpbAIaCRYmvQY1HDziCNjhltpQB6ASK6MFbMK1Me4mgvz&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=15) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=zX--vN7d1lLnyyIYg1HIv9smma2c8QOVOnWMyLk4yyI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=16) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=8i_UFb6nr4zPXnY0WZkWD67i3lfoHfR3YIz42qE4mBAHRv1c-d1rtD-NbXVnJVMz&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=17) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=Z_o1v5uRNRxRYZz5aguEakB2YYT3YdTbArbpHdZXt1SqN_UvyW6It3Eikxl9299S&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=18) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=6EQ6sUlCj-zytkS_cwzfZ4t1sgt_WFGzO2WU_Wl6NSz5R7TkzLPnM4yy7PyWFvTa3IEquugMhTQkNDFbFnqxSg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_12_24_nd1r&n=19)

body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,

subject: Jean Gannon In Her Own Words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Special Election Update
| | | | MY OPPONENT JEAN GANNON IN HER OWN WORDS
---
---
|
# How Deep is Jean Gannon's Support for President Donald J Trump?
---
| |
---
|
#

---
| |
---
|
#

---
| |
---
|
#

---
| Greetings!, I didn't just get on the band wagon for President Trump when there was no other choice.
While I'm thankful to know there are "Never Trumpers" like Nikki Haley, who finally got on board with President Trump when they saw the writing on the wall, I think it's important in the race to remember who's been with President Trump through thick and thin.
There's a reason the people called me "Trump in Heels."
Sincerely,
---
|
---
Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023

Texas recently passed landmark legislation that brings the Bible and patriotic American history back to public school curricula.
Our guest on the Moms for America Podcast is Julie Pickren, member of the Texas State Board of Education, who helped make this
incredible success possible. The Texas Bluebonnet curriculum will teach important history, raise learning standards, and make kids
competitive with other nations once again. Like, share and subscribe.

Four Keys to Bringing Back American Patriotism in 2025

There's something in the air. It's change – but not the scary kind we've experienced since 2020. This has the hallmarks of a great
rebirth of American greatness. With the new Trump administration preparing for office with a mandate to bring sweeping change to
the economy, trade, the border, education, and government waste, most of us cannot wait! With it, we sense a shift in the culture.

Patriotism is trending, and we want to share four ways you can celebrate our nation and future – stirring up American spirit in
your home and community.

clean_body: Can you feel it? Change is in the air! And it is good change. We're talking about the ways people are bringing back patriotism coming into 2025. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] December 12, 2024 • Newsletter Bringing Patriotism and Biblical Values back to American Classrooms Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Texas recently passed landmark legislation that brings the Bible and patriotic American history back to public school curricula. Our guest on the Moms for America Podcast is Julie Pickren, member of the Texas State Board of Education, who helped make this incredible success possible. The Texas Bluebonnet curriculum will teach important history, raise learning standards, and make kids competitive with other nations once again. Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] Four Keys to Bringing Back American Patriotism in 2025 There's something in the air. It's change – but not the scary kind we've experienced since 2020. This has the hallmarks of a great rebirth of American greatness. With the new Trump administration preparing for office with a mandate to bring sweeping change to the economy, trade, the border, education, and government waste, most of us cannot wait! With it, we sense a shift in the culture. Patriotism is trending, and we want to share four ways you can celebrate our nation and future – stirring up American spirit in your home and community. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2024 Moms for America, All rights reserved. name: Governor-elect Mike Braun & Maureen Braun
subject: Join us for Indiana's 2025 Inaugural Celebration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
Dear Friend, Maureen and I hope you’ll join us for Indiana's 2025 Inaugural Weekend. As we prepare to begin this new chapter in Indiana's story, we want you to be there as we celebrate our great state and look forward to the opportunities ahead.
All event details and RSVP information can be found at [https://brauninauguration.com.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=5f3a3527eda04b1f95e41f779ef95816&_e=rnWbUWBRO65hDLoOaEgJOU5Dqqakw8lx4M_OoTgWrFWlipfhYAvN5LM6W3Wf3tqTektu20TrB6pHs2f12MqbwM3DyJnYO33mku8XMmt_TiYjffK76pCxR_4tFLJKyde0NjvQSh4gqpRirsIJDZ7BNCBHmuBdLNcbk2MahQsdMax0FSgL5Z0Zt6JswrWTdd7XgMqvIbj95IMZbmvySnMqBB4RlolxqDG3PsCU4JCoTGo%3D) We especially encourage you to join us for the Inaugural Ceremony [https://brauninauguration.rsvpify.com](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=5f3a3527eda04b1f95e41f779ef95816&_e=rnWbUWBRO65hDLoOaEgJOdQkBqRQajx5fhZWfGHFSL9QxnYwn3mOtHAr5edZ-eDDw3SggWlBHvWsG5rKRxm3TSGiEYnEbf-eGaLxrX3mNdF_cw3dIVALFHyZuaoYfoTyD8trD7kbZK1pva1ZYME6SX8g-A-lawe945_b4fia2eF6nY9Ne71-uy1d3hIju9NTjV2CxW5HAcnMb6JfKvJSTFsQAxnOuwHfLy3mBa_cOIRyCM2USPzh6WQU3koscUtqhCQ_0InSzDTYJGOIxON8YJQYm8VcmX_fXlbc7uw4biE%3D), where together we'll mark this important moment for Indiana's future.
From our family to yours, we hope you'll be part of this special weekend.
Sincerely,
Mike & Maureen Braun

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Reserve your 2025 Member Card today
body:
---
Derek, did you see our message about our Official 2025 Democratic Member Cards? **We want your input on which design we should move forward.** Pick your favorite today, and the design with the most votes will be sent straight to the printer! **[SELECT DESIGN NOW](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&t=1&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc)** After you vote on the design you like best, don’t forget to chip in $3 to [**reserve your Official 2025 Democratic Member Card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&refcode2=2392_22930333_NbUumc&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc) Thank you, The Democrats
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **The Democratic Party** <feedback@act.democrats.org>
Date: Tue, Dec 10, 2024
Subject: We want to hear your thoughts:
Derek, as a dedicated DNC supporter, we wanted to make sure you saw this: **We’re gearing up to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but first, we need your input on which design to use.** [**So we’re asking: Can you take a few seconds to tell us which member card design is your favorite? The sooner we hear from you, the sooner we’ll be able to get the winning design ready to print and ship.**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&t=2&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&t=3&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&t=4&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&t=5&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&t=6&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc)
Democrats all over the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into 2025 as a reminder of the work we can — and will — accomplish together.
We will not follow Donald Trump and J.D. Vance down a path of darkness, chaos, and hate. But here’s what we will do:
We will elect Democratic leaders who will stop Trump’s destructive agenda. From school board members to city council members, state legislators, governors, and members of Congress — every Democrat we elect is an additional check on Trump, his administration, and his allies in Congress.
We will organize and mobilize on the ground, learn lessons from this past election, and continue our investments in state parties to prevail in upcoming watershed elections in 2025, like Virginia and New Jersey.
And we will bolster our infrastructure and technology to reach voters, listen to voters, and learn from voters.
You’re a key part of this team, and your input is critical to our work. That’s why we want to hear from you today: [**Can you be one of the first supporters to select your favorite member card design?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&t=7&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc)
Thanks for everything,
The Democrats
[**Don’t wait — after you cast your vote on your favorite member card design, make a $3 donation to reserve your card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&refcode2=2392_22930333_NbUumc&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241212_2389_so&amount=3&refcode2=2392_22930333_NbUumc&akid=2392%2E22930333%2ENbUumc)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Peter,

My campaign for Senate is like a hungry pack of wolves that's never satisfied, whose bellies are never full.

This is the way forward for America... Relentless... Pressure! Relentless in our efforts. I'm running for United States Senate in Minnesota in 2026. What can they say now?

I know what they'll say. They'll say the same things they've been saying about me for YEARS.

**They want me to be a slave and servant to their Radical Left politics just because I am Black.

I'll NEVER abandon my morals and principles. I'll NEVER stop thinking for myself.**

I'm a Black Republican who's HELL BENT on becoming Minnesota's FIRST Black Republican Senator.

[**I need your help. Can you rush $10 before midnight?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=865909ee0cba463089f4211854122aa4&_e=24PfFiiRmruce96tI2tS0fvIX10aKs5Od_nLWNDr3qiNBnafdgmugrujObvdLtjmuLB8NlcLIBHVqbSzxdG5nzSNMnFf8GmoASTAvECWdYQGJ9rxVe1yO5sUGSDy-cSH5QfAPEyj40fz859UQfuHdkbAGdIaKGLK7cTCFwE5hq1Oh1t9-0n-Ydk0Ksg-zg-KHEzHtkiQjNXXneIs-PvskeIJkGINO-g7U6m1HAO26vyYlTZE1Ta2dnB9onN6qAO_cnx2vJiARkGhrVW7uhIcqNS9Dvm5VMZGWFib5jBp_cXnRIqTU4P2g_uBRxYj20GvSPC945P7Dnos4xIopMn4LA%3D%3D)

My Radical Left Opponent, Tina Smith, already has an election war-chest of MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to spend against me, and the Radical Left will continue to pour more money into her campaign.

I'm just one guy going up against the Radical Left Machine. I need your help if I'm going to take down this Radical Leftist and give President Trump one more MAGA Senator to support his America-First Agenda.

| [ **THE PEOPLE ARE COMING!** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=865909ee0cba463089f4211854122aa4&_e=24PfFiiRmruce96tI2tS0fvIX10aKs5Od_nLWNDr3qiNBnafdgmugrujObvdLtjmuLB8NlcLIBHVqbSzxdG5nzSNMnFf8GmoASTAvECWdYQGJ9rxVe1yO5sUGSDy-cSH5QfAPEyj40fz859UQfuHdkbAGdIaKGLK7cTCFwE5hq1Oh1t9-0n-Ydk0Ksg-zg-KCuVbvp2gXh5sBUhqP0vRqCxjhYqOntm_W8dmvHFe-ItGjob81FIuLDGNj_TxPX1qdHAyTU9bhGFQVm5laFHef8QxHLudZ9WfCPGWUeGNPgz_ozBiQ701TGNpf1Oa9s1k0I4LXfOW33pS09jBwhgVZQ%3D%3D)

God Bless,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=865909ee0cba463089f4211854122aa4&_e=24PfFiiRmruce96tI2tS0fvIX10aKs5Od_nLWNDr3qiNBnafdgmugrujObvdLtjmuLB8NlcLIBHVqbSzxdG5nzSNMnFf8GmoASTAvECWdYQGJ9rxVe1yO5sUGSDy-cSH5QfAPEyj40fz859UQfuHdkbAGdIaKGLK7cTCFwE5hq1Oh1t9-0n-Ydk0Ksg-zg-KbPnu46NrIxCyGmoQ1b0QhaTs7NlCvkkutvFtA6A7nSfrbUE9eLkUg7gKmvNXKIQe9Njxi4sUUH-HV0oL1nNWj_lECANcXVULc1SMg1syJLcTkHg-yr_E59pGnNs6jAKwsFfmyeYTLJTGl6-OGuX1Lw%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=865909ee0cba463089f4211854122aa4&_e=24PfFiiRmruce96tI2tS0fvIX10aKs5Od_nLWNDr3qiNBnafdgmugrujObvdLtjmuLB8NlcLIBHVqbSzxdG5nzSNMnFf8GmoASTAvECWdYQGJ9rxVe1yO5sUGSDy-cSH5QfAPEyj40fz859UQfuHdkbAGdIaKGLK7cTCFwE5hq1Oh1t9-0n-Ydk0Ksg-zg-KkVdnUDg3j6JL_5UrL-vxUWwBSpUHmMHrREeijns9ZwFpQPiaFx9nEanzrJKHPMG5SBwZXChROm7DTVddVVqdpZMRwF_sirCutyDY-y3GARuaWrBvSJp_nmW37L5Iq4oB1oYPVcnAvpynPxZ9CER2Ng%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is the way forward | Peter, There is not a moment to spare. My campaign for Senate is like a hungry pack of wolves that's never satisfied, whose bellies are never full. This is the way forward for America... Relentless... Pressure! Relentless in our efforts. I'm running for United States Senate in Minnesota in 2026. What can they say now? I know what they'll say. They'll say the same things they've been saying about me for YEARS. They want me to be a slave and servant to their Radical Left politics just because I am Black. I'll NEVER abandon my morals and principles. I'll NEVER stop thinking for myself. I'm a Black Republican who's HELL BENT on becoming Minnesota's FIRST Black Republican Senator. My Radical Left Opponent, Tina Smith, already has an election war-chest of MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to spend against me, and the Radical Left will continue to pour more money into her campaign. I'm just one guy going up against the Radical Left Machine. I need your help if I'm going to take down this Radical Leftist and give President Trump one more MAGA Senator to support his America-First Agenda. | God Bless, Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. body:
Big news! We've confirmed an extra special Forwardist will be on the call with you...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_second_send&n=1)
---
Thursday, December 12, 2024 | Peter -- In case you missed it, on Tuesday, we invited you to our end of year celebration event, _Looking Backward, Moving Forward_. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_second_send&n=2) Today, we're excited to announce one of our extra special guest speakers. On the call, you'll be joined by **Senator-Elect John Curtis!** Senator-Elect Curtis won his race for the Utah Senate seat this year with the endorsement of the Forward Party, making him the first Senator to join the chamber who has affiliated with us. Senator-Elect Curtis will speak to what it was like to run as a Forwardist and why he accepted our support this cycle, along with what our government could look like with more Forwardists in place. You don't want to miss this! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_second_send&n=3 "Register Today!") ---
**Save the Date:_Looking Backward, Moving Forward_ End-of-Year Appreciation Event!**
Mark your calendars for our End-of-Year Appreciation event on **December 18th at 7:15**! This will be a special opportunity to:
* Celebrate what we’ve achieved together in 2024.
* Share our plans for building momentum in 2025.
* Hear from the leaders of the movement how you can have the biggest impact in 2025.

You won't want to miss this event, so register now!
**Support our 2025 work today!**
To help build momentum into 2025, we've launched a big fundraising push! Two donors came together to commit to a **$20,000 match in December!*** That means every dollar you donate will count double (until we hit $20,000 raised)!
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_second_send&n=4 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_second_send&n=4)
---
Thank you for everything you’ve done to make this year such a success. We’re excited to see what we can accomplish together in 2025—and we hope to celebrate with you on December 18th!
With Thanks,
The Forward Party

name: Dan Carr
subject: Pray for America
body:
How to Pray for America and Her Elected Officials

| |
---|---|---
|
# Pray for America
### How to Pray for America and Her Elected Officials
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Dec 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
Prayer has always been a cornerstone of American life, guiding individuals and communities through trials and triumphs. As Christians, we are called to intercede for our nation and its leaders, seeking God's wisdom, protection, and blessings. In today's complex and often divided society, the need for earnest prayer is more vital than ever. By understanding how to pray for America and her elected officials, we align ourselves with God's purpose and contribute to the spiritual health of our nation.

As Christians, we are called to intercede for our nation and its leaders, seeking God's wisdom, protection, and blessings. In today's complex and often divided society, the need for earnest prayer is more vital than ever. By understanding how to pray for America and her elected officials, we align ourselves with God's purpose and contribute to the spiritual health of our nation. body:

> # [Demand the Senate reject Pete Hegseth, Trump's nominee for Defense Secretary](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26bb3c36-22e8-4121-a8cb-bf1b94c45484/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | There is no way in hell that Pete Hegseth can be put in charge of the Defense Department. [**Tell the Senate to reject him.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf635deee-0c5e-4fb4-9478-88d8dec8a624/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

He's a Fox News host, not a serious candidate for running our nation's military forces. He appears to have serious issues with alcohol. He has called for scaling back the role of women in the military. And he stands credibly accused of rape. And he appears ready to use the military against Americans -- the people it is supposed to defend.

**There is no way in hell he should be put in charge of our defense. There is no way in hell he should be put in a position to attack our fellow citizens. We need to speak out NOW. ** [**Tell the Senate to REJECT HEGSETH NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92abd1ff-1b0e-4628-88a8-9960a5547313/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Merry and Blessed Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ca2830276a94f82a25de92c33119e6b&_e=gb8YFkM7lE2ulcnM7wGHL1_TTeTuA2DuhfBHl_ptt5gdP7BJyqb_1vRmol02ymCkQAHgrX27RqQwqyEPQaGIPW5NZvF02IQN79tCKMWsSoTEqrc6hKWo9w_lGqMhVBGV9x_tPjLQ5C1ZIoMPwhO7-WeGop1Qj3R1k-LPEVHjJkVcou4DOnEWPQnaZk3wRdL41R3JxLzmcRs7pLxR-pQjIBPLhnk_hjSVE2cIUiHFY2BNUKF-QpRkMgU1jm0gL7SubAVtKd8oatuu5o81mRYZmxH2S3jCXKc6S44pIJhMjUzRrlMb4Om7aFhCUZPyST5yiqq6ZIQonnM4b9nd-Lw7XK6QqHn5r20SOTB8wOlJTV142mhuCn386sX0DIhsN7LJ4fSrP0nzRp83PLlcSMTM32VT4QlU2UfUE4TXW0sGWnk%3D)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ca2830276a94f82a25de92c33119e6b&_e=gb8YFkM7lE2ulcnM7wGHL1_TTeTuA2DuhfBHl_ptt5gdP7BJyqb_1vRmol02ymCkQAHgrX27RqQwqyEPQaGIPW5NZvF02IQN79tCKMWsSoTEqrc6hKWo9w_lGqMhVBGV9x_tPjLQ5C1ZIoMPwhO7-WeGop1Qj3R1k-LPEVHjJkVcou4DOnEWPQnaZk3wRdL41R3JxLzmcRs7pLxR-pQjIBPLhnk_hjSVE2cIUiHFY2BNUKF-QpRkMgU1jm0gL7SubAVtKd8oatuu5o81mRYZmwU95fPOPY9_MwFjh4_Ms09naX3Hn4L-ozS2u0Xat5Ebmn_-VUdZXBoxngYnUnCD6weVY2JMg0XYEwt-wyT7J0DHMAGPeyApAA8cQevT62IO6lKjisnbtkB6RsUdz5ywZ3BXRB1kEVpmtOAnQMTWHvg%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ca2830276a94f82a25de92c33119e6b&_e=gb8YFkM7lE2ulcnM7wGHL1_TTeTuA2DuhfBHl_ptt5gdP7BJyqb_1vRmol02ymCkQAHgrX27RqQwqyEPQaGIPW5NZvF02IQN79tCKMWsSoTEqrc6hKWo9w_lGqMhVBGV9x_tPjLQ5C1ZIoMPwhO7-WeGop1Qj3R1k-LPEVHjJkVcou4DOnEWPQnaZk3wRdL41R3JxLzmcRs7pLxR-pQjIBPLhnk_hjSVE2cIUiHFY2BNUKF-QpRkMgU1jm0gL7SubAVtKd8oatuu5o81mRYZm7eWbhGxA5gdsRK-n0olaKy5l438opasI0DHg1zN_fWfyBkmIscBOk2PywdQa90x-tLNqd_FWGOFSsvfM-u_DbYzM0ciGKDyGftu9R8D5Nv0wPo5OYVrytAv3dds_UHMLnl9xVih3qMnATfGitpO-hY%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0ca2830276a94f82a25de92c33119e6b&_e=gb8YFkM7lE2ulcnM7wGHL1_TTeTuA2DuhfBHl_ptt5gdP7BJyqb_1vRmol02ymCkQAHgrX27RqQwqyEPQaGIPW5NZvF02IQN79tCKMWsSoTEqrc6hKWo9w_lGqMhVBGV9x_tPjLQ5C1ZIoMPwhO7-WeGop1Qj3R1k-LPEVHjJkVcou4DOnEWPQnaZk3wRdL41R3JxLzmcRs7pLxR-pQjIBPLhnk_hjSVE2cIUiHFY2BNUKF-QpRkMgU1jm0gL7SubAVtKd8oatuu5o81mRYZm1_xUJ4UjVeQ35smkFax8qn5rpsWcEmbY5hHCZj2x4tyY0FW9pTQOChknw-nQ3FbFR8y7xtVsm5g7TWKNNgQwr76l01xkQssW3zEVdrUrDn-RRjkJaBRsWp6AGODT8zVmkQb-F3633ngIGqFd3M0mbg%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98589720/517154698/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDIyMWI5Zi1hOGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Wez8se3UMN_5tHZW6yA7deHBgTS8sB4tbnrLodIhio=&emci=eebf9134-d5b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=84221b9f-a8b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)
---
NextGen’s President, Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez, just exposed Trump’s immigration policy, folks.
Not only is Trump planning on deporting _millions_ of immigrants, _including people with legal resident status_ , but **he’s also aiming to end birthright citizenship**.
This plan isn’t just cruel and blatantly unconstitutional, it would also devastate our economy. Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez put it best:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98589721/517154699/1501481985?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDIyMWI5Zi1hOGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Wez8se3UMN_5tHZW6yA7deHBgTS8sB4tbnrLodIhio=&emci=eebf9134-d5b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=84221b9f-a8b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)
Here’s a bit of perspective for you: in Texas alone, roughly _half_ of the construction industry’s workforce is made up of undocumented immigrants.
_**Does deporting these valuable workers in the middle of a housing crisis sound like a good idea to you?**_
Our immigration system is **broken** — for immigrants _and_ American-born workers. It doesn’t have to be this way, but we can’t let Trump and his cronies put their plans in action. We can’t tolerate him violating the Constitution, ripping families apart, and devastating our economy.
[If you’re reading this and feel ready to take action in this fight to stop mass deportation, add your name TODAY and demand that Congress pass the American Dream and Promise Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98589722/517154700/338682571?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDIyMWI5Zi1hOGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Wez8se3UMN_5tHZW6yA7deHBgTS8sB4tbnrLodIhio=&emci=eebf9134-d5b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=84221b9f-a8b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)

subject: If you could, do us a quick favor and help us correct our records

We were going through our voting records and can't seem to find your results.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Looking ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’ll be honest, our work is cut out for us.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4544%2E35263%2E7EdxVV)
Hi there, Peter. All eyes were on Wisconsin in 2024, and thanks to this grassroots team, we defended Wisconsin’s Senate seat in the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen. I know it might feel like Election Day just passed, but now it’s time to look ahead. I got into public service to get things done, and to make life better for the people I represent. I’m ready to continue fighting for Wisconsin in the Senate. But I’ll be honest, our work is cut out for us in 2025. Democrats will no longer have the Senate majority in the next Congress, and Donald Trump and his allies are continuing to fan the flames of hatred and division. It will take each and every one of us working together to get things done for the American people in the face of extremism. Standing up for our shared values and delivering wins for Democrats in 2026 means building the stepping stones for a powerful grassroots movement now — because the future starts today and our success depends on early action. This team is no stranger to a tough fight, so I know we have what it takes. Thank you for being a part of our team, Peter. I’m so grateful I can count on you to help us keep up the work in the critical months ahead. Tammy | | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec2024.RYww6q&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20241212_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4544%2E35263%2E7EdxVV)

I’m so grateful I can count on you to help us keep up the work in the critical months ahead. Tammy | | P.O. As Tom continues his service, his D.C. office will remain ready to assist the hardworking people of the Seventh District. Here is their contact information: **Washington, D.C. Office****251 Cannon House Office Building** **Washington, D.C. 20515****Phone: (202) 225-5361** If you're planning a visit to the Washington, D.C. area, please reach out to schedule an appointment and say hello to Tom and the team—they would be thrilled to welcome you to the office! Thank you,Team Kean

| | From the Desk of

# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af093f41ea99477eb816b4998a5ae8dc&_e=zacssyQ4pTEpQC63o0vPZ6v7YABUJfU4LMycmLhOEDMalfg6l6IRE5tB1FFtFU6sX6wG8LiphVSY2UsQg-X6xJy4USGx6V19Rs03jBzfeN6nQjKCE186WOjye9e0IRKuS-DwhRTIqkjuxPpnFVTyq3MKFbEE3OQLJwMUBIuEvfYS0z3S8Fu-d7zOcCCZA48Pw2kfd_sLtSJzdBf2KHsuA8vRfv-HPUq23JZsOi5f2C2HA0pWp5kk20bxH_iy5gfLj2F2OuVdID0fYj3XdG-csasSM2YJ__zxvwpgSOm08W7U9tbr7XCjuxkf-TMR93MPnBhPzgri3S1AKgMG1BincrlmFBZKsdR7NeBZwOATtkYi8-829Id0jQR6QQtJ_Ob8ZcR4O8kILUjkKDj3K6ICX6b-pL2fupY3mieNGMuD0_A%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af093f41ea99477eb816b4998a5ae8dc&_e=zacssyQ4pTEpQC63o0vPZ6v7YABUJfU4LMycmLhOEDMalfg6l6IRE5tB1FFtFU6sX6wG8LiphVSY2UsQg-X6xJy4USGx6V19Rs03jBzfeN6nQjKCE186WOjye9e0IRKuS-DwhRTIqkjuxPpnFVTyq3MKFbEE3OQLJwMUBIuEvfYS0z3S8Fu-d7zOcCCZA48Pw2kfd_sLtSJzdBf2KHsuA8vRfv-HPUq23JZsOi5f2C2HA0pWp5kk20bxH_iy5gfLXleJvO6ri0GV1m93jSBRz15Mc1CdSZg4JM50AZTLWuVmcUdk4Me4yU1Nh4hNjuYRHmpWjKts2h1BBnz7oT--UhbHLVxJo21cUBYtuVd1lD2y1ZCCPeuOxaI9NTho-qMQpnT8joMYSbAN-Va6BLsnPlNHgWWk_EhNWIMWKQmAk2g%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af093f41ea99477eb816b4998a5ae8dc&_e=zacssyQ4pTEpQC63o0vPZ6v7YABUJfU4LMycmLhOEDMalfg6l6IRE5tB1FFtFU6sX6wG8LiphVSY2UsQg-X6xJy4USGx6V19Rs03jBzfeN6nQjKCE186WOjye9e0IRKuS-DwhRTIqkjuxPpnFVTyq3MKFbEE3OQLJwMUBIuEvfYS0z3S8Fu-d7zOcCCZA48Pw2kfd_sLtSJzdBf2KHsuA8vRfv-HPUq23JZsOi5f2C2HA0pWp5kk20bxH_iy5gfLiLY5PXt7J-m2wPY9PxkoP82lJajVz8-jdSW3eh1juGRJSkx3Iw7qq8-eBTNksuOFtLO9yA-KE6W8Zv6t45Rn3wZ6uUGr3KMbCayus0GpucCANQlJRGvAvqb4PZT4hc7ag58T_nSOarm62H6dgagUlMeZTQcHMiY6rNM-_atZ_Is%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af093f41ea99477eb816b4998a5ae8dc&_e=zacssyQ4pTEpQC63o0vPZ6v7YABUJfU4LMycmLhOEDMalfg6l6IRE5tB1FFtFU6sX6wG8LiphVSY2UsQg-X6xJy4USGx6V19Rs03jBzfeN6nQjKCE186WOjye9e0IRKuS-DwhRTIqkjuxPpnFVTyq3MKFbEE3OQLJwMUBIuEvfYS0z3S8Fu-d7zOcCCZA48Pw2kfd_sLtSJzdBf2KHsuA8vRfv-HPUq23JZsOi5f2C2HA0pWp5kk20bxH_iy5gfLKnnUQldb1a_r97qRYMJP2lT8NnqQ2uQQi6UPZ4JwMZrU6APUMPmK6oOEDEVHch_lET6Bn5XZIPkJsGiHjUSQslEEy2-CDUddRi-D2Brvo3OR58EJ1nCnhiqgZChUCQAMw3d8jdk677Hdt1KSPyLdezw7a1GkiUs4kRrNwAqUPpI%3D)
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af093f41ea99477eb816b4998a5ae8dc&_e=zacssyQ4pTEpQC63o0vPZ6v7YABUJfU4LMycmLhOEDMalfg6l6IRE5tB1FFtFU6sX6wG8LiphVSY2UsQg-X6xJy4USGx6V19Rs03jBzfeN6nQjKCE186WOjye9e0IRKuS-DwhRTIqkjuxPpnFVTyq3MKFbEE3OQLJwMUBIuEvfYS0z3S8Fu-d7zOcCCZA48Pw2kfd_sLtSJzdBf2KHsuA8vRfv-HPUq23JZsOi5f2C2HA0pWp5kk20bxH_iy5gfLTPFB72oBO3fPEKHpjXtC_2tCMNmvRrANN_sMUVQ8KGIZF_pzRG2F58SlsYrAzfgHBI7uLljwp7ihQQRAGuln6pgVvrWSnUJqSDRMy-1LK4zD23SpzkNEoMXddNyQVB6oPgFOZ1Ov1ibhgV2mphFzCbgR3bACutKlocKoVdM2QNg%3D)
---
Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

| | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your **[“](h)[First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af093f41ea99477eb816b4998a5ae8dc&_e=zacssyQ4pTEpQC63o0vPZ6v7YABUJfU4LMycmLhOEDMalfg6l6IRE5tB1FFtFU6sX6wG8LiphVSY2UsQg-X6xJy4USGx6V19Rs03jBzfeN6nQjKCE186WOjye9e0IRKuS-DwhRTIqkjuxPpnFVTyq3MKFbEE3OQLJwMUBIuEvfYS0z3S8Fu-d7zOcCCZA48Pw2kfd_sLtSJzdBf2KHsuA8vRfv-HPUq23JZsOi5f2C2HA0pWp5kk20bxH_iy5gfLOIMaTp9IInNAYnrDZDO_kBpN2zGVPiB-8-4Jq8OUmxsNMkvtgpt1Eq_iIkL7pqfimr7om3Vh_bQkd5SMjviAshf_liak_5OK2gpXbMJfRExKpLrVK7cjX8qrN6tSAYoMMsR2y_UEKnO6V80dZll9HuqMfBxWGPlLXVeOh-as6YM%3D)** Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family.
