I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones. Fellow Patriot, I’m not giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you. You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. Not the Left’s lawfare.Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family. Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your h Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602****

# MY SUPPORT FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP RUNS DEEP
---
| Greetings!, I've attending numerous events and rallies for the President over the years from Pennsylvania to Florida from 2015 to present in support of President Trump.
I've supported President Trump through thick and thin, even when it wasn't popular to be a Trump supporter.

* I stood with President Trump when the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen

* I stood with President Trump at the Jan 6 peaceful "Stop the Steal" rally in DC

* I stood with President Trump and was illegally censured by the Senate of Virginia for doing so.

* I actively campaigned for President Trump in 2020.

My support for President Trump is documented from 2015 to present. I've not waivered like my opponents.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023

subject: The housing crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team, One of Tina’s top priorities is addressing the housing crisis. And what she means is this: **_People deserve to have a safe place to live that they can afford._** Tina has bipartisan legislation ready to pass to build more affordable housing in rural communities. She’s also introduced legislation with Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to make renting or buying a home a realistic achievement for millions of Americans. **[If you support Tina’s work to tackle the housing crisis head-on, add your name in support of her efforts today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98594379/517170263/-1208080982?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhiMDBlZC1hZWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Lqlyt6iGVadEtEGFwDtWY_jxZxz9xgbSZLiXLm1S9w=&emci=598b00ed-aeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c8b00ed-aeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98594380/517170264/-1208080982?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhiMDBlZC1hZWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Lqlyt6iGVadEtEGFwDtWY_jxZxz9xgbSZLiXLm1S9w=&emci=598b00ed-aeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c8b00ed-aeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6227932)

Americans are trying to figure out how to afford their lives — and one of the biggest issues is whether they can afford their rent or even realize the American dream of buying their own home.
It’s easy to get lost in jargon and policy specifics about housing and zoning laws, but the reality is that this crisis impacts Americans every day. Tina hears from people every day about the struggle of not being able to access affordable housing. **_And she’s taking action._**
**[Show you stand with Tina and her work to address the housing crisis by adding your name in support today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98594381/517170265/-1208080982?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhiMDBlZC1hZWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Lqlyt6iGVadEtEGFwDtWY_jxZxz9xgbSZLiXLm1S9w=&emci=598b00ed-aeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c8b00ed-aeb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6227932)**

name: Justice Democrats
subject: A huge blow to workers and unions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Before their terms in the Senate end this coming January, notorious
Democrat-turned-independent Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema made
it a priority to hurt working-class people and undermine labor rights one
more time.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241212?refcode=em20241212-36228&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36228_1203867_vpkniM&akid=36228%2E1203867%2EvpkniM ]Rolling Stone: Manchin and Sinema screw Biden yet again, give Trump
control of labor board

Yesterday, Manchin and Sinema cast decisive votes to block President
Biden’s National Labor Relations Board nominee, handing control of the
NLRB to Donald Trump. As Rolling Stone reports, this “paves the way for
President-elect Donald Trump‘s next administration to strip worker rights
while pursuing an anti-union agenda.”

Before yesterday’s vote, Sinema — who infamously voted against raising the
federal minimum wage with a thumbs down in 2021 — hadn’t cast a single
vote in the Senate since November 21st.

The corporate wing of the Democratic Party once again reminds us they
don't serve workers or the working class — only the corporations picking
the pockets of everyday people.

Rebuilding this Party starts with retiring every member giving
billionaires control over workers' futures, and replacing them with
working-class progressives who will fight for the people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241212?refcode=em20241212-36228&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36228_1203867_vpkniM&akid=36228%2E1203867%2EvpkniM ]That’s exactly what Justice Democrats is working toward as we enter
2025. Will you fuel our Candidate Recruitment efforts with a grassroots
contribution of $5 or more today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241212?refcode=em20241212-36228&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36228_1203867_vpkniM&akid=36228%2E1203867%2EvpkniM ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241212-36228-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36228_1203867_vpkniM&akid=36228%2E1203867%2EvpkniM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36228%2E1203867%2EvpkniM

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b178eeee5b324387a6412678f7560cc5&_e=-J5VJfW5Ie_oqNw-fsLVqaVNy6efgJpl3dafcMjmNckovL36p4hTZu8-4SivoNuRAjtry1wRlIQomnlOoF-IolF-aiJ9FF62aT61zEpnOeDXgdIBqHe6RIt4oHXiNjLd_7imJ9Mg1OWsdLR5MZRNWxeXyk_UMjD3ES-DMo7UO7no0rp6dATHcrWv3bERKul0Bj4rrBOfoXE23Aw6VBfQe9EKoAeqk_EfRyG5FGMFq8Qsfbc4kDYkj1w7tGUyUl7stM0i5VUlqcMj9FJoY_kkIQH_HvZF_ZWxfBRaCLAlReUSJLsG9kL2g9g1igOmBVfqV7Nu6LODiWMD8fZSsPAv8gnvxdaQn3BQfo3nRDK8CJiiGl_mf189zNeNwDrctdXT2hzekGRjUv93wlr-V7BZ-QmMtKPfjhJlZTmQh0qD7LQ%3D)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b178eeee5b324387a6412678f7560cc5&_e=-J5VJfW5Ie_oqNw-fsLVqaVNy6efgJpl3dafcMjmNckovL36p4hTZu8-4SivoNuRAjtry1wRlIQomnlOoF-IolF-aiJ9FF62aT61zEpnOeDXgdIBqHe6RIt4oHXiNjLd_7imJ9Mg1OWsdLR5MZRNWxeXyk_UMjD3ES-DMo7UO7no0rp6dATHcrWv3bERKul0Bj4rrBOfoXE23Aw6VBfQe9EKoAeqk_EfRyG5FGMFq8Qsfbc4kDYkj1w7tGUyUl7sxGWqcG4h1SthDpdmNrUjtIAH77QsPmeOy6Gn0I-ygjaYwf8WmiN_VbSoRSTavtiQwaBQ4p0IIZntfcvm8qF1fOm_caQTa6VMLNU5hxad0vTPkdHdNn6wN4blJrtia_ZOEJWUTiN80RnCozFLGEAGw4oUTtBwHHpi2PxurLWspfc%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b178eeee5b324387a6412678f7560cc5&_e=-J5VJfW5Ie_oqNw-fsLVqaVNy6efgJpl3dafcMjmNckovL36p4hTZu8-4SivoNuRAjtry1wRlIQomnlOoF-IolF-aiJ9FF62aT61zEpnOeDXgdIBqHe6RIt4oHXiNjLd_7imJ9Mg1OWsdLR5MZRNWxeXyk_UMjD3ES-DMo7UO7no0rp6dATHcrWv3bERKul0Bj4rrBOfoXE23Aw6VBfQe9EKoAeqk_EfRyG5FGMFq8Qsfbc4kDYkj1w7tGUyUl7sQoLlgKUV_rZrwLiQPH97XKbVoIbeWNzLfgN0NrhghrKIoTsUYe3ZUsCmfXcJXAkgOcMzO03quS_okcLC17iVRMBiGPEBgiNxP6fzUzSapjHuXltSFaZZS37bBNyz5K2ffNdhJ2nWirYc2Q_xOOnv61_UJuDxahUt5FxWL8UxyJE%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.

$12.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $12 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98595376/517173000/-2022193277?amounts=6,25,50,100,500&amount=12&refcode=jtk1766-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGJiOTRlMS1iMGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rnmDeM2LgZrNwEdfN3pb4MS4SiALZlzqVshBygq_XkY=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe-to-toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. But, thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we approach the end of 2024, I _must_ keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $12 for the last month of the year to help me continue my fight for progress. clean_body: I know it doesn't sound like much, but my entire fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. | | | = $12. I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my entire fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. = – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important. Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless. But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work. And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure real wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe-to-toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is not up for sale. As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. But, thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we approach the end of 2024, I must keep that momentum going. = | | = Thank you for all of your support. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: KEEP FIGHTING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0a411e11fe004d8982660bd2aa503805&_e=BGKOak_GftJ0Iq0eMH6Zf-V59XhffnVaKboBBm6YuCTkJOf0-zgWxC0nRYpDTt9xl7-s6Z6kgqDoRk4THHo5UaTW9pWJIsw5GmuguI_Ca_gZT3dnU9lShFy2WtrOD4ZR-nt_EBUOPrpBZ3Oo9a0XhTIO60rP9EuqmI4DqPGW3WqsF6K83Sjs5zcVdbxzH0RKtja6XxoLU1DenVct5sW0DTXIabbom3bkI0VjLOjgEKnCvahK82zcfYZQKvEhsi7OKxNbM35onrmb3pmkNu9kRJuxaohMmcYRZt-Cjj5oZOJt_6L-T0C3ZnnklG-LqcvKQ8amqWDgZo3sSWxg8ePGcQPjsbHtTVR7QVHY29Ra46kOO2SoMCXDkKEnxIRK4fV3)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---

clean_body: Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst | Dear Friend, Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car – I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice. And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights: Newsweek : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, “Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?” Here’s what I said: “Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.” Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. They want me to pay $148 MILLION! It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York. But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored. Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House! That’s why I will KEEP FIGHTING for my God-given freedoms and rights. If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

The stakes couldn’t be higher. Let’s keep Virginia safe and strong.| | | Friend, Virginia’s progress is at risk.**_Far-left candidates_** running for Attorney General would reverse the hard work we’ve done to make our communities safer and stronger. **_I refuse to let that happen._** Here’s what we’ve achieved:
* A**30% decrease** in the murder rate with Operation Ceasefire.
* Standing up to corporate giants harming our communities.
* Fighting the Biden-Harris Administration’s overreach and protecting our freedoms.

body:
| | | [Join our town hall team!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98596472/517176731/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNzMwNmZhLWIyYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YNIfQpKwgx8iGlmAlp9_T17XQoNg6XexQ0NbbrNA7h4=&emci=59123627-71b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=da7306fa-b2b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98596475/517176761/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNzMwNmZhLWIyYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YNIfQpKwgx8iGlmAlp9_T17XQoNg6XexQ0NbbrNA7h4=&emci=59123627-71b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=da7306fa-b2b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)
---
| | **Dear Peter, the countdown to the 2025 legislative session has begun!**
---
This session will be the first with the newly elected supermajorities in the State House and Senate. These supermajorities provide Democrats with a mandate to take action to protect our clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate, but **it’s up to us to make sure that they follow through**. There’s so much at stake this session, and we can’t afford to let anything slide. [**So, are you ready to be one of OLCV’s superstar activists standing up for our climate and environment this year?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98596479/517176764/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNzMwNmZhLWIyYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YNIfQpKwgx8iGlmAlp9_T17XQoNg6XexQ0NbbrNA7h4=&emci=59123627-71b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=da7306fa-b2b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) OLCV’s Town Hall Teams will help you do just that! Depending on your location across the state, OLCV is organizing teams specific to your area. We’ll help equip and encourage you on your activist journey, as you defend our climate and make your voice heard at town halls in your district.
[**You can become a climate activist this year by signing up to join our Town Hall Team!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98596483/517176769/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNzMwNmZhLWIyYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YNIfQpKwgx8iGlmAlp9_T17XQoNg6XexQ0NbbrNA7h4=&emci=59123627-71b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=da7306fa-b2b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)**** Once you’ve signed up, our organizers will reach out to you with more information. They will provide you with your town hall toolkit (full of tips, talking points, and what to expect), more information on upcoming town halls, and how to best prepare. These town halls will be hosted by your state lawmakers and close to home, making it easy to join and take action!
---
[Sign up here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98596487/517176774/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNzMwNmZhLWIyYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YNIfQpKwgx8iGlmAlp9_T17XQoNg6XexQ0NbbrNA7h4=&emci=59123627-71b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=da7306fa-b2b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)
---
Advocating for our climate and environment is one of the most urgent issues of our time. There’s no denying that the future of our home is at stake if we don’t continue to make progress on climate. One of the most impactful things any of us can do in this fight is use our voice and speak to those in power about climate action. It reminds lawmakers of their duty and responsibility to all of us.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Peter, the countdown to the 2025 legislative session has begun! This session will be the first with the newly elected supermajorities in the State House and Senate. These supermajorities provide Democrats with a mandate to take action to protect our clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate, but it’s up to us to make sure that they follow through. There’s so much at stake this session, and we can’t afford to let anything slide. OLCV’s Town Hall Teams will help you do just that! Depending on your location across the state, OLCV is organizing teams specific to your area. We’ll help equip and encourage you on your activist journey, as you defend our climate and make your voice heard at town halls in your district. ** Once you’ve signed up, our organizers will reach out to you with more information. They will provide you with your town hall toolkit (full of tips, talking points, and what to expect), more information on upcoming town halls, and how to best prepare. These town halls will be hosted by your state lawmakers and close to home, making it easy to join and take action! Advocating for our climate and environment is one of the most urgent issues of our time. There’s no denying that the future of our home is at stake if we don’t continue to make progress on climate. One of the most impactful things any of us can do in this fight is use our voice and speak to those in power about climate action. It reminds lawmakers of their duty and responsibility to all of us. I hope you’ll sign up to make your voice heard. Our voices will make a big difference going into 2025 and beyond!** Thank you for your support of this fight. Together, Britney VanCittersOLCV Political & Organizing Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Join us NEXT WEEK for a can't-miss Holiday Party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter Willis,
The holidays are around the corner, and the annual MassDems Holiday Party is next week! I hope you'll join me, Governor Healey, and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll to enjoy cocktails, refreshments and the wonderful company of our community.
The Holiday Party will be on Wednesday, December 18th, at 5:30 PM at the Omni Parker House . During the festivities, we will honor the invaluable contributions and leadership of the legislators who will be leaving the Massachusetts State House and Senate. We'll reflect on their impact and thank them for their service as we prepare to continue building a brighter future together.
You can RSVP for the holiday party here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24] , and find more details on the invite below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24]
RSVP today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-holiday24]
I hope to see you on the 18th!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan

name: Olivia Krolczyk, Leadership Institute
subject: Stand bravely with me and Riley
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Fellow American,

They failed me.

Leftist college administrators
impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students
like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.

Last year, I received a failing
grade at the University of Cincinnati for using the term
"biological women."

The university sided with my
professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every
American -- to free speech.

That's why I joined the Riley
Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and
train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution
and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and
beyond.

Here I am with Riley and our
colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

18 million Americans are on
college campuses across the country.

Fellow American, if students aren't free
to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they
count on?

Today I ask you to help
conservative students fight for their rights this fall.

With a new administration taking
office, young conservatives' preparedness to lead the battle for
constitutional rights is more important than ever.

Your Leadership Institute and its
Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders
coast-to-coast to lead that battle.

Will you stand bravely with me
and Riley?

Your special gift will help more
conservative students defend our liberties.

Please let me count on you now.
Thank you.

Fight on,

Olivia Krolczyk
Ambassador
Riley Gaines Center at the
Leadership Institute

Stand with Riley Today

The Leadership Institute, 1101 N.
Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201,
United States, (703) 247-2000

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

name: campaign@keithellison.org
subject: Don't let your refund slip away, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Don’t let your 2024 Political Contribution Refund (PCR) slip away! There’s still time to donate $75 to our campaign and get a full refund from the state.

Follow these four easy steps to claim your refund:

1. Make a $75 contribution (or $150 for couples).

2. We’ll mail you a receipt and a PCR application form.

3. Complete the PCR application (it only takes a few minutes!) and send it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue.

4. Receive a full refund of $75 or $150 for couples.

Minnesota’s PCR program resets every year, so you have until December 31 to claim your 2024 refund. Don’t miss the chance to support our campaign at no cost to you!

Please don’t leave your refund on the table, Peter. Make your refundable $75 donation and take advantage of Minnesota’s PCR program today!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241212ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241212ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241212ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241212ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241212ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241212ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

Attorney General Keith Ellison is the People’s Lawyer, fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241212ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

PO Box 17224
Minneapolis, MN 55417

Peter, I’m about to share what we’ve accomplished together and explain how pivotal your support is to finishing what we started.

---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98598407/517182935/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGUzOWJjMC1iNWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKIUonY7HtmprgQTyCy6E9o8_I8QlckRnZhlPPhwFng=)

[**_Peter, I’m about to share what we’ve accomplished together and explain how pivotal your support is to finishing what we started. I hope you’ll read my entire message until the end, learn what’s at stake in this moment and then chip in $15 to help Democrats defeat extreme MAGA Republicans in the House. If you have to run, can you please rush $15 before you go to help us put our plans into action? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98598408/517182936/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGUzOWJjMC1iNWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKIUonY7HtmprgQTyCy6E9o8_I8QlckRnZhlPPhwFng=)
Thanks to your incredible support, the nationwide Trump surge never materialized in the House.
We flipped ten Republican-held seats and held them to the narrowest of majorities in American history.
[**Peter, I know this is only the beginning of what we can accomplish together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98598409/517182937/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGUzOWJjMC1iNWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKIUonY7HtmprgQTyCy6E9o8_I8QlckRnZhlPPhwFng=)
[**_We will never give up the fight for the people. However, the simple truth is we have to elect more Democrats to office and reclaim the majority to continue our work and WIN. That’s why I set an ambitious new goal – $10,000 raised before midnight – to ensure we have the resources to lay the foundation in every battleground district and build a better future for ALL Americans. Can I count on your $15 to show we stand ready to defeat extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the House majority for Democrats? I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation today >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98598410/517182938/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGUzOWJjMC1iNWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKIUonY7HtmprgQTyCy6E9o8_I8QlckRnZhlPPhwFng=)
I’ll be direct, Peter:
[**The stakes are way too high for us to fall short.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98598411/517182939/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGUzOWJjMC1iNWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKIUonY7HtmprgQTyCy6E9o8_I8QlckRnZhlPPhwFng=)
→ Democrats only need to flip a few seats to take back the House.
→ Extreme MAGA Republicans are already scheming to salvage their narrow majority.
→ I rely on your help to build a strong foundation for victory and prove them 100% wrong.
[**I need to know you’re with us, Peter.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98598412/517182940/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGUzOWJjMC1iNWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKIUonY7HtmprgQTyCy6E9o8_I8QlckRnZhlPPhwFng=)
[**_We held Republicans to a razor-thin majority under the most difficult circumstances. We’re not stopping there. If we can raise $10,000 in the next 11 hours, we’ll be able to build an unbeatable foundation to reclaim the House, compete with the MAGA mega-donors and begin the early investments we need to win. Can you pitch in $15 before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98598413/517182941/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241212_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGUzOWJjMC1iNWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKIUonY7HtmprgQTyCy6E9o8_I8QlckRnZhlPPhwFng=)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The TSA is using a facial recognition screening system for airports
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
During this holiday season, many of us will be traveling through airports to visit friends, family, and loved ones.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98598768/517184095/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjkyMmI0Zi1iN2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=peSERZlBQUtRtw3PXwG3jQCPVlrdurVgAYQEMJlky44=&emci=0e280d49-b7b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=df922b4f-b7b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=7731215)
---

| | During this holiday season, many of us will be traveling through airports to visit friends, family, and loved ones, which means we'll be passing through security. At airports around the country, the Transportation Security Administration is deploying a facial recognition screening system to verify your identity, and I've introduced a new bill to stop it called **The Traveler Privacy Protection Act**. Here's why: The TSA program, which uses facial recognition to match passengers' faces with their government ID on file, has been implemented without any guarantees of its effectiveness or ability to protect passenger privacy. That's a slippery slope into a surveillance state, and nothing could be more damaging to our national values of privacy and freedom. TSA says participating in the facial recognition screening is optional, but I've personally experienced agents making it difficult to opt-out. **The bipartisan Traveler Privacy Protection Act aims to guard your privacy and prevent the TSA from using airports as a site to collect Americans' sensitive facial biometric data by:**
* Repealing existing authorization for TSA to explore facial recognition technology and require explicit congressional authorization for future use.
* Immediately banning TSA from expanding its use of facial recognition.
* Requiring TSA to end its facial recognition program and dispose of facial biometrics data within 3 months.

We've seen the damage unchecked facial recognition technology does to privacy and freedom in other countries around the world. **Let's not let it happen here.** Let's say no to the TSA using facial recognition in our airports. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Now the fight begins
body:
With Trump, now is our chance
| Peter, I’m Riley Gaines, the Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute. I know what it’s like to stare radical leftism in the face. After all, I had to swim a race against a 6-foot-tall man.
**But Peter, we can work to put those days behind us now.** With Donald Trump back in the White House, you and I have a unique opportunity to turn the tide for women’s rights across America. American voters have proven with this election that they’ve had enough of the lunacy. They’ve had enough of the attacks on the very foundations of our society and our families. And they turned out in masses and voted to restore common sense. But this is only the beginning. While conservatives celebrate this victory, the left's agenda remains a significant threat to our rights and opportunities.
Because Peter , there are still leftist bureaucrats, elected and unelected, working to stop common sense Americans from setting things right.
**_You and I must be vigilant and proactive in defending the rights of female athletes and students everywhere._**
There is great opportunity in these turbulent times. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to ensuring that women’s voices are heard, and their rights are protected. It’s what my ambassadors work for -- day in and day out.
Right now, the Riley Gaines Center needs to raise $300,000 to start 2025 with a bang. This is a call to action for all who believe in fairness and biological reality.
[Your support will empower my Ambassadors and I to educate, mobilize, and advocate for policies that protect women’s rights.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c16487a64783430ea79873cee03b2afc&_e=QpOoc7n_G3GNyRwRYzKztwHi4m2FfHZnmTXc2joJToiGde7csu2A5rVkbewrbKmhzSJc2VYGWy-fXr9uh-0hin3MUwBY_tcqcWI8tR9dsh4kZw0IWnpmDmc-oOk_O5H-sItAZPqSTOj5SNqZQe8aPGA4gg_BSj4sO1i5Sb4hRlilaBbUL0lTwZ_-zwxIoT5xCXJrQkSS3zk4kwWVYvjVj-0nbWK2-OtuE1dpY2BZPtRoCGktvAoXKQYV9swvtMjMCUC1wS79sV-UTNpSO8ymV0S2aFNq1Md5nOkvTwwmE6vTN3-uG-vwIoLmxZuw3FcepcG9xm2spmM9-Ys4J-rxte-fLNxbYw8Gmlv1tUUuHSSvJFUQweaX7AjyBQ9XK5Jx) Together, you and I can make a difference. Join in this fight for fairness and equality. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center

American voters have proven with this election that they’ve had enough of the lunacy. They’ve had enough of the attacks on the very foundations of our society and our families. And they turned out in masses and voted to restore common sense. But this is only the beginning. While conservatives celebrate this victory, the left's agenda remains a significant threat to our rights and opportunities. Because Peter , there are still leftist bureaucrats, elected and unelected, working to stop common sense Americans from setting things right. You and I must be vigilant and proactive in defending the rights of female athletes and students everywhere. There is great opportunity in these turbulent times. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to ensuring that women’s voices are heard, and their rights are protected. It’s what my ambassadors work for -- day in and day out. Right now, the Riley Gaines Center needs to raise $300,000 to start 2025 with a bang. This is a call to action for all who believe in fairness and biological reality. Together, you and I can make a difference. Join in this fight for fairness and equality. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000

That means seven opportunities to take a stand against GOP extremism. | | | | | ---|--- State Democrats already have seven special elections on the horizon in Delaware, Louisiana, Virginia, and beyond. That means seven opportunities to take a stand against GOP extremism. Republicans will stop at nothing to weaken our democracy, take away fundamental freedoms, and spread conspiracy theories. With record-high numbers of abortion bans and anti-LGBTQ+ bills, it’s clear that we must elect state Democrats to protect our progress. * SAVED countless lives by reducing the flow of dangerous fentanyl.

As the Attorney General, she will show JUST how corrupt DC has become, _**but her chances of being appointed are slimming by the second.**_

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: RCPS Breakfast With Santa, Christmas Parade, High School Basketball, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]

Roanoke, VA 24037

name: Jamie Janosz
subject: Capturing the Hope of Christmas!
body:
Christmas can be a season of joy, family, and time-honored traditions.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=3648a7873e1a491e9e4d396b6eb85122&_t=yp8Vw4B2JT8H0Kz4mivwMGaM51JW-soYlF_cjYk-rOoi21dBMMP5ZMTWLHonbjjAGOhaafIPBiIuTpUpPI8zrLN7tQMEEcVczZZhy9ARJIDEVnSkq740cmqkz2BmsXnv)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=3648a7873e1a491e9e4d396b6eb85122&_e=tXrbgwLsgNMsw1v_zW_adWVIHdnphX_7D0gw82ad6luZrUzNtTqULkofo23FVL8zOrug1o-KgxOXaHEFkZTrm52ZXB47MVm_gFezmkte4bbuPyOKavcI7KtAYwUJ3xH5zwj5CgHU7YbHkSM8J_m12qNSwizCv_PRqPye-RD8_rBlhUxWKvLLak5QZ2F8DwJZytK7MjOx9cWRhEZGGvKnBYph-e--oxuYoZ1vq2oplF79pX31QWjprl8VmszD0---XWOFXwiXciv84Rm7Uj_trhE-_Fk3ucp2_AzmrJoSnZR0v4WDTkr_EPm4jvbmNcMoUlyfMREXPZgDtWMKegmBbB1vN-fqPMBRHOYyq1lfhus%3D)
Hi there Friend, ____ Christmas can be a season of joy, family, and time-honored traditions. But let's be honest--it can also leave us feeling like something's missing. With all the busyness and rushing around, we can find ourselves longing for something deeper--a moment to reconnect with the true hope that Christmas represents.

**Sometimes we get so caught up in the whirlwind that we forget the simple, beautiful truth: Christmas is about the birth of Jesus, the Light who came into a dark world.** At Christmas, it is important to step back, breathe, and remember the love and hope He has brought into our lives.

That's why we're excited to offer you _He Is Born: Celebrating Our Eternal Hope_ --a Christmas devotional from _Today in the Word_. This free devotional is designed to help you refocus on what really matters at Christmas: the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ.

Each day's reading is a chance to reconnect with the peace and hope that Jesus offers. In _He Is Born_ , you'll discover:
---
|
* Reflections on the Christmas story and how it speaks to us today.
* Daily thoughts that tie the birth of Christ to the eternal hope we have in Him.
* A journey through Scripture to prepare your heart for the wonder and joy of the season.

If you've been looking for a way to slow down and really embrace the meaning of the holiday, this devotional is for you. It's a simple, encouraging way to center your heart on the hope that Christmas brings--and the best part? It's absolutely free. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Hi there Friend, __ Christmas can be a season of joy, family, and time-honored traditions. But let's be honest--it can also leave us feeling like something's missing. With all the busyness and rushing around, we can find ourselves longing for something deeper--a moment to reconnect with the true hope that Christmas represents. Sometimes we get so caught up in the whirlwind that we forget the simple, beautiful truth: Christmas is about the birth of Jesus, the Light who came into a dark world. At Christmas, it is important to step back, breathe, and remember the love and hope He has brought into our lives. That's why we're excited to offer you He Is Born: Celebrating Our Eternal Hope --a Christmas devotional from Today in the Word. This free devotional is designed to help you refocus on what really matters at Christmas: the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ. Each day's reading is a chance to reconnect with the peace and hope that Jesus offers. In He Is Born , you'll discover: | Reflections on the Christmas story and how it speaks to us today. Daily thoughts that tie the birth of Christ to the eternal hope we have in Him. * A journey through Scripture to prepare your heart for the wonder and joy of the season. If you've been looking for a way to slow down and really embrace the meaning of the holiday, this devotional is for you. It's a simple, encouraging way to center your heart on the hope that Christmas brings--and the best part? It's absolutely free. My prayer for you is that this Christmas will be one of renewed hope and joy. Download He Is Born today and spend the season drawing closer to Christ. Blessings, Jamie Janosz Managing Editor, Today in the Word .

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Drone Invasion - Where are they from?
body:
dpwillis67@gmail.com - don’t Miss This Episode of No Doubt About It! 🎙️ | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=63ab4ac2a1&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | Ready for a wild ride? Our [latest episode](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=784d4ce76c&e=567664f14c) of the No Doubt About It Podcast is out now!
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b5fe9fd2a4&e=567664f14c)
| Here’s what we cover:

→ **Krysty’s High School Mascot Reveal:** We kick things off by debating Krysty’s unbelievably soft high school mascot. Mark tries to wrap his head around how anyone could go to a school with such a “gentle” mascot. Krysty defends her High School by claiming it’s French. You’ll have to hear it to believe it!

→ **Mysterious Drones in New Jersey Skies:** Strange drones are buzzing over New Jersey, and nobody seems to know why—or won’t say. Are these government aircraft, top-secret military tech, or something else entirely? The government insists there’s “no threat,” but how can they be sure if they don’t know what it is? We play some laugh-out-loud sound bites from frustrated local leaders who are done with the runaround.
---
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=79e3fe8612&e=567664f14c)
| →**Super Sanctuary City Showdown in California:** A county in California is vowing to become a “super sanctuary city,” refusing to hand over violent criminals to federal authorities. Even the county sheriff is pushing back. This is a heated standoff you won’t find on the evening news, and we’re breaking it all down so you know what’s really going on.

→ **Pete Hegseth’s Path to Confirmation:** There’s a new hit piece attempting to derail Department of Defense nominee Pete Hegseth. Mark makes the case that this attack will likely backfire and fast-track Hegseth’s confirmation. Curious why? We’ve got the inside scoop.

→ **Little-Known Christmas Laws:** We wrap up with Krysty sharing some downright hilarious, obscure Christmas laws that will have you decking the halls with laughter. Who knew the holiday season came with its own wacky rulebook?
---

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: $175M in Grant Funding for School Repairs and Renovations
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169074.172846.121&gen=1).
| |
---
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169074.172846.121&snid=2)
---|---
| | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169074.172846.121&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12792)
---
| | | | |
# **$175M in Grant Funding for School Repairs and Renovations**
Senator Hughes, Representative Jordan Harris, Mayor Cherelle Parker, and a number of other city and state leaders proudly announced a monumental investment of **$175 million in grant funding for Pennsylvania school building repairs and renovations. **This funding is a testament to the Commonwealth's commitment to providing students with safe and modern learning environments. Thanks to leadership from Governor Shapiro and Democrats in the Senate and House, Pennsylvania delivered this NEW funding in addition to a $1.1 billion increase for basic education across Pennsylvania.
* * *
_**Key Highlights**_ **Local Impact:** Martha Washington Academics in West Philadelphia is set to receive $1.4 million for critical bathroom renovations. **Citywide Support:** Philadelphia School District will receive $16.77 million for repairs and improvements to 7 school buildings **Statewide Effort:** This $175 million in funding supports Pennsylvania's goal of transforming outdated infrastructure and ensuring equitable education for all students.
* * *
"This funding is the result of a lot of work from a lot of people to get one step closer to ensure all our public school students can learn in 21st century school buildings. This is a commitment that complements the $1.1 billion dollar increase we delivered for education in our last budget. And we will continue to keep our students, teachers, and administrators a priority as we get ready to enter our next budget cycle, because we only deny our own progress when we don't set our education system up for success." \- Senator Hughes -
* * *
Senator Hughes was also happy to welcome a very special guest- his mother, Mrs. Hughes! Mrs. Hughes worked at Martha Washington for over 30 years. The school's current Principal, Principal Patrick, even attended the school while Mrs. Hughes was an administrator there.
---
| |
---
Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes
| |
---
| | | |
---

2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131

Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Is Trump A Modern Day Joseph From Genesis?
body:
TIME Magazine named President Donald Trump the Person of the Year. This got me to think about the whirlwind that we have all experienced from 2020 to
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9794.1.042b96f07c806072af02b0e7a90243b3) |
---
**TIME Magazine** named **President Donald Trump** the **Person of the Year**. This got me to think about the _whirlwind_ that we have all experienced from 2020 to present-day. I see some parallels between **Joseph** in the Book of Genesis and **President Trump**. Hear me out: **Joseph** was _betrayed_ by his own brothers which led to slavery and prison. **Donald Trump** was _betrayed_ by his fellow Republicans which led to law-fare and much more **Joseph** went from the _Prison_ to the _Palace_ in Egypt. **Donald Trump** is going from the _jailhouse_ in GA to the _White House_ in DC. God allowed **Joseph** to be sold as a slave and cast into to prison to raise up **Joseph** because the world at that time was going to experience a famine of incredible magnitude but thanks to **Joseph** , people lived and not died. Is it possible that God in His wisdom allowed the fraud of 2020 so that **Trump** would be in the White House at this time in History instead of 2020-2024? Maybe... the world has a major crisis ahead that God only knows about and that God allowed **Trump** to be out of the White House from 2020 to 2024 so that he could be there now through 2028. **I am no prophet neither the son of a prophet** but time will tell and history will show whether global events from 2025 to 2028 required a leader like **President Trump**. And maybe... we will thank those who intended evil in 2020 because God used them and intended their evil actions for good in the now. I believe there is a good chance that **President Trump** and **MAGA** may say one day to those who betrayed us the very words of **Joseph** to his brothers: _"But as for you, you intended evil against me; but God intended it for good, in order to bring it about as it is this day, to save many people alive"_ \- **Genesis 50:20** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9795.1.02c3a9408eb87ecd9a07c5fc7140a532)
---
You are invited to come _meet_ and _hear_ from [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9796.1.5391d2c9c07fa300088437f3a98c63da) on Thursday, March 6 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9797.1.c2d030f606ecd0fd0141286d92327093) in Tulsa, OK. In October, we had **Eric** at **Sheridan** and it was an incredible event. You can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/livetrump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9798.1.7f63cecea8974c8861e76415ff83b115) However, this March will be even better because **President Trump** will already be in the **White House** and we will hear _exclusive insights_ from **Eric** of what is taking place in the **Trump administration**. There will also be other guests at this event that we will announce as we get closer. Seating is **VERY** limited for this event. Please [RSVP](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9799.1.1050f3f67f85b7bf066a0467a0810c70) here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9800.1.47e7c1ec3044d2751a78eacd1a7e7781) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: Eric Trump | Tulsa, OK ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9801.1.cd1f30c04f462985bcf4f6516ae73b19)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9802.1.ce62669739f640fb8adac0f5c06677e6)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9803.1.03df79b665722ae1026058312f354d6f), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9804.1.b7bb0155a43369795b592af07536676d). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9805.1.b6441214fb0991c0d639c16c7cc55ae7)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9806.1.6b3dbac4b1f4a8c594af713befa4d13c) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Sunday, January 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9807.1.a0593dd5aa3f4242cb2872e5c5540715): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9808.1.27d910313bcb7b8afeb60792c483a693)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9809.1.ee3f145d319da35828c5f4719d3d451b)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9810.1.075e602d4b842ed792dc3f7f51d58160), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9811.1.e574a8062c3ae3e91ddec824af641af3), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9812.1.0ee71e5b53c5a00630554d9d4378a2da)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9813.1.e16defc71e19dc115aa2821cacb291f3), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9814.1.e037e8bbcd3b946d7d3d73ac88acb35c), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9815.1.3c78524ebf2af2b0c833f942b0fa7b39), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9816.1.e0f5a1dc4c83cb467e520e9882b13d94), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9817.1.ff61dc1530be10e11b35ab568afe4991), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9818.1.7da411096381c7cc04146c82c8d55cf9), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9819.1.9f2706e747d486557da615ae09694e73), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9820.1.b4cb1d946c4f6d894ba3da9dd82301bb), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18167875.9821.1.24f5be4f5392ed2a493cf0ad890d639c) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!
---
---
©2024 Jackson Lahmeyer | Tulsa, OK

name: Sharice Davids
subject: A privilege I will never take for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Each and every day, I’m proud to bring integrity and committed leadership to Washington

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98601169/517192103/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjc2YzcwMy1iZGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WbwJ558ScIAuta1clEwqMVVPIYO48gM6vSOcYPf8D9o=) Serving our community and fighting for our values in Congress is a privilege I will never take for granted. I’m honored to deliver real solutions for families all across Kansas — including lower prescription drug costs, good-paying clean-energy jobs, rural broadband funding, bipartisan action to reduce gun violence, and so much more. I’m honored to be the only openly LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever to serve in Congress. I’m honored to serve as a voice for reproductive freedom in Washington at a moment when extremist attacks on the right to choose are at an all-time high. And I’m especially honored to represent the values of KS-03 in the halls of Congress. **As Kansas’ only federally elected Democratic representative, I promise to make the values of our district heard loud and clear in the next Congress.** That means keeping up the fight for our freedoms, finding bipartisan consensus whenever possible, delivering real solutions to thousands of Kansas families, and creating a better future where everyone has the opportunity to succeed. A lot of hard work is ahead of us, but with you by my side, I know we can continue to bring meaningful progress to the American people — and stand up against attacks on our fundamental rights. [_**If the values I’m fighting for speak to you, then I’m asking for your support at this critical moment in our nation’s history. No matter what obstacles are thrown my way in the next Congress, I will continue to use my voice to uplift families across Kansas — and I’d be grateful to have you by my side.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98601170/517192104/1105044312?refcode=email_121224_Values&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjc2YzcwMy1iZGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WbwJ558ScIAuta1clEwqMVVPIYO48gM6vSOcYPf8D9o=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98601171/517192105/1105044312?refcode=email_121224_Values&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjc2YzcwMy1iZGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WbwJ558ScIAuta1clEwqMVVPIYO48gM6vSOcYPf8D9o=)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I’m running for governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Peter, we’ve been through a lot these last couple years. There have been urgent crises in this country, across the world, and here in New Jersey.
As a graduate of the U.S. Naval Academy and a former helicopter aircraft commander, I learned early on that in a crisis, there are only three options: **you can either lead, follow, or get out of the way.**
**[I know which one I pick — and that’s why I’m thrilled to share that I am officially running for Governor of New Jersey. Peter, will you split a contribution between me and Lucas Kunce to become a Founding Donor of my campaign for New Jersey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84644?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84644?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6)
---
In New Jersey, we don’t whine. **We work.**
We’re inventors, innovators, and builders. We work with our minds — and our hands.
So let’s be the state that builds more housing. The state that fixes the economy. And let’s make life more affordable for hard-working New Jerseyans — from health care, to groceries, to child care.
In Congress, I’ve fought every day to address these challenges. They aren’t new, and I’m ready to keep confronting them head-on.
**But we won’t stop there.**
This is the state, more than any other, that guaranteed our freedom as we fought for our nation’s independence. Today, we can also be the state that sets the gold standard for protecting rights and freedoms we know will be under attack from Donald Trump’s Washington – beginning with abortion rights.
Because in New Jersey, we love our country. We’re proud of our state. We value our freedoms. **And we’ll defend them with everything we’ve got.**
In the Navy, I was on a mission to protect our country. Now, I’m announcing my candidacy for governor on a mission to get things done for New Jersey.
**[Peter, I’m asking you to join us. Will you help us make the beginning of our campaign as strong as possible by splitting a contribution of any amount?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84644?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=10&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=11&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=12&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=13&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=14&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84645?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=15&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84644?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=16&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6)
---
**This will be a campaign we build together.** We all have a place and a say in New Jersey’s future. I have met so many people who believe as deeply as I do in the promise of our state.
Let’s get to work!
— Mikie
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84644?refcode=em20241212-8690&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=8690%2E614464%2ENE5xP6)

Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.
