name: Amanda Chase
subject: Here They Go Again
body:
I AM A MEMBER OF THE GOP IN GOOD STANDING
| | |
---
|
# ELECTION DAY SHENANIGANS
---
|
# MESSAGE TO MY SUPPORTERS
---
|
# BEWARE OF FAKE NEWS
---
|
# HERE THEY GO AGAIN
---
| | | |
---

I am a member in good standing with the Appomattox GOP.

While you don't have to be a member of a Republican Committee to run for state senate, I am a member.

Some establishment Republicans want to confuse voters and the press by incorrectly insisting that you must be a member of a committee and in good standing to run for state senate .

They are trying to falsely circulate that I'm going to be disqualified tomorrow under the false pretense that I'm not a member in good standing because of false claims that I ran a "write in" campaign against my Republican primary opponent last year.

PLEASE DO NOT BELIEVE THIS.

Party officials have already debunked this false rumor and put in writing that I'm a member in good standing. So don't listen to anyone who says otherwise. Instead, please refer them to the documentation below.

We have hired an attorney to challenge any issues that come up tomorrow.

Republican Minority Leader Tommy Norment graciously thanked me for not running a write in campaign.

On Tuesday, October 1, 2024, I became a voting member of the Appomattox GOP as confirmed in writing by Appomattox Chair Robin Wolfskill, 5th Congressional District Chair Rick Buchanon and by Chesterfield County GOP Chair Dee Dee VanBuren and verbally by First Congressional District Chair Jeff Ryer.

That documentation is at the bottom of this letter.
See you tomorrow!

###

Here we go again. Establishment Republicans don't want me to run for state senate in Senate District 10 and are doing their best to try to stop me. It's actually election interference.

As you may remember, Chesterfield County Republicans voted in a new Chesterfield County GOP Executive Committee in March.

The Old Guard that got kicked out is ticked off and they are trying to stir things up for me again, but this time in the 5th Congressional District where I now live.

One of the former "kicked out" members who isn't even in the first or fifth district is trying to interfere in the election.

I am the front runner in this race and they are afraid of me.
They know I will win.

Just like they tried to take out President Trump and disqualify him, they are trying to do to me. Please see the documentation below as this is unfolding.
| FROM THE DESK OF FORMER STATE SENATOR AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# RESPONSE TO
# 4TH DISTRICT CHAIR'S
# INAPPROPRIATE EMAIL
---
| September, 27 2024
Dear Chairman Buchanan, As Republicans, we should all be on the same team.
My apologies in advance for the inappropriate and felonious statement from current 4th Congressional District Chair Carey Allen, who has no jurisdiction or authority on matters pertaining to the First Congressional District, where I last resided in Chesterfield for almost 25 years and before moving to the Fifth Congressional District in Appomattox, where I now reside.
Today, I am reaching out to you to set the record straight regarding false statements made by Carey Allen, who was recently dismissed as Vice Chair of the Chesterfield GOP Committee by the voters in Chesterfield who witnessed first hand her inappropriate behavior and abuse of her position. Thankfully, in March a new executive leadership team was elected overwhelmingly 3 to 1 by Republicans in Chesterfield.
Jeff Ryer, who is the current 1st Congressional District Chair and Chris Marston, GOP attorney, have advised me on several occasions, including recently, that Ms. Allen's unsigned letter stating that I was no longer able to participate in Republican Party politics was completely illegal and void and therefore no appeal was required or needed.
Jeff Ryer and Chris Marston both stated that I am fully able to participate in Republican Party politics. In a phone conversation with Jeff Ryer on September 26, Jeff stated that he would contact both you and the Appomattox Chair to correct Carey Allen's continued false statements and that I am eligible for membership.
Sadly, this is yet another nefarious attempt by Ms. Allen to insert herself in areas in which she has no authority and for the sole purpose to cast doubt on my reputation as a Republican in good standing in a community where I now reside.
I've included documented photos from my Facebook page that Carey Allen omitted showing where I did in fact support the Republican nominee for State Senate Glen Sturtevant and the entire Republican Ticket on both September 12, 2023 and November 4, 2023. In the first post I even discouraged my supporters from issuing a write-in campaign.
There's nothing wrong with asking questions of a party official who is presiding over the election process, when some campaigns are given more access to the process than others, leaving an appearance of maladministration.
I had every right to challenge then Chesterfield County Chairwoman Leslie Haley's decision to allow my opponent Senator Glen Sturtevant's campaign manager to be the sole campaign present for the certification of the early voting machines, instead of choosing a neutral Republican to oversee the process and casting a dark cloud over the process.
Our campaign went through the proper channels legally and through the party to express our concerns. In fact, Chesterfield Republicans were so upset over these actions by Ms. Haley and her executive committee to include Ms. Allen, that they were swiftly voted out of office and replaced by now Chairwoman Dee Dee VanBuren and her executive committee.
This is simply a matter of sour grapes by 4th Congressional District Chair Carey Allen. Perhaps she is upset because the slate of Chesterfield GOP candidates that I supported in the March 2024 primary won and as a result she lost her position as Vice-Chair, a position she has held for over a decade.
I have faithfully supported our Republican nominees since I first joined the Chesterfield GOP in 2008 and have been a loyal and faithful member who has worked for many of our elected members of Congress, Governor and Attorney General and as a representative of countless campaigns.
I've also served as a member of the Senate as a Republican for 8 years from 2016 through 2023. These are simply baseless allegations that should be dealt with and seen for what they are- sour grapes. Carey Allen and her executive committee failed to follow the Republican Party Plan and illegally kicked me out of the party. Here's the clencher. I was their 2019 Republican Virginia Senate nominee for Senate District 11. Thankfully, I still won despite their attempts to sabotage my campaign.
Ms. Allen has never run any of her baseless claims before the Chesterfield County Republican membership, and any meeting she did have was behind closed doors. I've never been called or asked for an explanation for any of her allegations, in violation of the Party Plan.
No vote from the Chesterfield County Republican Committee was EVER taken on her actions against me. She knew she wouldn't have the votes.
Republicans in Chesterfield got tired of her inappropriate behavior and correctly voted her out of office. She failed to have a thorough investigation of any of her claims over the years and not once took any of her assertions before the Chesterfield County Republican Committee or investigative committee for a vote. She made these decisions either on her own or behind closed doors.
Carey Allen should be disciplined appropriately for her baseless attacks and continued harassment of a respected member of the community and former Republican senator who has worked tirelessly for her district before legal action is taken for her continued harassment, defamation and interference with an election.
She is trying to interfere with my 2024 Senate campaign for Senate District 10 and should be immediately instructed by party leaders to cease and desist before I seek legal action for her continued harassment and defamation.
Make no mistake. This is an attempt by Ms. Allen to try to delay or deny my membership to the Appomattox GOP which should take place this coming Tuesday, October 1 and cast doubt over my ability to seek the Republican nomination for State Senate. Party leadership must immediately intervene before further damages are incurred.
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
# LETTER FROM REPUBLICAN SENATE LEADER SENATOR TOMMY NORMENT
---
| |
---
|
# LETTER FROM REPUBLICAN
# 5th DISTRICT CHAIR RICK BUCHANAN
---
| |
---
|
# LETTER FROM CHESTERFIELD COUNTY GOP CHAIR DEE DEE VAN BUREN
---
| |
---
|
# LETTER FROM APPOMATTOX GOP CHAIR ROBIN WOLFSKILL
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
# DOCUMENTATION
---
| |
---
|
# INAPPROPRIATE STATEMENT FROM 4TH CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT CHAIR
---
|
Dear Chairman Buchanan,
I hope this message finds you in good health. Pursuant to the direction of Chairman Rich Anderson, I am writing to formally notify both you and the Chairman of the Appomattox County Republican Committee, Ms. Robin Wolfskill, of former Senator Amanda Chase's relocation to Appomattox County, and her intention to join the Appomattox County Republican Committee. This communication serves as formal notice of her current membership status within the Virginia GOP.
As you may be aware, Senator Chase has been previously removed from the Republican Party under the provisions of Articles I and VII of the Party Plan, resulting in two separate four-year removals. The first removal took effect on September 30, 2019, and the second on March 19, 2024. Senator Chase did not file an appeal within the 30-day period afforded for such actions, with the respective appeal deadlines of October 30, 2019, and April 19, 2024. Consequently, she is currently barred from participating in any party activities until April 19, 2028, pursuant to her most recent Article I violation.
To ensure full awareness among the necessary parties, I have copied Jeff Ryer, whose jurisdiction partially covers this matter, and who was present as a member of the Credentials Committee when Senator Chase was formally notified of her second removal during the Chesterfield County Republican Committee (CCRC) Canvas on March 19, 2024. The Credentials Committee, under the leadership of former CCRC Chairman Leslie Haley and Credentials Chairman Tara Carroll, issued the notice. Former CCRC Chairman Tara Carroll had also overseen the handling of Senator Chase's first Article I violation. For complete transparency, I have also included RPV Chairman Rich Anderson and RPV General Counsel Chris Marston in this communication.
Senator Chase's most recent four-year removal was precipitated by various social media posts in which she expressed her intent to run a write-in campaign against the then-Republican nominee, now duly elected Senator Glen Sturtevant for the 12th State Senate District. Furthermore, she publicly called for the resignation of Leslie Haley and voiced her refusal to support Senator Sturtevant, citing her belief that he was dishonorable. These statements were made during the June 26, 2023, meeting of the CCRC, addressed to the entire body prior to adjournment. It is important to note that Senator Chase had previously declared in writing her intent to support the party nominee, as required for her candidacy in the Republican Primary for Senate District 12, which was held on June 21, 2023.
If you or Ms. Wolfskill have any questions or require further clarification, please do not hesitate to contact me.
Sincerely,
Carey Allen Chair, 4th Congressional District Republican Committee

---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---

Please see the documentation below as this is unfolding. | FROM THE DESK OF FORMER STATE SENATOR AMANDA CHASE | RESPONSE TO 4TH DISTRICT CHAIR'S INAPPROPRIATE EMAIL | September, 27 2024 Dear Chairman Buchanan, As Republicans, we should all be on the same team. My apologies in advance for the inappropriate and felonious statement from current 4th Congressional District Chair Carey Allen, who has no jurisdiction or authority on matters pertaining to the First Congressional District, where I last resided in Chesterfield for almost 25 years and before moving to the Fifth Congressional District in Appomattox, where I now reside. Today, I am reaching out to you to set the record straight regarding false statements made by Carey Allen, who was recently dismissed as Vice Chair of the Chesterfield GOP Committee by the voters in Chesterfield who witnessed first hand her inappropriate behavior and abuse of her position. Thankfully, in March a new executive leadership team was elected overwhelmingly 3 to 1 by Republicans in Chesterfield. Jeff Ryer, who is the current 1st Congressional District Chair and Chris Marston, GOP attorney, have advised me on several occasions, including recently, that Ms. Allen's unsigned letter stating that I was no longer able to participate in Republican Party politics was completely illegal and void and therefore no appeal was required or needed. Jeff Ryer and Chris Marston both stated that I am fully able to participate in Republican Party politics. In a phone conversation with Jeff Ryer on September 26, Jeff stated that he would contact both you and the Appomattox Chair to correct Carey Allen's continued false statements and that I am eligible for membership. Sadly, this is yet another nefarious attempt by Ms. Allen to insert herself in areas in which she has no authority and for the sole purpose to cast doubt on my reputation as a Republican in good standing in a community where I now reside. I've included documented photos from my Facebook page that Carey Allen omitted showing where I did in fact support the Republican nominee for State Senate Glen Sturtevant and the entire Republican Ticket on both September 12, 2023 and November 4, 2023. In the first post I even discouraged my supporters from issuing a write-in campaign. There's nothing wrong with asking questions of a party official who is presiding over the election process, when some campaigns are given more access to the process than others, leaving an appearance of maladministration. I had every right to challenge then Chesterfield County Chairwoman Leslie Haley's decision to allow my opponent Senator Glen Sturtevant's campaign manager to be the sole campaign present for the certification of the early voting machines, instead of choosing a neutral Republican to oversee the process and casting a dark cloud over the process. Our campaign went through the proper channels legally and through the party to express our concerns. In fact, Chesterfield Republicans were so upset over these actions by Ms. Haley and her executive committee to include Ms. Allen, that they were swiftly voted out of office and replaced by now Chairwoman Dee Dee VanBuren and her executive committee. This is simply a matter of sour grapes by 4th Congressional District Chair Carey Allen. Perhaps she is upset because the slate of Chesterfield GOP candidates that I supported in the March 2024 primary won and as a result she lost her position as Vice-Chair, a position she has held for over a decade. I have faithfully supported our Republican nominees since I first joined the Chesterfield GOP in 2008 and have been a loyal and faithful member who has worked for many of our elected members of Congress, Governor and Attorney General and as a representative of countless campaigns. I've also served as a member of the Senate as a Republican for 8 years from 2016 through 2023. These are simply baseless allegations that should be dealt with and seen for what they are- sour grapes. Carey Allen and her executive committee failed to follow the Republican Party Plan and illegally kicked me out of the party. Here's the clencher. I was their 2019 Republican Virginia Senate nominee for Senate District 11. Thankfully, I still won despite their attempts to sabotage my campaign. Ms. Allen has never run any of her baseless claims before the Chesterfield County Republican membership, and any meeting she did have was behind closed doors. I've never been called or asked for an explanation for any of her allegations, in violation of the Party Plan. No vote from the Chesterfield County Republican Committee was EVER taken on her actions against me. She knew she wouldn't have the votes. Republicans in Chesterfield got tired of her inappropriate behavior and correctly voted her out of office. She failed to have a thorough investigation of any of her claims over the years and not once took any of her assertions before the Chesterfield County Republican Committee or investigative committee for a vote. She made these decisions either on her own or behind closed doors. Carey Allen should be disciplined appropriately for her baseless attacks and continued harassment of a respected member of the community and former Republican senator who has worked tirelessly for her district before legal action is taken for her continued harassment, defamation and interference with an election. She is trying to interfere with my 2024 Senate campaign for Senate District 10 and should be immediately instructed by party leaders to cease and desist before I seek legal action for her continued harassment and defamation. Make no mistake. This is an attempt by Ms. Allen to try to delay or deny my membership to the Appomattox GOP which should take place this coming Tuesday, October 1 and cast doubt over my ability to seek the Republican nomination for State Senate. Party leadership must immediately intervene before further damages are incurred. Sincerely, | | | LETTER FROM REPUBLICAN SENATE LEADER SENATOR TOMMY NORMENT | | | LETTER FROM REPUBLICAN 5th DISTRICT CHAIR RICK BUCHANAN | | | LETTER FROM CHESTERFIELD COUNTY GOP CHAIR DEE DEE VAN BUREN | | | LETTER FROM APPOMATTOX GOP CHAIR ROBIN WOLFSKILL | | | | | | | DOCUMENTATION | | | INAPPROPRIATE STATEMENT FROM 4TH CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT CHAIR | Dear Chairman Buchanan, I hope this message finds you in good health. Pursuant to the direction of Chairman Rich Anderson, I am writing to formally notify both you and the Chairman of the Appomattox County Republican Committee, Ms. Robin Wolfskill, of former Senator Amanda Chase's relocation to Appomattox County, and her intention to join the Appomattox County Republican Committee. This communication serves as formal notice of her current membership status within the Virginia GOP. As you may be aware, Senator Chase has been previously removed from the Republican Party under the provisions of Articles I and VII of the Party Plan, resulting in two separate four-year removals. The first removal took effect on September 30, 2019, and the second on March 19, 2024. Senator Chase did not file an appeal within the 30-day period afforded for such actions, with the respective appeal deadlines of October 30, 2019, and April 19, 2024. Consequently, she is currently barred from participating in any party activities until April 19, 2028, pursuant to her most recent Article I violation. To ensure full awareness among the necessary parties, I have copied Jeff Ryer, whose jurisdiction partially covers this matter, and who was present as a member of the Credentials Committee when Senator Chase was formally notified of her second removal during the Chesterfield County Republican Committee (CCRC) Canvas on March 19, 2024. The Credentials Committee, under the leadership of former CCRC Chairman Leslie Haley and Credentials Chairman Tara Carroll, issued the notice. Former CCRC Chairman Tara Carroll had also overseen the handling of Senator Chase's first Article I violation. For complete transparency, I have also included RPV Chairman Rich Anderson and RPV General Counsel Chris Marston in this communication. Senator Chase's most recent four-year removal was precipitated by various social media posts in which she expressed her intent to run a write-in campaign against the then-Republican nominee, now duly elected Senator Glen Sturtevant for the 12th State Senate District. Furthermore, she publicly called for the resignation of Leslie Haley and voiced her refusal to support Senator Sturtevant, citing her belief that he was dishonorable. These statements were made during the June 26, 2023, meeting of the CCRC, addressed to the entire body prior to adjournment. It is important to note that Senator Chase had previously declared in writing her intent to support the party nominee, as required for her candidacy in the Republican Primary for Senate District 12, which was held on June 21, 2023. If you or Ms. Wolfskill have any questions or require further clarification, please do not hesitate to contact me. Sincerely, Carey Allen Chair, 4th Congressional District Republican Committee | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811 | Midlothian, VA 23112 US | | | | | | |

name: The Squad
subject: Our truth
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241212-1146-foote&t=1001&akid=1146%2E342411%2ECR7tZb ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’re facing very real challenges, but the good news is that we have the
people-power to fight for the future we deserve. And we won’t back down.

Together, we’ve built a powerful Squad of people who believe in the real
impact of collective action, mobilizing, and organizing for our rights.
And right now, we’re focused on ending the year strong to set ourselves up
for success come 2025.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241212-movement.6nXWgw&refcode=em20241212-1146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1146%2E342411%2ECR7tZb ]Our mid-month fundraising check in is this Sunday, and we need your
help to ensure we have the resources to keep pace with our future plans.
Can we count on you to chip in $3 to help us stay on track?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241212-movement.6nXWgw&refcode=em20241212-1146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1146%2E342411%2ECR7tZb ]Contribute ››

Without your support our Squad can’t defend our progressive values. The
threats to vulnerable communities and our hard-won progress is growing.
And we know MAGA forces are gearing up to take our Squad down while
attacking our climate, housing, education, and more.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are unafraid to stand up against
the far-right and Trump’s destructive leadership. And when our Squad
speaks truth to power, power fights back. But with you by our side, our
grassroots movement is strong and growing.

Regardless of what happens, we’re in this together,
Peter. Let’s finish this year
strong and continue building the Squad we need to fight for lashing
change.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241212-movement.6nXWgw&refcode=em20241212-1146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1146%2E342411%2ECR7tZb ]Chip in today to help us ramp up our fundraising efforts ahead of our
mid-month fundraising check in on Sunday night.

Together,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1146%2E342411%2ECR7tZb

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, We’re facing very real challenges, but the good news is that we have the people-power to fight for the future we deserve. And we won’t back down. Together, we’ve built a powerful Squad of people who believe in the real impact of collective action, mobilizing, and organizing for our rights. And right now, we’re focused on ending the year strong to set ourselves up for success come 2025. [ ]Our mid-month fundraising check in is this Sunday, and we need your help to ensure we have the resources to keep pace with our future plans. Can we count on you to chip in $3 to help us stay on track? [ ]Contribute ›› Without your support our Squad can’t defend our progressive values. The threats to vulnerable communities and our hard-won progress is growing. And we know MAGA forces are gearing up to take our Squad down while attacking our climate, housing, education, and more. Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are unafraid to stand up against the far-right and Trump’s destructive leadership. And when our Squad speaks truth to power, power fights back. But with you by our side, our grassroots movement is strong and growing. Regardless of what happens, we’re in this together, Peter. Let’s finish this year strong and continue building the Squad we need to fight for lashing change. [ ]Chip in today to help us ramp up our fundraising efforts ahead of our mid-month fundraising check in on Sunday night. Together, The Squad

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The threat of "chilling" legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We don't want to see any nonprofit bludgeoned and silenced for dissent -- especially not one dedicated to protecting and expanding our right to vote. This dangerous bill needs to be stopped before bad actors are empowered to weaponize the tax code against organizations they don't agree with.
Please, RUSH $25 or more today to stop this "chilling" bill before it's too late >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121224_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121224_2&amount=25]
Truthout: House Passes Chilling “Nonprofit Killer” Bill [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121224_2&amount=25]
We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President-elect Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes has passed a major hurdle toward becoming law, recently passing in the U.S. House of Representatives.
The bill, also known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons.
“ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin.
Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House now and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress next year. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121224_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121224_2&amount=25]

clean_body: We don't want to see any nonprofit bludgeoned and silenced for dissent -- especially not one dedicated to protecting and expanding our right to vote. This dangerous bill needs to be stopped before bad actors are empowered to weaponize the tax code against organizations they don't agree with. Please, RUSH $25 or more today to stop this "chilling" bill before it's too late >> [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Truthout: House Passes Chilling “Nonprofit Killer” Bill [] We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President-elect Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes has passed a major hurdle toward becoming law, recently passing in the U.S. House of Representatives. The bill, also known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. “ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin. Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House now and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress next year. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? * **TOP NEWS**

"**Dallas Hero threatens lawsuit if city does not remove homeless encampments in 60 days,** " Dallas Morning News' **Devyani Chhetri** -- "The City of Dallas may be in for another lawsuit if it doesn't enforce a state law that bans unauthorized camping in public spaces and removes homeless encampments from its sidewalks.

Dallas Hero, the nonprofit that led the ballot measure to waive municipal immunity and expose the city to lawsuits if it violates the charter and state law, sent a 60-day notice to the Dallas City Council on Wednesday.

In his letter to city officials, **Art Martinez De Vara** , an attorney for the nonprofit, said the city needed to immediately enforce state law and provide updates on how the city intends to comply with state law.

The letter also cited a U.S. Supreme Court ruling earlier this year that upheld bans on encampments and gave state and local municipalities the authority to fine people experiencing homelessness for sleeping in public areas.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/2c35acf4-5c03-4da3-954b-f4195ab25dbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Prop S emphasizes the importance of upholding public safety and ensuring accountability in addressing this issue. Dallas HERO is giving you 60 days to comply. Public safety cannot wait-- let's get this done," [Dallas Hero said on X](https://substack.com/redirect/936eafa7-28ac-4e16-ab46-032dcd1d8e23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

_The Dallas Morning News_ has reached out to city officials for comment.

The origins of the case began in Grants Pass, a rural town in Oregon. It was targeted at a federal appeals court ruling that disallowed local municipalities from fining people $295 for sleeping outside after tents began crowding public parks and said that such bans violated the Eighth Amendment in areas where there aren't enough shelter beds.

So far, Dallas officials have not clearly outlined if they are enforcing the state's camping ban and fining people for sleeping outside. A coalition of providers, led by Housing Forward, the agency at the forefront of the homelessness response in Dallas and Collin counties, has been working with city officials to rehouse people through the street-to-home operation.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/2c35acf4-5c03-4da3-954b-f4195ab25dbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The group helped rehouse more than 100 people who had been experiencing homelessness and were sleeping in camps near City Hall. The project in itself is based on the "housing first" philosophy, which states that homelessness is a housing issue and putting a roof over one's head is the only way to permanently end it.

City officials have vowed that they would cut homelessness in half by 2026. Lately, council members have been pushing for temporary housing measures in [tiny homes and sanctioned parking and camping sites](https://substack.com/redirect/7d4d2aa3-7c03-4dad-ac67-17c820c4a530?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to speed up the process of moving camps away from public spaces." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Dallas Hero threatens lawsuit if city does not remove homeless encampments in 60 days, " Dallas Morning News' Devyani Chhetri -- "The City of Dallas may be in for another lawsuit if it doesn't enforce a state law that bans unauthorized camping in public spaces and removes homeless encampments from its sidewalks. Dallas Hero, the nonprofit that led the ballot measure to waive municipal immunity and expose the city to lawsuits if it violates the charter and state law, sent a 60-day notice to the Dallas City Council on Wednesday. In his letter to city officials, Art Martinez De Vara , an attorney for the nonprofit, said the city needed to immediately enforce state law and provide updates on how the city intends to comply with state law. The letter also cited a U.S. Supreme Court ruling earlier this year that upheld bans on encampments and gave state and local municipalities the authority to fine people experiencing homelessness for sleeping in public areas. "Prop S emphasizes the importance of upholding public safety and ensuring accountability in addressing this issue. Dallas HERO is giving you 60 days to comply. Public safety cannot wait-- let's get this done," . The Dallas Morning News has reached out to city officials for comment. The origins of the case began in Grants Pass, a rural town in Oregon. It was targeted at a federal appeals court ruling that disallowed local municipalities from fining people $295 for sleeping outside after tents began crowding public parks and said that such bans violated the Eighth Amendment in areas where there aren't enough shelter beds. So far, Dallas officials have not clearly outlined if they are enforcing the state's camping ban and fining people for sleeping outside. A coalition of providers, led by Housing Forward, the agency at the forefront of the homelessness response in Dallas and Collin counties, has been working with city officials to rehouse people through the street-to-home operation. The group helped rehouse more than 100 people who had been experiencing homelessness and were sleeping in camps near City Hall. The project in itself is based on the "housing first" philosophy, which states that homelessness is a housing issue and putting a roof over one's head is the only way to permanently end it. City officials have vowed that they would cut homelessness in half by 2026. Lately, council members have been pushing for temporary housing measures in to speed up the process of moving camps away from public spaces." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Dallas Hero threatens lawsuit if city does not remove homeless encampments in 60 days,** " Dallas Morning News' **Devyani Chhetri** -- "The City of Dallas may be in for another lawsuit if it doesn't enforce a state law that bans unauthorized camping in public spaces and removes homeless encampments from its sidewalks.

Dallas Hero, the nonprofit that led the ballot measure to waive municipal immunity and expose the city to lawsuits if it violates the charter and state law, sent a 60-day notice to the Dallas City Council on Wednesday.

In his letter to city officials, **Art Martinez De Vara** , an attorney for the nonprofit, said the city needed to immediately enforce state law and provide updates on how the city intends to comply with state law.

The letter also cited a U.S. Supreme Court ruling earlier this year that upheld bans on encampments and gave state and local municipalities the authority to fine people experiencing homelessness for sleeping in public areas.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc6f664-567c-4cae-9c4f-d87687c0c8d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Prop S emphasizes the importance of upholding public safety and ensuring accountability in addressing this issue. Dallas HERO is giving you 60 days to comply. Public safety cannot wait-- let's get this done," [Dallas Hero said on X](https://substack.com/redirect/bcb23c73-80a9-4683-a5b1-d98628bc31a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

_The Dallas Morning News_ has reached out to city officials for comment.

The origins of the case began in Grants Pass, a rural town in Oregon. It was targeted at a federal appeals court ruling that disallowed local municipalities from fining people $295 for sleeping outside after tents began crowding public parks and said that such bans violated the Eighth Amendment in areas where there aren't enough shelter beds.

So far, Dallas officials have not clearly outlined if they are enforcing the state's camping ban and fining people for sleeping outside. A coalition of providers, led by Housing Forward, the agency at the forefront of the homelessness response in Dallas and Collin counties, has been working with city officials to rehouse people through the street-to-home operation.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc6f664-567c-4cae-9c4f-d87687c0c8d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The group helped rehouse more than 100 people who had been experiencing homelessness and were sleeping in camps near City Hall. The project in itself is based on the "housing first" philosophy, which states that homelessness is a housing issue and putting a roof over one's head is the only way to permanently end it.

City officials have vowed that they would cut homelessness in half by 2026. Lately, council members have been pushing for temporary housing measures in [tiny homes and sanctioned parking and camping sites](https://substack.com/redirect/7ac3c6b4-14e6-4c9e-b765-a58f84405720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to speed up the process of moving camps away from public spaces." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Dallas Hero threatens lawsuit if city does not remove homeless encampments in 60 days, " Dallas Morning News' Devyani Chhetri -- "The City of Dallas may be in for another lawsuit if it doesn't enforce a state law that bans unauthorized camping in public spaces and removes homeless encampments from its sidewalks. Dallas Hero, the nonprofit that led the ballot measure to waive municipal immunity and expose the city to lawsuits if it violates the charter and state law, sent a 60-day notice to the Dallas City Council on Wednesday. In his letter to city officials, Art Martinez De Vara , an attorney for the nonprofit, said the city needed to immediately enforce state law and provide updates on how the city intends to comply with state law. The letter also cited a U.S. Supreme Court ruling earlier this year that upheld bans on encampments and gave state and local municipalities the authority to fine people experiencing homelessness for sleeping in public areas. "Prop S emphasizes the importance of upholding public safety and ensuring accountability in addressing this issue. Dallas HERO is giving you 60 days to comply. Public safety cannot wait-- let's get this done," . The Dallas Morning News has reached out to city officials for comment. The origins of the case began in Grants Pass, a rural town in Oregon. It was targeted at a federal appeals court ruling that disallowed local municipalities from fining people $295 for sleeping outside after tents began crowding public parks and said that such bans violated the Eighth Amendment in areas where there aren't enough shelter beds. So far, Dallas officials have not clearly outlined if they are enforcing the state's camping ban and fining people for sleeping outside. A coalition of providers, led by Housing Forward, the agency at the forefront of the homelessness response in Dallas and Collin counties, has been working with city officials to rehouse people through the street-to-home operation. The group helped rehouse more than 100 people who had been experiencing homelessness and were sleeping in camps near City Hall. The project in itself is based on the "housing first" philosophy, which states that homelessness is a housing issue and putting a roof over one's head is the only way to permanently end it. City officials have vowed that they would cut homelessness in half by 2026. Lately, council members have been pushing for temporary housing measures in to speed up the process of moving camps away from public spaces." name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Why we need Christian attorneys
body:
Most Christians don’t realize this...| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2d5f22ce8700429a8ce4cee5a6aaef18&_e=l9xUEDJpGfvYg53nOJVEEm2vNHd22PSX26DOCihz8aQJgWCDGn9bndecUyVoc_zeisaPmBh7ZdAMrrSK-OXoN8HvlZBj83tRc2nKiRwAjWHptkNdh0qNj02F2YjPgnA0-9DBtz0GBiSg36smt-DphSW5NGLvoM0z2iWNHKTJkf3QO_Z36KLKgto8M0xi2La_ZR7WYeYp7LZujX7VcNEsGP9CoXDuEIfhg7prXXUISwyWK9vrbCYh_nMNPzUq1N8wA7dMzeuj28vSX4GEr-4IT4eBwSC0RY2nooaugRqkzhpfp7viAI2XOstnAKKdC3LB)
---
Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2d5f22ce8700429a8ce4cee5a6aaef18&_e=l9xUEDJpGfvYg53nOJVEEm2vNHd22PSX26DOCihz8aQJgWCDGn9bndecUyVoc_zeisaPmBh7ZdAMrrSK-OXoN8HvlZBj83tRc2nKiRwAjWHptkNdh0qNj02F2YjPgnA0-9DBtz0GBiSg36smt-DphSW5NGLvoM0z2iWNHKTJkf3ZRquzQNeUwQAFvXEIC4P-sVoHAd5d2lWWhu4rdzlUPle9ng-fkenIw_HWtPOeFeXTSHKIcvy_Tl1eN1cikK4hP-6mnh75UDLr-lO2BuG6zYuAbfi3qe7asYuKlpQGvjTTh7OV9EeEOsgOK5zpReNi)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2d5f22ce8700429a8ce4cee5a6aaef18&_e=l9xUEDJpGfvYg53nOJVEEm2vNHd22PSX26DOCihz8aQJgWCDGn9bndecUyVoc_zeisaPmBh7ZdAMrrSK-OXoN8HvlZBj83tRc2nKiRwAjWHptkNdh0qNj02F2YjPgnA0-9DBtz0GBiSg36smt-DphSW5NGLvoM0z2iWNHKTJkf2b8eFDnaZWEVmZ-WkBUSRp-MqxJdPTwkILvmrB31EgBDdtLgzh2CeDAUFR2rKTpqUvLbhWnnOfje2uzF8xDkrdoofnjLY9OXP02cU7Jzlfn1w4f4H6iEruITYUvcE2EgaZGSvB3lldAinGrpWPl6Wu)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2d5f22ce8700429a8ce4cee5a6aaef18&_e=l9xUEDJpGfvYg53nOJVEEm2vNHd22PSX26DOCihz8aQJgWCDGn9bndecUyVoc_zeisaPmBh7ZdAMrrSK-OXoN8HvlZBj83tRc2nKiRwAjWHptkNdh0qNj02F2YjPgnA0-9DBtz0GBiSg36smt-DphSW5NGLvoM0z2iWNHKTJkf3ewuuxVYYCPy1vYwA88x7ERm5GL_dwdgHvBfvVqzHBsBQrt4LIGEFtuVBDLz1ul4noNnHQtGO06zkhV08XJdlZRBwaiTDAThCXOOzir6XLS_RE1VEFc-TMtoAxk_sHGNzR3G8m9Zy2aLbvItxGtYtc)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2d5f22ce8700429a8ce4cee5a6aaef18&_e=l9xUEDJpGfvYg53nOJVEEm2vNHd22PSX26DOCihz8aQJgWCDGn9bndecUyVoc_zeisaPmBh7ZdAMrrSK-OXoN8HvlZBj83tRc2nKiRwAjWHptkNdh0qNj02F2YjPgnA0-9DBtz0GBiSg36smt-DphSW5NGLvoM0z2iWNHKTJkf3MGzzSvM0HPTm8Dn_q0nZLK5vXTHyLO60bC9Vi_HFybmfH77SqljdLcuwo4IGSTYCwbP3N_mTkMSb0gNlDUhaaSLmQAhNu9NxX6qL0JnpV7ec-BT7ANp14Mqo1h4MXYfXpQok0SI0GTawS2MkoLILq)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=2d5f22ce8700429a8ce4cee5a6aaef18&_e=l9xUEDJpGfvYg53nOJVEEm2vNHd22PSX26DOCihz8aQJgWCDGn9bndecUyVoc_zeisaPmBh7ZdAMrrSK-OXoN8HvlZBj83tRc2nKiRwAjWHptkNdh0qNj02F2YjPgnA0-9DBtz0GBiSg36smt-DphSW5NGLvoM0z2iWNHKTJkf1LWZkRVohrvEB-B9K6aaQ9_9uTgzj7sXsgbIuXkQeCD2pb_qPzTWVXZ6xMzSPAC3z8s8B2B-JFo7N_9g9INWZRICJ0bFMzHZVS1bfGaSk0S53CVRJu4m_VrZJRFT7c0vFrWuJ_1lvfiVwfSCScW04t)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society

clean_body: Most Christians don’t realize this...| | | Friend, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states. That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of personal prayer without getting fired, protection of moral conscience so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a Christian student club --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! Friend, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state. For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change. Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to: discourage or punish attorneys from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke"); stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches, sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious; prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work to defend religious freedom on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values! Friend, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work. Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society. Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo Executive Director & CEO Christian Legal Society Christian Legal Society P.O. Box 7712 McLean, VA 22106-7712

name: David Hogg
subject: I’d like to hear directly from you: Do you think I should run for DNC Vice Chair? And what are your priorities for transforming the Democratic Party? Fill out my survey here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I want to hear your thoughts,
Peter.

I’m considering running for DNC Vice Chair because we need a new
generation of bold leaders to build an intergenerational coalition in the
Democratic Party.

I’ve been traveling across the country for the past two years, talking to
everyday people and knocking on doors in every swing state you can imagine
– including some very red states like Alabama and Texas – and everywhere
else in between.

Far too many people I’ve met have described Democrats as “elitist” and
“out of touch.” People don’t believe that Democrats are really on their
side – they think we are condescending, talking down to them rather than
listening to their voices.

One thing that I’ve learned is that Democrats would rather live in a
comfortable delusion rather than an uncomfortable reality. The party needs
to open its eyes and take its fingers out of its ears. We cannot just
surround ourselves with people who already agree with us and refuse to
listen to anyone with a different opinion.

I think it’s time for leadership at the DNC that is not afraid to take
accountability for the errors Democrats have made in the past and is not
afraid of the conversations we need to have about the future of the party
and where we should go from here.

Peter, I’d like to hear directly
from you: Do you think I should run for DNC Vice Chair? And what are your
priorities for transforming the Democratic Party? Fill out my survey here:

[ https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-dnc-vice-chair-survey-20241212/?source=em20241212-1522 ]https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-dnc-vice-chair-survey-20241212/

No matter what, I’ll always stay committed to the work we’re doing
together and our mission at Leaders We Deserve to elect more young people
to public office.

Thank you for your support,

David Hogg

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1001&akid=1522%2E587540%2E7aHT2M
Update Your Information: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=1522%2E587540%2E7aHT2M

611 Pennsylvania Ave SE #192
Washington, DC 20003
info@leaderswedeserve.com

name: Anika Page
subject: Kicking off our Spring Speaker Series with Reverand Joshua C. Robertson
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/springspeakerseries?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good afternoon Friend,
We are kicking off our Spring Speaker Series! I hope you’ll join us for our upcoming event featuring **Reverend Joshua Robertson** , Senior Pastor of The Rock Church and Founder of Black Pastors United for Education (BPUE). Reverend Robertson’s passion for helping families and communities is inspiring. In 2021, he launched The Rock City Learning Center to provide students with a safe, supportive environment to grow and succeed—especially during the challenges of the pandemic. His work has transformed the lives of so many young people, turning struggles into success and reminding us of the power of education. At the event, Reverend Robertson will share how school choice can give parents the tools they need to make the best decisions for their children. He’ll also talk about how his faith fuels his work and what we can do here in Mississippi to ensure every child has access to a quality education.

clean_body: | | | | | | Good afternoon Friend, We are kicking off our Spring Speaker Series! I hope you’ll join us for our upcoming event featuring Reverend Joshua Robertson , Senior Pastor of The Rock Church and Founder of Black Pastors United for Education (BPUE). Reverend Robertson’s passion for helping families and communities is inspiring. In 2021, he launched The Rock City Learning Center to provide students with a safe, supportive environment to grow and succeed—especially during the challenges of the pandemic. His work has transformed the lives of so many young people, turning struggles into success and reminding us of the power of education. At the event, Reverend Robertson will share how school choice can give parents the tools they need to make the best decisions for their children. He’ll also talk about how his faith fuels his work and what we can do here in Mississippi to ensure every child has access to a quality education. | Click above to purchase your tickets! | This will be a great opportunity to learn from a truly dedicated advocate. I hope you’ll join us for what promises to be an uplifting and thought-provoking lunch. RSVP reserve your spot and join us for this important conversation. As always, I am looking forward to seeing you there! | | Warmest wishes, Anika Page Director of Operations | | |

Virginia is for pro-choice champions. |

National politicians get the most press coverage, but it's often statewide leaders like governors, attorneys general, and lieutenant governors who make the decisions that directly impact our daily lives. When Democratic pro-choice leaders hold these critical offices, their constituents reap real, tangible benefits to their rights and protections.

That's why we're proud to endorse three exceptional leaders fighting to protect Virginians' fundamental freedoms — **Abigail Spanberger for governor, Shannon Taylor for attorney general, and Ghazala Hashmi for lieutenant governor.** [**Right now, all three of these offices are held by Republicans pushing an extreme anti-choice agenda. Together, we can change that. Will you donate today to ensure pro-choice women have the resources to WIN in 2025?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98603083/517199092/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX23_20241212_VALeadership_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055490&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGNhZjRjOS1jM2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjRlAr74-l_qRnaaL089VeMzCMLRNLJy_XELZHvkAF4=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98603084/517199093/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX23_20241212_VALeadership_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055490&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGNhZjRjOS1jM2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjRlAr74-l_qRnaaL089VeMzCMLRNLJy_XELZHvkAF4=)

**Rep. Abigail Spanberger** (VA-GOV) is ready to become Virginia's first woman governor. In Congress, she's fought tirelessly for Virginians — lowering costs, creating jobs, and defending reproductive rights. A former CIA case officer and federal law enforcement officer, Abigail's career has been driven by public service and a commitment to keeping Americans safe. She can undo Glenn Youngkin's extremist agenda and give Virginia the pro-choice leadership it wants and deserves.

**State Sen. Ghazala Hashmi**(VA-LG) has been a trailblazer in Virginia's Senate, serving on committees focused on health, education, and local government. While Republicans sought to restrict reproductive health care, state Sen. Hashmi led efforts to protect contraception access. She's fighting to ensure that future generations, including her two daughters, enjoy more rights — not fewer.

**Shannon Taylor** (VA-AG) has 28 years of courtroom experience, and has led one of Virginia's largest prosecutorial offices as Henrico County's commonwealth's attorney since 2012. In a political atmosphere where Republicans are working tirelessly to attack our rights, Shannon will champion justice and safeguard Virginians' rights from day one as attorney general.
[**Virginia needs leaders who will stand up to the extremist Republicans rolling back our rights. Your support makes flipping Republican seats up and down the ballot possible. Donate now to help Democratic pro-choice women like Abigail, Shannon, and Ghazala win their statewide races in 2025:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98603086/517199095/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEX23_20241212_VALeadership_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055490&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGNhZjRjOS1jM2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjRlAr74-l_qRnaaL089VeMzCMLRNLJy_XELZHvkAF4=)

clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey, it’s Gabe. Did you see me on Morning Joe this morning?? 👇 = ICYMI: I talked about what it takes to win in a Trump district and how Team Vasquez went from winning by one of the slimmest margins in history to winning by over 10,000 votes. The answer is simple — traveling to every corner of our district, listening to constituents’ concerns and delivering real results that have a concrete impact on their lives. Since day one of my time in Congress, I’ve put the real people I represent over partisan politics and authentically represented the people of NM-02, just as they elected me to do. Make no mistake: This race was far from easy — but this team showed up. We flipped this district against all odds in 2022, and we’re ready for whatever Donald Trump and his Republican-led Congress might throw our way in the next two years. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = NM-02 will be the frontline as we work to rebuild our Democratic coalition in 2025 and beyond, and I’m grateful to have you standing with me. Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . We’ve been saying this for months now, but it’s true: the Virginia Governor’s race is set to be the most competitive statewide race in the country in 2025. We saw what happened here in Virginia and across the country on November 5 – Trump and Republicans made gains in places Democrats led in 2020.

This race is going to draw national attention, and with that comes outside money. We saw what happened here in Virginia and across the country on November 5 – Trump and Republicans made gains in places Democrats led in 2020. This race is going to draw national attention, and with that comes outside money. body:
what pushes me

| Peter, my path to Congress was not decided in smoke-filled rooms or carefully shaped by consultants in DC. **My commitment to public service was built across generations, and instilled in me by my family.**

During World War II, my parents and grandparents were sent to Japanese American internment camps because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost __everything__ and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98605433/517206777/238616526?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20241212_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNkYTgxZS1jY2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQ2JMoI7XQ-wN7J_wnT3rwJLwPCfeJS-1m3pH7LUuPQ=) _Despite_ being cast aside as second-class citizens, they instilled in me a deep sense of civic responsibility and commitment to public service. To love our country _despite_ its flaws, and to fight for the more perfect union that our Constitution promises. **Despite it all, they persevered.**

It’s what drove me to become a public school teacher for 20 years and eventually run for Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98605435/517206778/238616526?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20241212_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNkYTgxZS1jY2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQ2JMoI7XQ-wN7J_wnT3rwJLwPCfeJS-1m3pH7LUuPQ=) When I ran for Congress in 1994, bigotry would rear its ugly head when I was forcibly and **publicly outed as gay** by my Republican opponent.

Despite it all, **I persevered and was a sitting member of Congress when the Supreme Court legalized gay marriage in 2015.**

Today, we’re seeing some of that same racism, xenophobia, and homophobia again – especially from my MAGA counterparts in Congress. Attacks on immigrants, LGBTQ+ Americans, and women have been rising in recent years and threaten to derail decades of progress.

But despite it all, **we will prevail.**

[**Peter, hate is able to prevail when good people do nothing. So I’m asking for your support today – we can fight back against MAGA extremism if we band together! Will you chip in $7 today to stop MAGA’s erosion of our rights and help elect Democrats win? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98605436/517206779/238616526?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20241212_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNkYTgxZS1jY2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQ2JMoI7XQ-wN7J_wnT3rwJLwPCfeJS-1m3pH7LUuPQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98605443/517206786/238616526?amount=7&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20241212_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNkYTgxZS1jY2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQ2JMoI7XQ-wN7J_wnT3rwJLwPCfeJS-1m3pH7LUuPQ=)

subject: You support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists?!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22627%2E4449941%2Egajm1_)
---
Hello,

Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists after Trump made that one of the priorities for his first day.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Our data for your state is incomplete without your responses.

So we’re re-opening our poll and giving you a second chance to complete it. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241212_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22627%2E4449941%2Egajm1_)** | [COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241212_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22627%2E4449941%2Egajm1_)
---
We’ve attached the original poll below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: bad update... [FFR]
Subject: Trump wants to PARDON January 6th insurrectionists?!
To: Top Democrat
**We’re nauseous with anger:**
[ ]()
Americans are FURIOUS with Trump for scheming to pardon January 6th insurrectionists despite the fact that they tried to overthrow our government.

If we can show MASSIVE public outrage over this move, we can force Trump to walk back his promise.

**So we need input from all Democrats ASAP:**
* * *
**[_Do you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241212_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=9&akid=22627%2E4449941%2Egajm1_)**
[NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241212_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22627%2E4449941%2Egajm1_)
---
[YES, I ABSOLUTELY DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241212_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22627%2E4449941%2Egajm1_)
[I’M UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241212_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=12&akid=22627%2E4449941%2Egajm1_)
***YOU MUST RESPOND WITHIN 5 MINUTES AFTER OPENING THIS MESSAGE***
* * *
We look forward to reading your responses,

_\- Fight For Reform_

name: Martin Glusker, Team Harder
subject: The Central Valley is key
body:
We can’t take anything for granted.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98605790/517208059/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTg1ZDI1ZDEtY2NiOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bFUNoE9C826dbvuPI1y4CTjL0Wqf1HsSPv8vBc-oRWo=) | Peter, You probably saw that two of the last races called this year were right here in the Central Valley. Josh’s race wasn’t called for days. Adam Gray won by literally 187 votes. In fact, our district saw one of the largest swings from Biden -> Trump in the entire country. We went from Joe Biden +13 to Trump +2 this year. Scary stuff. California’s Central Valley has taken on national importance. It’s here where Democrats will be defending two _**must-win**_ seats if we hope to have any chance to take back the House in 2026. **[Since Josh doesn’t take corporate PAC money, we need to start preparing for the onslaught of outside money now so that we aren’t outspent next cycle. Can we count on you to send in a generous donation to kickstart our fundraising?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98605791/517208060/575540167?&refcode=E11729-20241212-CentralValleyImportance-SL-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTg1ZDI1ZDEtY2NiOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bFUNoE9C826dbvuPI1y4CTjL0Wqf1HsSPv8vBc-oRWo=)** [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98605792/517208061/1287215685?refcode=E11729-20241212-CentralValleyImportance-SB-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTg1ZDI1ZDEtY2NiOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bFUNoE9C826dbvuPI1y4CTjL0Wqf1HsSPv8vBc-oRWo=) Democrats can learn a thing or two from our election results. _First,_ it’s not enough to just be anti-Trump. clean_body: We can’t take anything for granted. | = | Peter, You probably saw that two of the last races called this year were right here in the Central Valley. Josh’s race wasn’t called for days. Adam Gray won by literally 187 votes. In fact, our district saw one of the largest swings from Biden -> Trump in the entire country. We went from Joe Biden +13 to Trump +2 this year. Scary stuff. California’s Central Valley has taken on national importance. It’s here where Democrats will be defending two must-win seats if we hope to have any chance to take back the House in 2026. = = Democrats can learn a thing or two from our election results. First, it’s not enough to just be anti-Trump. We have to listen to voters about the issues that matter to them and show Democrats can actually fix them. Second, we can’t take our Latino communities for granted. Our district has one of the most diverse populations in the country - and without the support of Latino voters, we would have lost this seat. = Thank you, Martin Glusker Deputy Campaign Manager *

This is not a drill.
Trump ran on “mass deportations” and plans to make good on the campaign promise in his first 100 days in office. Trump is threatening to end birthright citizenship and deport U.S. citizens with undocumented parents.
Now Joe Lombardo is saying he is “fully committed” to Trump’s deportation plan and will use our state resources to cruelly separate Nevada families. Not on our watch and not in our state!
