name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Here’s how we are making climate action happen.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4OTA5NTIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDY0NTM3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — The path forward on climate action runs through the states. As a supporter of LCV, you know that environmental progress doesn’t only happen
in Washington, D.C. In fact, a lot of critical progress happens at the state and
local levels — especially where LCV and our 30+ affiliates in the Conservation
Voters Movement have been successfully leading the fight to advance clean energy
and climate action. Peter, our issues remain popular — this was true even in November’s elections.To secure pro-environment policies, our movement worked to elect pro-environment
leaders — and won. Below we're sharing just a few of the important electoral
victories that YOU helped our movement win in states across the country, which
will help us to keep pushing climate action forward in the months and years
ahead: California
California voters passed Proposition 4, a historic $10 billion climate bond, which was a top priority of California Environmental Voters. The bond will provide vital funding for climate resiliency, wildfire mitigation, air quality, conservation, and clean energy, with at least 40% allocated to vulnerable and disadvantaged communities.
North Carolina
The North Carolina League of Conservation Voters (NCLCV) ran and won its largest ever electoral campaign to protect North Carolinians and their environment. NCLCV, through its independent expenditure PAC, the Conservation Votes PAC (CVP), successfully helped to elect environmental champion Josh Stein as governor, while NCLCV’s coordinated PAC, Conservation PAC, endorsed many victorious candidates, including Jeff Jackson, who will be the state’s next attorney general. CVP also helped to break the anti-environment supermajority in the state legislature, protecting the governor’s ability to veto bad legislation.
Ohio
Ohio voters passed Issue 47 to fund public transit and infrastructure in Central Ohio as part of the LinkUS initiative. The Ohio Environmental Council Action Fund celebrated this win which will increase transit services by 45% in the region, as well as help to build more than 150 miles of bike paths, trails, and sidewalks — a major victory for accessible, reliable, and sustainable transportation.
Pennsylvania
Conservation Voters of Pennsylvania celebrated that pro-environment lawmakers retained control of the state House, maintaining a one-seat majority in the face of strong headwinds. This majority means that the House will continue acting as a counterbalance to pro-polluter bills coming out of the state Senate and backing up Governor Shapiro’s pro-environmental policies. Notable victories included protecting Representatives Brian Munroe in Bucks County, Jim Haddock in Lackawanna and Luzerne Counties, and Mandy Steele in Allegheny County.
Washington
62% of Washington voters rejected Initiative 2117 that would have dismantled the landmark 2021 Climate Commitment Act (CCA) — the nation’s strongest cap-and-invest law. The carbon market created by the CCA has reduced climate pollution and generated over $2.15 billion for green projects, such as electric vehicle rebates, air quality initiatives, and clean energy infrastructure. Initiative 2117 was so bad that it was nominated by Washington Conservation Action Votes to this year’s LCV Victory Fund’s Dirty Dozen in the States https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XBdKv_ — the first time a ballot initiative has ever appeared on this list. By wide margins, Washington voters also elected pro-environment leaders for every major statewide position, including governor, state attorney general, and public lands commissioner. Peter, these recent victories by our movement give me so much hope.
They show how even with Trump as president, there’s so much progress to be made
— but only when we ALL work together. LCV and our state affiliates are fiercely committed to protecting people and the
planet, and we know how to fight back against what is coming.After anti-environment leaders won control of the federal government in 2016, we
focused on advancing clean energy progress in the states and blocking Trump’s
most extreme anti-environment policies and appointments. Today, thanks to
policies we helped win since 2017, more than 40% of peoplein the U.S. live in a city, county, or state that is committed to 100% clean
energy. Our nationwide movement is even more powerful now and will continue to make
progress in 2025 and beyond, while also pushing back on Trump’s dangerous
pro-polluter agenda. At the federal level, this means working to block MAGA
Republicans’ efforts not only to gut environmental investments from the
Inflation Reduction Act and protections for clean air, clean water, and public
lands, but also to weaken voting rights, undermine democracy, or roll back our
fundamental rights and freedoms. These attacks are both bad policy and politically unpopular. Together, we will fight to stop them while continuing to advance progress at the state and local level. Thank you for staying in the fight with us! Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11890952&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDY0NTM3MgS2&spReportId=MjEwMDY0NTM3MgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11890952&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDY0NTM3MgS2&spReportId=MjEwMDY0NTM3MgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.
clean_body: To view this mail in a browser, copy into your browser. Peter — The path forward on climate action runs through the states. As a supporter of LCV, you know that environmental progress doesn’t only happen in Washington, D.C. In fact, a lot of critical progress happens at the state and local levels — especially where LCV and our 30+ affiliates in the Conservation Voters Movement have been successfully leading the fight to advance clean energy and climate action. Peter, our issues remain popular — this was true even in November’s elections.To secure pro-environment policies, our movement worked to elect pro-environment leaders — and won. Below we're sharing just a few of the important electoral victories that YOU helped our movement win in states across the country, which will help us to keep pushing climate action forward in the months and years ahead: California California voters passed Proposition 4, a historic $10 billion climate bond, which was a top priority of California Environmental Voters. The bond will provide vital funding for climate resiliency, wildfire mitigation, air quality, conservation, and clean energy, with at least 40% allocated to vulnerable and disadvantaged communities. North Carolina The North Carolina League of Conservation Voters (NCLCV) ran and won its largest ever electoral campaign to protect North Carolinians and their environment. NCLCV, through its independent expenditure PAC, the Conservation Votes PAC (CVP), successfully helped to elect environmental champion Josh Stein as governor, while NCLCV’s coordinated PAC, Conservation PAC, endorsed many victorious candidates, including Jeff Jackson, who will be the state’s next attorney general. CVP also helped to break the anti-environment supermajority in the state legislature, protecting the governor’s ability to veto bad legislation. Ohio Ohio voters passed Issue 47 to fund public transit and infrastructure in Central Ohio as part of the LinkUS initiative. The Ohio Environmental Council Action Fund celebrated this win which will increase transit services by 45% in the region, as well as help to build more than 150 miles of bike paths, trails, and sidewalks — a major victory for accessible, reliable, and sustainable transportation. Pennsylvania Conservation Voters of Pennsylvania celebrated that pro-environment lawmakers retained control of the state House, maintaining a one-seat majority in the face of strong headwinds. This majority means that the House will continue acting as a counterbalance to pro-polluter bills coming out of the state Senate and backing up Governor Shapiro’s pro-environmental policies. Notable victories included protecting Representatives Brian Munroe in Bucks County, Jim Haddock in Lackawanna and Luzerne Counties, and Mandy Steele in Allegheny County. Washington 62% of Washington voters rejected Initiative 2117 that would have dismantled the landmark 2021 Climate Commitment Act (CCA) — the nation’s strongest cap-and-invest law. The carbon market created by the CCA has reduced climate pollution and generated over $2.15 billion for green projects, such as electric vehicle rebates, air quality initiatives, and clean energy infrastructure. Initiative 2117 was so bad that it was nominated by Washington Conservation Action Votes to this year’s LCV Victory Fund’s Dirty Dozen in the States — the first time a ballot initiative has ever appeared on this list. By wide margins, Washington voters also elected pro-environment leaders for every major statewide position, including governor, state attorney general, and public lands commissioner. Peter, these recent victories by our movement give me so much hope. They show how even with Trump as president, there’s so much progress to be made — but only when we ALL work together. LCV and our state affiliates are fiercely committed to protecting people and the planet, and we know how to fight back against what is coming.After anti-environment leaders won control of the federal government in 2016, we focused on advancing clean energy progress in the states and blocking Trump’s most extreme anti-environment policies and appointments. Today, thanks to policies we helped win since 2017, more than 40% of peoplein the U.S. live in a city, county, or state that is committed to 100% clean energy. Our nationwide movement is even more powerful now and will continue to make progress in 2025 and beyond, while also pushing back on Trump’s dangerous pro-polluter agenda. At the federal level, this means working to block MAGA Republicans’ efforts not only to gut environmental investments from the Inflation Reduction Act and protections for clean air, clean water, and public lands, but also to weaken voting rights, undermine democracy, or roll back our fundamental rights and freedoms. These attacks are both bad policy and politically unpopular. Together, we will fight to stop them while continuing to advance progress at the state and local level. Thank you for staying in the fight with us! Gene Karpinski President League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Humbly asking you to *personally* endorse Ilhan Omar today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The next two years will bring many challenges, but I know we can overcome them
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)

Friend — We were so proud to reelect Ilhan last month with the tireless help of supporters like you.
But politics moves fast, which means we don’t have time to wait around before we start rebuilding this campaign and this movement.
Not only are we weeks away from the start of the new Congress, but we are weeks away from Donald Trump stepping back into the Oval Office and beginning his attempt at a far-right transformation of America.
So, with many important fights ahead, **[we’re asking you to take 60 seconds and personally endorse Ilhan Omar today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec24-personal-endorse/?source=em241212-1-gm&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)**
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec24-personal-endorse/?source=em241212-1-gm&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)**
Ilhan has been a consistent fighter on the issues we care about, from tackling the climate crisis, to restoring the right to abortion across the country, to pushing for a ceasefire in Gaza and a more just US foreign policy.
But on each of these issues, no one person or leader can make change alone. It’s always taken a grassroots movement of regular folks like you pitching in and making their voices heard. That’s how we’ve made change in the past, and it’s how we’ll make change for our future.
**[So please: Add your name today and personally endorse Ilhan Omar as she heads back to Congress for a new term. Help us show the size and strength of this incredible movement.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec24-personal-endorse/?source=em241212-1-gm&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec24-personal-endorse/?source=em241212-1-gm&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1402_791427_0rfJ0A&akid=1402%2E791427%2E0rfJ0A)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Chairman Eric Underwood
subject: NEGOP+ Membership Program
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Chairman's Call - Featured Speaker Charlie Kirk | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e47a8578c4be/n41kepo7ku-12723907?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4468e21271&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
|
---
|
> Members who contribute at the Premium-Chairman's Club level, the Preferred-Capitol Club level, or the Plus-Victory Club level qualify to join this special call.
>
> Thank you to those who have already generously contributed to the NEGOP+ Booster Club! We look forward to your participation on Monday night.
>
> For those of you who are wanting to join the call, or give a NEGOP+ gift membership, now is YOUR opportunity!
>
> By December 13:
> 1) increase your current donation to **level up** to at least the Plus-Victory Club.
> 2) **renew** your expired Plus, Preferred, or Premium membership.
> 3) **purchase a new membership** at the Plus-Victory Club level or higher.
>
> Please see the attached flyer for details and the membership link.
>
> Thank you for supporting the NEGOP!
[**Join us today and be part of a membership that chooses****BOLD****action versus status quo politics. Click here to register and pick the membership level that suits you best.**](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=320be6c5c8&e=25844e23a8)

_**Here's a snapshot of what you can expect from each membership level:**_

**_CHAIRMAN'S CLUB_ \- _PREMIUM LEVEL_**
For a yearly fee of $600 or $50 monthly, you get all the benefits of the Preferred Level, plus:
A private invite to our Chairman's Club Dinner with VIPs
A stylish quarter-zipper sweater

**_CAPITOL CLUB_ \- _PREFERRED LEVEL_**
For a yearly fee of $450 or $37.50 monthly, you get all the benefits of the Plus Level, plus:
A choice from an array of custom local T-shirts
An annual Zoom meeting or phone call with House or Senate leadership

**_VICTORY CLUB_ \- _PLUS LEVEL_**
For a yearly fee of $300 or $25 monthly, you get all the benefits of the Basic Level, plus:
An exclusive NEGOP+ high-quality tumbler/thermos
Access to an exclusive quarterly Zoom meeting with me, the Chairman of Nebraska GOP

**_BOOSTER CLUB_ \- _BASIC LEVEL_**
For a yearly fee of $150 or $12.50 monthly, you get:
A unique NEGOP+ Club Pin
Access to exclusive NEGOP+ events [](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e83c22c3aa&e=25844e23a8)
[**Join us today and be part of a membership that believes in The People of Nebraska. Click here to register and pick the membership level that suits you best.**](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5cc1f5c76b&e=25844e23a8)

Your support is integral to the GOP's strength in Nebraska. I look forward to welcoming you to our growing NEGOP+ community!
---
| Blessings,

Eric Underwood - Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|
---

You can [update your preferences](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=6d2888ed31) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&t=b&e=25844e23a8&c=6d2888ed31).

---
| | Team,

body:
| | | Nonpartisan analysts at Inside Elections write:
Control of the House of Representatives ultimately came down to a group of voters smaller than the crowd at a Texas high school football game ... **In the three closest races won by Republicans, the combined margin of victory was 7,309 votes.**
Friend, to end the razor-thin Republican majority in the House, we only need to flip a small handful of districts ... and we can’t let Republican incumbents get a head start.
We need to raise money now to pay for ads, billboards, and get out the vote work.
**And, to fight the right-wing noise machine, we need to HAMMER Republican incumbents EARLY - we _can’t wait_ until 3 weeks before the election to run at full throttle.**
MAGA Republicans know they’re at BIG risk of losing control of Congress in 2026.
We need your help to be ready.
Thanks to grassroots donors like you, Cedar Key Progress has invested over a quarter million dollars to defeat Republicans, and _we’re not stopping now._

clean_body: | | | Nonpartisan analysts at Inside Elections write: Control of the House of Representatives ultimately came down to a group of voters smaller than the crowd at a Texas high school football game ... In the three closest races won by Republicans, the combined margin of victory was 7,309 votes. Friend, to end the razor-thin Republican majority in the House, we only need to flip a small handful of districts ... and we can’t let Republican incumbents get a head start. We need to raise money now to pay for ads, billboards, and get out the vote work. And, to fight the right-wing noise machine, we need to HAMMER Republican incumbents EARLY - we can’t wait until 3 weeks before the election to run at full throttle. MAGA Republicans know they’re at BIG risk of losing control of Congress in 2026. We need your help to be ready. Thanks to grassroots donors like you, Cedar Key Progress has invested over a quarter million dollars to defeat Republicans, and we’re not stopping now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. name: Team NDRC
subject: One of the smallest House margins in history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Fair maps held the line this election cycle.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98608270/517216202/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhNWM3YzUxLWQ0YjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i84hL86PjWsMxYj4rFwBOfjt2psIGXKNKXQEESmH0U8=&emci=21aeb636-a8b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0a5c7c51-d4b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Thanks to the work of you and this fair maps movement, our congressional maps are the fairest they’ve been in 40 years. **These maps held the line this election cycle.** Everything mostly final: The final House _seat_ margin is set to be mostly in line with the House _popular vote_ margin. When a close election leads to a close margin of seats, it means fair maps are working. That’s _good news for democracy_ , and shows that our efforts are paying off. Take a look at this graph, originally from _The New York Times_ , that shows the Republican advantage _plummeting_ in the years since NDRC began doing this work: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98608271/517216203/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HouseMargin_email_20241212-NDRC-Tier1-HouseMargin_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241212-NDRC-Tier1-HouseMargin_&utm_campaign=HouseMargin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhNWM3YzUxLWQ0YjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i84hL86PjWsMxYj4rFwBOfjt2psIGXKNKXQEESmH0U8=)
---
With focused effort, we decreased the Republican structural advantage from the egregiously gerrymandered maps from 23 seats in 2012, to 11 seats in 2020, to just three seats in 2022.
It’s clear that the House is up for grabs in 2026. So without a doubt, we should anticipate Republican attempts to gerrymander in the years ahead. (Remember that in the era of perpetual redistricting, voters haven't had the same House map for two elections in a row since 2014!)
We _must_ be ready to fight back against their power-grabbing efforts and continue to increase the number of fair maps — the number of “toss up” seats — so that pro-democracy leaders have a chance to win no matter where they run.
We’re not standing down — and we hope you’re up for the long-term fight for fairness. [**If you’re committed to helping establish fair maps around the country so that pro-democracy leaders can win up and down the ballot all across the country, please make a donation to the NDRC today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98608272/517216204/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HouseMargin_email_20241212-NDRC-Tier1-HouseMargin_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241212-NDRC-Tier1-HouseMargin_&utm_campaign=HouseMargin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhNWM3YzUxLWQ0YjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i84hL86PjWsMxYj4rFwBOfjt2psIGXKNKXQEESmH0U8=)
We believe that voters deserve fair maps. And we’re ready to give everything we’ve got to make it happen. We hope you’ll join us.
Thank you,
Team NDRC

Friend, The resignation of Christopher Wray is a great day for America as it will end the Weaponization of what has become known as the United States Department of Injustice. name: Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The vision we share for our country is still possible

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4)
---
I want to thank you for being part of this movement and for all of your support for this campaign. I’m honored to have won re-election and to be able to keep up the fight in the Senate. As we look ahead to 2025, our campaign’s mission will be to hold the Trump Administration accountable and take on every fight we can in Congress and in the courts to challenge his abuses of power. At the same time, we’ll be making the case for the progressive economic policies that Democrats must champion moving forward. Because this campaign was never about just me or just one election. It’s about the issues we all care about as a movement, the values we share, and the vision we’re building for our country. A country that looks out for families over corporations. A country that respects a woman’s right to make her own decisions about her body. A country that strives to make bold changes that touch people’s daily lives. The vision we share for our country is still possible — if we continue to fight for it. [**So if you’re in the position to make a contribution to our campaign that’s fighting against the far-right and move our country towards our progressive vision please chip in $28 or anything you can right now.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2860?amount=28&t=8&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2860?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2860?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2860?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2860?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2860?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2860?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4)
---

---
The way I see it, every time someone takes an action to support this campaign, it’s a leap of faith. They may know that if they’re the only ones donating, their $5 or $20 won’t go too far. It might only be a drop in a bucket against all the funding from the national Republicans and powerful interests that are against us. But they are not alone. They are a part of a team — this team — of people across the country who believe that big, structural change is possible and are willing to fight for it. It’s how we’ve been able to launch the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, get student debt cancellation passed, and started to make big freeloading corporations finally pay federal income taxes. One thing that all of these examples have in common? They had strong opposition from special interests. People said that these ideas would never see the light of day. That they were too hard to make possible. But this movement got it done. And it starts every time someone believes that better is possible, takes a leap of faith, and invests in something that will benefit everyone in our country. Collectively, it adds up to something powerful. [**So if you’re able to invest in our movement to pass progressive, economic policies that support working people, please make a contribution of $28 or anything you can to support our campaign.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2860?amount=28&t=14&akid=2426%2E4032634%2EBsmZC4) Thank you for everything you’ve done — and will continue to do — as a member of this team, and for being a part of this. -Elizabeth
| | | |
---

Collectively, it adds up to something powerful. Thank you for everything you’ve done — and will continue to do — as a member of this team, and for being a part of this. -Elizabeth | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2024 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We'll miss you, but you can always .

Dear Friend,

I'm so excited to announce the first stop on our REVIVE IN 25 Tour—New Orleans! New Orleans is a city of great suffering, but also an undercurrent of great faith flows there! We've held revivals in New Orleans in the past and seen the Holy Spirit MOVE!!!

On Saturday, February 8th, we're praising, worshiping, and praying for the Lord to heal and restore the city of New Orleans. We'll be joined by local pastors and Believers from the Crescent City desperate to see the presence of God rest on New Orleans. It will be a POWERFUL TIME and no better place to kick off the REVIVE in 25 Tour. Preceding the revival, we will hold a Jesus March in the French Quarter! Promo video and details for the march and revival are below!

body:
I’ve recorded this video to thank our best supporters for standing with Senate Republicans to take back the Senate majority. | Fellow American,

Thank you for your diligent responses to our surveys, polls, and questionnaires this year. Because of your input, we flipped **FOUR SENATE SEATS RED!**

Our hard work paid off. We took back the Senate majority and elected President Donald Trump to his second term. _We couldn’t have done it without**your support.**_

I worked with my team to [**record this video message**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=2884ba46c0b24b9785f8de37e175f3d1&_e=z5gQ91gOhqcXKbUFGLmqnxn32DODXKWW0zWyfI2L64-SInqRtOeNXKWfcOqPG79BTHWaFr5WduMpzGYe7K47j3br8yslC1_ilmba8OcSUF5p0uZyhK0bsf9OKVTEu0iiH_3-MeDo_ceXrShVF7ULo2nz1wOMn9eItXfjkspsKd8wV29QbPqtIFK-JGb-_dqwEHRsKHz2YNn3TIRUo2HZ2ZVdKPrFCoAYvq3tCcUjnVmr4BcmxRFtc-UXOwy-DxhXPXXiRqmpDumzGMsFtHqNpkHQhDtHBlSZeN9Uhm2JkVULMpeon_o-OK3WSIDGSfSiKf5BhkRBVUL4_epDCODuPvrGFuCKotqxaW3AoAhiPW_izUNkKzohH5ZYJJYws801SEyc1Hj6d4SGAzwRgTOfZU3c0obaSrr0DfcKTrzsytbcnjHvDm6mWLgjFJ8Phvfo9ksKFxxsZ9n2fXyijzUWoQ%3D%3D) to our most dependable supporters to thank you for everything you did to help make our vision for America’s prosperous future a reality.

[**📹 Watch the video: 📹**](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=2884ba46c0b24b9785f8de37e175f3d1&_e=z5gQ91gOhqcXKbUFGLmqnxn32DODXKWW0zWyfI2L64-SInqRtOeNXKWfcOqPG79BTHWaFr5WduMpzGYe7K47j3br8yslC1_ilmba8OcSUF5p0uZyhK0bsf9OKVTEu0iiH_3-MeDo_ceXrShVF7ULo2nz1wOMn9eItXfjkspsKd8wV29QbPqtIFK-JGb-_dqwEHRsKHz2YNn3TIRUo2HZ2ZVdKPrFCoAYvq3tCcUjnVmr4BcmxRFtc-UXOwy-DxhXPXXiRqmpDumzGMsFtHqNpkHQhDtHBlSZeN9Uhm2JkVULMpeon_o-OK3WSIDGSfSiNfOd2wzw45NnUYgYQcND_rqOAAejG8H9KHVdFW-qpeJq3fapLvzxxr5U5WpLRKO3S-JSg1ZVgN4xu9_piLhq1xWvRNLrloAnBDlZ3rtk05gfZYVCUmoUS4hDobJhyEh8_9VPbDWsDC_00Djgh5UNyw%3D%3D)
Thank you,

Steve Daines
United States Senator (R-SD)
Chairman, NRSC

name: David Horowitz
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f011f6f662c24df892c0b72d0f2ef8ac&_e=NQZmUNIks26NMVYyzjYSogiqb8JpsM9kVl-PzlpzXjVPLpBfLEI49xAOt9Pc12Zd3kAmZtBOiw2ah84Whu50tNQQgLjJ9SougjlquXvBzr2oxmq02FXN2Kqm66OnsDlfiBZCFZ2s2bsYK856efdRn38CBVXtOuLkQ-iaO_QdgGwYb992Zp3I30YtITL7hH_QqTOCDnSrY8wBZJu3ZvThJhhBQYMbF0JxGwzHvv8AY99MkCr-MTM5IChopPcV97KoJdVMMfNvCj92p6XOsFfINukOhuQIqL3bMshoMURq0Bjq-z2Ki3UQL_OljbRGcvGCWGbMQ-H8-0DJYQUc1kr9leocHHENeA07kW31xh3nA8aqBtbXli2n6GKTukQUeMTEEyzj0bn1hbu1L3bIeP9Xi7pIjdAUuV2vZvUkO26J9k4%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f011f6f662c24df892c0b72d0f2ef8ac&_e=NQZmUNIks26NMVYyzjYSogiqb8JpsM9kVl-PzlpzXjVPLpBfLEI49xAOt9Pc12Zd3kAmZtBOiw2ah84Whu50tNQQgLjJ9SougjlquXvBzr2oxmq02FXN2Kqm66OnsDlfiBZCFZ2s2bsYK856efdRn38CBVXtOuLkQ-iaO_QdgGwYb992Zp3I30YtITL7hH_QqTOCDnSrY8wBZJu3ZvThJhhBQYMbF0JxGwzHvv8AY99MkCr-MTM5IChopPcV97Kou33JZ2wumRJWgk3UzEUjnPGxuy8awx9uFNDT6UJv0fwSjsiR-2Cg1sf8dUhjyPj94OL6woHrVn87_HVopWTGyN3tcj374ot9MrgkGsqcgIiyDUgKziz1Fo9-_sYqjkOHl604gmrl5LOtfxppKpRsw7AXtri9bjikh50sht0MBVY%3D)** The Left is at war with America. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: building a stronger Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. In Congress, I’ve built a record of bringing people together — Republicans and Democrats alike — to get things done.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98609001/517218717/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-12-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI4YzhjMTQtZGFiOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E3Ap3e4CMiA8FcH-oYpvrhapHyjoODfbzSBy-j9YWsM=)

| Peter,

I’m running for Governor of Virginia, because I believe in the promise of this Commonwealth — a place where every family can thrive, every child can reach their potential, and every community can be safe, healthy, and prosperous.

From the Shenandoah Valley to Hampton Roads, I’ve heard from Virginians who want the same things. They want strong schools, affordable housing, and good jobs. That’s why I’m running for Governor — to make sure we build a Virginia where everyone has the chance to succeed. **As Governor, I’ll work to:**

**✅ ****Strengthen our public schools** so every child can get the education they deserve.
**✅ ****Prevent gun violence** to keep our kids safe.
**✅ ****Lower costs** and make the essentials Virginians need more affordable.
**✅ ****Protect reproductive rights** so every Virginian can make decisions about their own healthcare.

We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. In Congress, I’ve built a record of bringing people together — Republicans and Democrats alike — to get things done.

That’s the same approach I’ll bring to Richmond, where **we need real leadership, not division.**

[_**But I can’t do it alone. To win, I need your support. Every dollar you contribute helps us reach more Virginians and build a strong campaign. So, can I count on your support today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98609003/517218719/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-12-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI4YzhjMTQtZGFiOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E3Ap3e4CMiA8FcH-oYpvrhapHyjoODfbzSBy-j9YWsM=)

body:
_“ON DAY ONE I’LL SHUT DOWN THE FBI HOVER BUILDING... AND REOPEN
IT AS A MUSEUM OF THE DEEP STATE”_

WOW!

Trump's new FBI pick is making waves.

In case you missed it Trump nominated Kash Patel to be our next FBI
Director.

This is MASSIVE!

And it has the Left sweating.

They know that he’s going to END the rampant corruption and return
our country to the American people.

We just have one BIG PROBLEM!

He needs to be confirmed by the Senate first.

It would only take 3 RINOs in the Senate to stop his appointment and
any other of Trump's picks..

So we need to keep the pressure on them to GET THE JOB DONE!

It’s not enough to just win an election, we have to MAGA.

And that means appointing every one of Trump's nominees.

We have to make sure Republicans who just won DO THEIR JOBS and DRAIN
THE SWAMP!

Because if Trump can’t rely on the Senate to get patriots like Kash
appointed, then we won for nothing.

Any RINO Republican that refuses to help Trump MAGA needs to lose
their seat.

It’s that simple.

And we need your help to keep them in check.

Without the commitment of voters like you to get rid of FAKE
CONSERVATIVES, the MAGA movement could be dead in the water.

PLEASE, sign this petition now and pledge to hold the Senate
accountable:

We have to put every RINO on notice.

If you get in the way of MAGA, YOU’RE GONE!

It’s not enough to just win an election, we have to MAGA. And that means appointing every one of Trump's nominees. We have to make sure Republicans who just won DO THEIR JOBS and DRAIN THE SWAMP! Because if Trump can’t rely on the Senate to get patriots like Kash appointed, then we won for nothing. Any RINO Republican that refuses to help Trump MAGA needs to lose their seat. It’s that simple. And we need your help to keep them in check. Without the commitment of voters like you to get rid of FAKE CONSERVATIVES, the MAGA movement could be dead in the water. PLEASE, sign this petition now and pledge to hold the Senate accountable: We have to put every RINO on notice. If you get in the way of MAGA, YOU’RE GONE! ADD YOUR NAME [] Paid for by Overhaul PAC

Peter,
---
We've all watched the FBI and Department of Justice hijacked and weaponized by the left. They've flexed their political muscle to investigate and intimidate law-abiding citizens in the hopes of quelling dissent. We've watch Conservative groups, pro-life individuals, and President Trump be in the bullseye, and it needs to stop.

I joined Laura Ingraham to discuss the institutional corruption in our FBI, and why I'm supporting President Trump's nominee for FBI Director, Kash Patel. Kash Patel will bring transparency to the administration and restore trust with the American people. That's why the Democrats and the mainstream media are dead set on derailing the nomination. I'll do everything in my power to confirm Patel and deliver President Trump the Cabinet he wants so that he can implement the policies the American people voted for. **_WATCH THE INGRAHAM ANGLE INTERVIEW⬇⬇⬇_**

clean_body: With Republicans gaining power at the federal level, protecting state-level Democratic majorities is vital to protecting abortion access, voting rights, and gun safety against the MAGA agenda. | | | | | ---|--- 128,000. That’s how many grassroots Democrats have committed to defending our democracy against Republican voter suppression. 128,000 Democrats have taken a meaningful step to elect leaders who will protect abortion access in our statehouses. 128,000 Democrats have joined a movement larger than themselves to fight against Republican extremism. Grassroots supporters from every state in the country have donated to our movement to elect state Dems. But you still haven’t joined them. With Republicans gaining power at the federal level, protecting state-level Democratic majorities is vital to protecting abortion access, voting rights, and gun safety against the MAGA agenda. If we fall behind in our fundraising, we won’t be able to compete against Republican spending in upcoming special elections. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thanks for stepping up. name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: Donald Trump spent million$ to flip PA this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’ve been trying to give you a break from the emails since the election, but we’re reaching out right now about something important.
#
Hi Derek, it's Team Fetterman.
We’ve been trying to give you a break from the emails since the election, but we’re reaching out right now about something important.
**We’re coming up on our December mid-month fundraising deadline, and we *really* need your help to reach our $15,000 goal.**
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241212?amount=5&refcode=em20241212-9683&refcode2=9683_434096_ytSsqW&akid=9683%2E434096%2EytSsqW)**
Here in PA, Donald Trump spent million$ to turn our Commonwealth red this year. And you can bet they’re not going to stop there. So even when we just finished an election, it’s crucial that we keep reaching our goals.
This grassroots team (yes, we’re talking about YOU 🥰) was key to helping us turn PA 🔵 in 2022. **So now that we’re looking toward 2026 + 2028, we urgently need your help again:**
[**Will you make a donation of any amount toward John’s campaign right now? 100% of your donation goes toward helping him fight back + keep PA blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241212?refcode=em20241212-9683&refcode2=9683_434096_ytSsqW&akid=9683%2E434096%2EytSsqW)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241212?amount=5&refcode=em20241212-9683&refcode2=9683_434096_ytSsqW&akid=9683%2E434096%2EytSsqW)**
Whether it’s a vote to stop the GOP’s national abortion ban or to make healthcare more affordable, we need to make sure John has the resources to keep this seat 🔵 and keep fighting for working people in PA + across the entire country.
[**Will you make a donation of any amount to John’s campaign right now? We truly can’t afford to miss any of our goals, and we need your help to reach them.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241212?refcode=em20241212-9683&refcode2=9683_434096_ytSsqW&akid=9683%2E434096%2EytSsqW)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241212?amount=5&refcode=em20241212-9683&refcode2=9683_434096_ytSsqW&akid=9683%2E434096%2EytSsqW)**
Thanks for always standing with us, Derek.
—Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241212-9683-footer&t=1&refcode2=9683_434096_ytSsqW&akid=9683%2E434096%2EytSsqW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9683%2E434096%2EytSsqW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9683%2E434096%2EytSsqW)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=ba0f3214ec0a4db6a44f2833d1a36deb&_e=dUe1VuT2rUEStOcppcE1ydqS-zTddIN8LsFT3SYpCrETP6iTU_ejOp_6oez_7wD88b72XJqMeoJToi4wT2OnOPb20VI9k-02nFylqBReTC5ItRo1GSABe5UudZn6GF6s0_zOZ4p7s4WlZnH8QvZf3KfNEzUZ4Jg3YZh6yGSwJWZqMLD4kCCFaBKvB5mRmNbf5RfGwZyXgE9gzmjShNo9U-pWSNIT8dKUStox3i7A2asMyLv1SLPjE9ZoTYXT5fGhLs6PP_iBS6VCFKHrm7y49AZFSfxP29DFHwi7AgVUDwM5tjZ1PKvA3DQDGQKbDER1isSKySlXQ-jL7MJTv104e2OvbKv4dGZwT1_VvVVk9NJyVUc0S2gvnRGUEp2TLq-ZqlUyt60IG6PJOk7gOMTIeQ%3D%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** **** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=ba0f3214ec0a4db6a44f2833d1a36deb&_e=dUe1VuT2rUEStOcppcE1ydqS-zTddIN8LsFT3SYpCrETP6iTU_ejOp_6oez_7wD88b72XJqMeoJToi4wT2OnOPb20VI9k-02nFylqBReTC5ItRo1GSABe5UudZn6GF6s0_zOZ4p7s4WlZnH8QvZf3KfNEzUZ4Jg3YZh6yGSwJWZqMLD4kCCFaBKvB5mRmNbf5RfGwZyXgE9gzmjShNo9U-pWSNIT8dKUStox3i7A2asMyLv1SLPjE9ZoTYXT5fGhQ1jFYEROLJE3z5-ZCEcZaugaJvWvs37m8RJKyUoiBAH_368jCwZ0Qg-rcum0ZDzPaCN9ZjoWIt8x4naRJ1UT_Q3fEBuZayryEIoNk9R3tuj4JGkSGVZLbDN8aDfzI48rzwVgA8IfMHfut6G6WHyVpQ%3D%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=ba0f3214ec0a4db6a44f2833d1a36deb&_e=dUe1VuT2rUEStOcppcE1ydqS-zTddIN8LsFT3SYpCrETP6iTU_ejOp_6oez_7wD88b72XJqMeoJToi4wT2OnOPb20VI9k-02nFylqBReTC5ItRo1GSABe5UudZn6GF6s0_zOZ4p7s4WlZnH8QvZf3KfNEzUZ4Jg3YZh6yGSwJWZqMLD4kCCFaBKvB5mRmNbf5RfGwZyXgE9gzmjShNo9U-pWSNIT8dKUStox3i7A2asMyLv1SLPjE9ZoTYXT5fGhiX2lTpQB73l1-Q9gxOS13IzZgp8QSlxaDfOX6RtJdslJbYOvMReYqIg8Cy_vpNhbKx97QE-p1SIqap57zeAvZ8rgChlweuc92bfJzk1TkV_KIII6oZ8YNENpiObKudVlGRh6BN3WBjqBXh4wHR_jng%3D%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty. | [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=ba0f3214ec0a4db6a44f2833d1a36deb&_t=8VZWdsNp_PHBgBqtoR2ZBce3fl4TqHD8OhDb8WJjokYhGe7UifChAmXHBKrXxL5TYGm1D2kZXZnGlwlsu_RuELdJs3V1NL_kAgzOKog8D2_mPxhbwDwEmQc6SqIpNrHRteSB8b9B5Rpp4kpXyAfMCTZcaaSu7ui3lM1XOjUUop8%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=ba0f3214ec0a4db6a44f2833d1a36deb&_t=8VZWdsNp_PHBgBqtoR2ZBce3fl4TqHD8OhDb8WJjokYhGe7UifChAmXHBKrXxL5TYGm1D2kZXZnGlwlsu_RuEP3wbylvAhVDK9bg_NWG1J2xzriqwiBoyV-cKUmFWX-5).

🇺🇸 Hi there, 🇺🇸
We know there’s a lot going on the news, so please let us break down what’s happening – and why your $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q4-2024?refcode=em-12.12.24-all-a] support is so important right now.

Donald Trump has been nominating his cabinet with outright unqualified individuals who prioritize loyalty over competence.
This includes folks like Kash Patel who has an enemies list of Democrats he wants to prosecute on DAY ONE.

Make no mistake: Trump surrounded by a bunch of yes-men is a nightmare scenario.
And we know that the GOP led Congress won’t hold him accountable either, leaving it up to Democrats to push back and protect our democracy.

That’s why your support is more critical than ever. Will you chip in $3 to help us fight back against Donald Trump’s dangerous attacks on our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q4-2024?refcode=em-12.12.24-all-a]

Sen. Markwayne Mullin _**[put CNN's Jake Tapper in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/7875a8fb-a00d-4f98-b178-038a252a0120?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ after he played a 3-year-old audio clip of Pete Hegseth in attempt to make him look bad for a past alcohol problem.
**[Watch Mullin TAKE HIM DOWN!](https://substack.com/redirect/9dc00aaa-8dce-4672-b297-6ec066072b62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7875a8fb-a00d-4f98-b178-038a252a0120?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tapper played the clip of Hegseth _**[describing his struggle](https://substack.com/redirect/9dc00aaa-8dce-4672-b297-6ec066072b62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ with alcohol after returning from a tour in Iraq.
"I'd look around at 10 o'clock and be like 'What am I going to do today? How about I drink some beers. How about I eat some lunch and drink some beers,'" the combat veteran can be heard saying in the clip.
_**[Mullin quickly nipped Tapper's attempt in the bud.](https://substack.com/redirect/7875a8fb-a00d-4f98-b178-038a252a0120?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ "Jake that wasn't him saying he had an alcohol problem, that was him being honest! Unfortunately, a lot of our combat vets have come back and faced the same thing."
Hegseth is Trump's nominee for Secretary of Defense nominee and has recently come under fire from the mainstream media over sexual misconduct allegations and other accusations against his character. While democrats question if he is fit for the critical role of leading the Defense Department, many of Trump's supporters have come to his defense.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7875a8fb-a00d-4f98-b178-038a252a0120?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented by Allegiance Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/367f5674-1026-482a-84dc-90a8bc4878fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# The Looming Retirement Crisis...
_Will Your Retirement Savings Survive the Next Years?_
The world is shifting faster than ever before, and uncertainty isn't a possibility anymore.
Our fragile financial system is on life support. Even as bold leaders step in to fix what they can, the cracks are too deep, the risks too great. Uncertainty isn't a possibility anymore--it's the reality we live in.
Sleepless nights, missed opportunities, and broken dreams are the price of hesitation. The world is shifting fast, and waiting for the system to fix itself is a gamble you can't afford. _**[[Full Story]](https://substack.com/redirect/367f5674-1026-482a-84dc-90a8bc4878fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Show me how to protect my savings](https://substack.com/redirect/367f5674-1026-482a-84dc-90a8bc4878fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Nancy Mace DESTROYS smug bureaucrat who fudged the numbers to include illegal immigrants in U.S. census**
Rep. Nancy Mace was FLABBERGASTED to hear from a census official that they counted illegal immigrants as part of the American population in the U.S. census.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ea66bb99-2775-4a81-9838-1f050cb921ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"So, I'm gonna ask the question again!" Mace started. "Are illegal aliens, criminal illegal aliens, the people that break the law coming into our country when they enter in the door illegally, are they counted in the U.S. census, yes or no?"
"Yes," the official replied.
Mace further pressed as to whether there were congressional district apportionment implications to counting the U.S. population this way.
"Are there political implications?!" she demanded. Watch this government stooge's pathetic answer.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ea66bb99-2775-4a81-9838-1f050cb921ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

Should illegal immigrants be counted in the U.S. census?

---
[No](https://substack..eYsBVjUpJd6wiGSZ9M6GyHjaKu-5ruJjzlJxxL9LcaI?)
[Not sure](https://substack..4JaYLExety32rsWoPo_Q5Vp7vTMhv7QADlxFF4TnBtQ?)
[Yes but separately from citizens](https://substack..PwDnnzl1BFM8u-L0B1E8YF4_PPqQh4IVXfFtNLYlQpM?)
* * *
# **Buzzed Karen meets no-nonsense cop and gets BRUTAL REALITY CHECK!**
Police body cam footage shows _**[the arrest of a female driver](https://substack.com/redirect/05dfb860-5261-443a-81d8-e65e91ad1876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ in Martin County, Florida on October 2, 2023.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/05dfb860-5261-443a-81d8-e65e91ad1876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The female suspect was pulled over at a local gas station and appeared to be too inebriated to know part of her bumper was hanging off her car.
When officers asked for her vehicle registration and insurance, she seemed too tipsy to know what or where they were located, and instead _**[turned her anger and frustration toward the officers.](https://substack.com/redirect/05dfb860-5261-443a-81d8-e65e91ad1876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
When officers noticed these signs of intoxication, they asked the driver to step out of her vehicle, however, she refused to cooperate with their lawful orders.
Officers then needed to remove the suspect from her vehicle to apprehend her. She was later charged with DUI, resisting an officer without violence, criminal mischief, and battery on a law enforcement officer.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/05dfb860-5261-443a-81d8-e65e91ad1876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented by Allegiance Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/d765793b-7076-40e3-b20d-97f6d43fc6ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# The Global Power Shift Threatening America's Financial Future
_Are the BRICS Nations Ready to Dethrone the U.S. Dollar?_
After direct threats from Trump against the BRICS nations, China, Russia, and others are spearheading an unprecedented effort to challenge the dominance of the U.S. dollar.
By creating alternative financial systems and alliances, they are aiming to reshape global trade and currency power. This isn't just a foreign policy issue--it's **[a direct threat to your wealth.](https://substack.com/redirect/d765793b-7076-40e3-b20d-97f6d43fc6ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
If their efforts succeed, the ripple effects could undermine the purchasing power of your savings and retirement. **[[Full Story]](https://substack.com/redirect/d765793b-7076-40e3-b20d-97f6d43fc6ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

subject: Progressives to DNC: Change or Wither
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The Democratic Party needs a massive overhaul. The Congressional
Progressive Caucus just joined Our Revolution to push for radical reform
at the DNC — but we need grassroots support to make it happen.

Progressives want major DNC reforms

With the elections underway for the next DNC Chair, progressive
representatives in Congress are making it clear that we want the next
leaders of the party to:

1. Reform, restructure, and rebrand the party.
1. Embrace grassroots donors and reject special interest and dark money.
1. Rebuild our multiracial working-class base.
1. Show recent, demonstrated experience of turning around organizations,
building large coalitions and winning elections.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20696?source=email-20241212&t=1011&akid=7387%2E5885482%2Efp6ZV0 ][IMG]

Rep. Pramila Jayapal said she is proud to team up with Our Revolution to
lead the charge to ensure the Democratic Party returns to its roots as the
party of working people. “The corporate influence and dark money flooding
primaries have hurt the party’s credibility among voters — leading to
devastating losses to Trump and the erosion of trust among working-class
Americans,” she said.

We can’t let the corporate wing of the party keep sidelining the
grassroots.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20696?source=email-20241212&t=1012&akid=7387%2E5885482%2Efp6ZV0 ]Now, with new DNC leadership elections around the corner, this is our
moment to demand change. Sign the petition today and add your voice to the
growing movement calling for a bold, progressive Democratic Party:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20696?source=email-20241212&t=1013&akid=7387%2E5885482%2Efp6ZV0 ]SIGN THE PETITION

When we organize, we win. Let’s build the pressure the DNC can’t ignore.

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, The Democratic Party needs a massive overhaul. The Congressional Progressive Caucus just joined Our Revolution to push for radical reform at the DNC — but we need grassroots support to make it happen. Progressives want major DNC reforms With the elections underway for the next DNC Chair, progressive representatives in Congress are making it clear that we want the next leaders of the party to: 1. Reform, restructure, and rebrand the party. 1. Embrace grassroots donors and reject special interest and dark money. 1. Rebuild our multiracial working-class base. 1. Show recent, demonstrated experience of turning around organizations, building large coalitions and winning elections. [ ][IMG] Rep. Pramila Jayapal said she is proud to team up with Our Revolution to lead the charge to ensure the Democratic Party returns to its roots as the party of working people. “The corporate influence and dark money flooding primaries have hurt the party’s credibility among voters — leading to devastating losses to Trump and the erosion of trust among working-class Americans,” she said. We can’t let the corporate wing of the party keep sidelining the grassroots. [ ]Now, with new DNC leadership elections around the corner, this is our moment to demand change. Sign the petition today and add your voice to the growing movement calling for a bold, progressive Democratic Party: [ ]SIGN THE PETITION When we organize, we win. Let’s build the pressure the DNC can’t ignore. name: Truth to Power
subject: Despicable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39346%2E3422442%2EA2jdX0)
Derek,
In November of last year, the _Daily Beast_ reported on a pro-Trump Super PAC that took money from the Small Business Administration’s COVID Loan program–which is prohibited.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241212?refcode=em20241212-39346&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39346_3422442_A2jdX0&akid=39346%2E3422442%2EA2jdX0)
Now, take a look at that same Super PAC’s spending:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241212?refcode=em20241212-39346&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39346_3422442_A2jdX0&akid=39346%2E3422442%2EA2jdX0)
$0 spent on independent expenditures (IEs) to help the candidates they were claiming to support. $661,979 paid to the PAC’s operator itself. In other words, this Super PAC scammed people into donating and then enriched its operators.
This is an issue that spans both sides of the aisle. Scam PACs send hysterical emails to try and scare people into donating, and then don’t actually use the money for what they promised.
Katie has introduced two bills to hold Scam PACs accountable for their despicable behavior. One would ban PAC operators from enriching themselves or their family members with the money they raise. The second bill would close loopholes so the Federal Election Commission can go after these scammers.
Truth to Power is the anti-Scam PAC, we endorse and financially support real candidates who will carry on Katie’s fights against corruption in Washington. We also spread awareness about this issue—it’s not right that scammers are lining their pockets through deception.
**[If you believe in our fight to put an end to Scam PACs, please pitch in today to help us support a new wave of candidates who will carry on Katie’s work against corruption.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241212?refcode=em20241212-39346&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39346_3422442_A2jdX0&akid=39346%2E3422442%2EA2jdX0)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241212?refcode=em20241212-39346&refcode2=39346_3422442_A2jdX0&akid=39346%2E3422442%2EA2jdX0)
Whether you can afford to donate today or not, thank you so much for your support.
With gratitude,
Team Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241212-39346&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39346_3422442_A2jdX0&akid=39346%2E3422442%2EA2jdX0)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39346%2E3422442%2EA2jdX0).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Tonight I joined fellow writer and father, Wajahat Ali, creator of the excellent substack newsletter titled [THE LEFT HOOK with Wajahat Ali](https://open.substack.com/users/5345375-the-left-hook-with-wajahat-ali?utm_source=mentions), to discuss universal healthcare.
We debunk the myths surrounding universal healthcare, share our respective stories about how each of our daughters survived life threatening illnesses, the financial and mental strain of those struggles, and ask a very important question: Will the killing of the UnitedHealth CEO force billion dollar corporations to reevaluate their exploitative practices?
Click below to watch our discussion, and my answer to that question. **Be sure to comment, follow, and subscribe to Wajahat 's writing as well.**

**[Click here to watch My Interview with Wajahat Ali of The Left Hook](https://substack.com/redirect/b473bb0a-054f-45fc-bf2b-6da4620d951c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Bah! Humbug!

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c14bac828dd04c1a84fc4eb9485bf38e&_e=BIdiob6YwQk4_gHgAt44NqfYfUIAs8u_iznhCHyfMiCkrQGZHga5T2l7SnW9HEhTbFm7unx-d6U1sCD3lf6283hHz8pALd04XRc4A53pRkT9hrfyi1z2c15wv3ToKS7s9tXym2UAdeg_PBUyCMk5SzpJQUfvj7VOjQqdnOA1fnkYKzS9_LiDZTfrnjKmDvNxuZ1dyDKrlYDIAwWT0PvBKXg59JckvW7iy7lzmgtln5RZLVblquzpA6bLBwfs8b2WnRt2oPzPqZir8gs38O-qCpkdEpH-Mh1qvzpMnCj1w3e3QEl6w_jLADRXE9qxjQZ1-BqVDhWo1l7lb31NgEKuqQ6CQn-5KEpUOd8I_HeuhfL8t4nCL9OsjaCj7vJtd6TgdIDuPj1lN0ZFsuD9mNhKCXz3xMbC9lXNgtctWEuaA_o%3D)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c14bac828dd04c1a84fc4eb9485bf38e&_e=BIdiob6YwQk4_gHgAt44NqfYfUIAs8u_iznhCHyfMiCkrQGZHga5T2l7SnW9HEhTbFm7unx-d6U1sCD3lf6283hHz8pALd04XRc4A53pRkT9hrfyi1z2c15wv3ToKS7s9tXym2UAdeg_PBUyCMk5SzpJQUfvj7VOjQqdnOA1fnkYKzS9_LiDZTfrnjKmDvNxuZ1dyDKrlYDIAwWT0PvBKXg59JckvW7iy7lzmgtln5RZLVblquzpA6bLBwfs8b2Wr7m5U5vXrsF__I75-mhwiyU7iBEhe00CT2tIkyZeVUSBHljURbaBOw03CmhQIz5HPflvxS48JGOIuhACm8F_1cqfk1fw4BlOPTYOhCUzKxg_sB0yBSX4sdM7iJTo1eHSpCejq72CaNI-FQGKHJW4c6GFKXSoYsjNZ3_Zkms3ERs%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=c14bac828dd04c1a84fc4eb9485bf38e&_t=L3_R0q1s2fr_EhKGLjVBHFwnt_8pIgB2dK91zrLN0vaxTeN5QC6VCo99ywDwldU_cb92y1KwtlbEcTUeWook3XwQDiCtA9NVn7DnvQv4aRVlk96KCnKgkGIxNTHKuh9-)

---

name: Jasmine Smith
subject: Emerge is always prepared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
The result of this election doesn’t change our work, Team Emerge is always prepared to go.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98610087/517222237/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-12-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxNDMxZGYzLWRmYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7rNfJx9ErDmfCtHQWlGikbIWDh1gxSXZZszLTbI_LCA=)

| Peter,

The result of this election doesn’t change our work, Team Emerge is always prepared to go.

Emerge’s Congressional Caucus has almost tripled in size since our first five alums — _**Deb Haaland, Abigail Spanberger, Kim Schrier, Lucy McBath, and Xochitl Torres Small **_— were elected to Congress in 2018.

Since then, we've added Melanie Stansbury (NM-1), Becca Balint (VT-AL), Val Hoyle (OR-4), Andrea Salinas (OR-6), and Emilia Sykes (OH-13).

We are excited to welcome our powerhouse alums Yassamin Ansari (AZ-3), Janelle Bynum (OR-5), Dr. Maxine Dexter (OR-3), Sarah Elfreth (MD-3), LaMonica McIver (NJ-10), and Lateefah Simon (CA-12) who will be sworn into the 119th Congress next year. This is stunning growth when the percentage of Democratic women House candidates has plateaued.

**That’s because Emerge remains one of the best returns on investment in Democratic politics** — we recruit, train, and empower Democratic women to run with the right message in the right districts to serve their communities in office. But this was all possible because of your ongoing support.

With Emerge alums at the forefront, we’re ready to fight back against Donald Trump and his MAGA allies. This will be an uphill battle — that’s why we’re asking for your support to ensure we have the resources to kickstart the new year strong.

[_**Will you contribute $25 (becomes $50) or more today to take advantage of our end-of-the-year MATCH opportunity? name: Sarah McBride
subject: Nothing is truly impossible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I know that hope can be challenging in this moment.
#
I know that hope can be challenging in this moment. But one thing I’ve learned over the years that we all need to keep in mind is that _nothing_ is truly impossible.
When I was younger I often worried that the heart of this country wasn’t big enough to love someone like me. Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible.
I still carry that with me now. Because in so many ways, on both sides of the political divide, I think our country is currently experiencing its own crisis of hope.
But I know that we still have both the individual _and_ the collective capacity to meet the scope and scale of the challenges we face. I know it because I’ve personally seen it.
If we’re persistent and intentional about the work ahead of us, I know there’s no problem too great for us to solve together. And although it may look tough right now, always remember that things can and do change very fast in today’s world.
So don’t lose hope. A better tomorrow is just around the corner if we put in the work.
[**If you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for our neighbors, please consider pitching in $5 or more to my campaign today. I’m counting on your support to keep up this important work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241212-1?refcode=em20241212-1617&amount=5&refcode2=1617_21716_w2XCUa&akid=1617%2E21716%2Ew2XCUa)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241212-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241212-1617&refcode2=1617_21716_w2XCUa&akid=1617%2E21716%2Ew2XCUa)**
In gratitude,
Sarah McBride

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: A tough fight
body:
We wanted to take a moment to explain where things stand, but also to talk about why these messages continue to be so important.
---
Derek, We’ve sent a number of messages since Election Day, so we wanted to take a moment to explain where things stand, but also to talk about why these messages continue to be so important. No doubt about it: the election did not go the way we had hoped. Democrats invested millions of dollars and hours but ultimately, we came up short. But this is no time to sit back. Our work now is more important than ever. Soon, Trump will be sworn into office. We already know what he and his allies are capable of and what they plan to do. It’s crucial that we have a strong and robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under his control. If you understand the importance of stopping Trump’s far-right agenda and standing up to him and his allies, we are asking you to contribute to the Democratic National Committee today. [**Click here to do just that.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241212_2391_fr&refcode2=2396_22930333_rLtinx&akid=2396%2E22930333%2ErLtinx) The truth is that the DNC is best positioned to move resources where they are needed, when they are needed. It is what we do. Especially now as we gear up for what is going to be a tough fight. And your donations — in response to emails just like this one — make up a very big part of our ability to do that work. So while you may not have opened this email expecting to donate, given how important it is for us to fight back and rebuild and how effectively we can put your contribution to work, we have to ask: [**Can Democrats everywhere count on you to contribute $3 to the Democratic National Committee today? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241212_2391_fr&refcode2=2396_22930333_rLtinx&akid=2396%2E22930333%2ErLtinx) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241212_2391_fr&refcode2=2396_22930333_rLtinx&akid=2396%2E22930333%2ErLtinx)**
