name: Working Families Party
subject: Musk wants to cut Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter — One of Trump’s very first actions after the election was to hand-pick **two unelected billionaires** — Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy — to drastically cut federal government spending, and give them more opportunities to enrich themselves. They have already proposed cutting $2 trillion1 in government spending — with everything from veterans’ medical care, Pell Grants, Head Start, and funding for the National Institute of Health on the chopping block.2 And despite promises made to working class voters on the campaign trail, Musk, Ramaswamy, and Republicans have made it clear that **Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid are in their sights** as well.3 The good news? Most of the proposed cuts would need to pass through Congress. And with Republicans holding a razor thin majority in the House, Speaker Johnson can’t afford any defections. This gives us a real opportunity to stop these cuts like these (or worse) in their tracks — but only if enough of us speak out and make our voices heard. **[Will you sign our petition to tell Congress: Protect Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid from being raided by billionaires and oppose any and all budget cuts that will hurt working families?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o91y6q3U4lGLQHAE4hM59Ty2rz0RD5ftEZjzRk7FI0i4TxRsLLAtyFS5YOh07eVt-bDy302uQdm6H4ZCriv3E_cpM0xXPTyi7Y3ZbN_Fta9-24xnntKlGSgg0SoMDNuBw5UXNeMhecvJubCVsmSamBMbN3MzhlucK1ad7lvGKowKCr3UICuHOtVpadQr37yWCI3VFwj3Jn7a9b2NWGAp55RWLbkRVPE8GVErAPyvrlptpL4Aam3NTW7zTWysFIaX7E8oqx-lKKMXk0981db-NjG8lbp-XJwpMr4lHxJMfq28_A/4c8/lKFaZUncRCaqwrtdOUFeBA/h0/h001.hAd7J9biIpJHcqSX9BB4U8E9h9ND3nJQoxmX1dGgU5I)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o91y6q3U4lGLQHAE4hM59Ty2rz0RD5ftEZjzRk7FI0i4TxRsLLAtyFS5YOh07eVt-bDy302uQdm6H4ZCriv3E_cpM0xXPTyi7Y3ZbN_Fta9-24xnntKlGSgg0SoMDNuBw5UmP8Wcw4mkqXN4ceFI_nF0SPwk_1sLyebkzhDUCNXj2DzY7Dt8z-sizorab8dXH5X6GfFKQsnn35VAAC2DXuS26ccmv2tirkKunFSVOkoxMh7fDmxnt_P4Uqnpe47BqMhAdkoR5BGKZ4eREiXkD9RtXQettIxtcw1iFEEBFcUi1g/4c8/lKFaZUncRCaqwrtdOUFeBA/h1/h001.Tz6h_rcW_Ml_55wurHdMnUFjTRaYz-RSq0g73a2_zpY)** As the world’s richest man, Elon Musk spent $277 million4 to elect Donald Trump. It was a tiny drop in the bucket for him — and his investment is already paying off big-time. **Musk’s wealth has already increased by _over 77%_ since the election, becoming the first person ever to surpass $400 billion in net worth.** And now he wants to cash in _even more_ by demanding drastic cuts to programs that uplift the working class. Meanwhile, Republicans intend to make Trump’s tax cuts for billionaires permanent.5 The pundit class may have been hoodwinked by Trump’s supposed “populist” agenda, and some working class voters may have hoped his election would mean they’d see real difference in their lives. **But Trump and his new BFF Elon Musk are already scheming to turn the entire federal government into a corrupt slush fund by and for the billionaires, with working people left out in the cold.** And it will be up to all of us, working together, to stop them. With your help, we can make these proposed cuts a poison pill that no Member of Congress will want to touch. **[Sign our petition opposing Elon Musk’s cuts, and together we can show both Republicans and Democrats in Congress that there will be political consequences if they support any cuts to the social safety net.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o91y6q3U4lGLQHAE4hM59Ty2rz0RD5ftEZjzRk7FI0i4TxRsLLAtyFS5YOh07eVt-bDy302uQdm6H4ZCriv3E_cpM0xXPTyi7Y3ZbN_Fta9-24xnntKlGSgg0SoMDNuBw5VhYfbSypS7nNiR03vo59nR6ZG_J1p-UwE6PnklOtuQwisYqdWW81U88zf6covchBJs9IBx4Z28UmnzxY7_Tio5hgNchWppfUT73leANAqAlkIHprts8iqwut7rzJIp-b773ENPidObRzRII60q72khpWawdDtsutuS4048_m0DMQ/4c8/lKFaZUncRCaqwrtdOUFeBA/h2/h001.EB3GKSRpe_4qIAcCN74LkpyJtZgDoTcgbLsA4qiqEEk)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o91y6q3U4lGLQHAE4hM59Ty2rz0RD5ftEZjzRk7FI0i4TxRsLLAtyFS5YOh07eVt-bDy302uQdm6H4ZCriv3E_cpM0xXPTyi7Y3ZbN_Fta9-24xnntKlGSgg0SoMDNuBw5Vn2oJyPQjZoRtOhy0yL9nrhjqFjKZIHXDeZvTk9rf8YEuVY8WvVWakfid9RwbsBqsmNG5veno1jvulBCoEuKHW3qsKJefNl5uUR5HQNj1Li6emktz3qv4FymeCXBbMlnLB0iJr9ll5ntAx1Hnp5UGrG6nVrF934UY9617qI09LwQ/4c8/lKFaZUncRCaqwrtdOUFeBA/h3/h001.UcxaWes8jDMDMKkCHSb_kH11zQyHrl-u5HvXB6rMTe4)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. clean_body: | | | Peter — One of Trump’s very first actions after the election was to hand-pick two unelected billionaires — Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy — to drastically cut federal government spending, and give them more opportunities to enrich themselves. They have already proposed cutting $2 trillion1 in government spending — with everything from veterans’ medical care, Pell Grants, Head Start, and funding for the National Institute of Health on the chopping block.2 And despite promises made to working class voters on the campaign trail, Musk, Ramaswamy, and Republicans have made it clear that Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid are in their sights as well.3 The good news? Most of the proposed cuts would need to pass through Congress. And with Republicans holding a razor thin majority in the House, Speaker Johnson can’t afford any defections. This gives us a real opportunity to stop these cuts like these (or worse) in their tracks — but only if enough of us speak out and make our voices heard. As the world’s richest man, Elon Musk spent $277 million4 to elect Donald Trump. It was a tiny drop in the bucket for him — and his investment is already paying off big-time. Musk’s wealth has already increased by over 77% since the election, becoming the first person ever to surpass $400 billion in net worth. And now he wants to cash in even more by demanding drastic cuts to programs that uplift the working class. Meanwhile, Republicans intend to make Trump’s tax cuts for billionaires permanent.5 The pundit class may have been hoodwinked by Trump’s supposed “populist” agenda, and some working class voters may have hoped his election would mean they’d see real difference in their lives. But Trump and his new BFF Elon Musk are already scheming to turn the entire federal government into a corrupt slush fund by and for the billionaires, with working people left out in the cold. And it will be up to all of us, working together, to stop them. With your help, we can make these proposed cuts a poison pill that no Member of Congress will want to touch. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Hill, November 3, 2024 2\. , Business Insider, November 21, 2024 3\. , Truthout, December 9, 2024 4\. , CBS News, December 6, 2024 5\. , C-Span, September 5, 2024 Thoughts? Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: The DC Bugle

subject: We can flip the Senate blue WAY sooner than you think...
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
